We call this gap the benchmark illusion: because detectability, behavioral manifestation, and controllability vary independently, it is multivariate rather than a single number, so no single awareness score is a reliable proxy for deployment safety.

</details>


### [440] [EnterpriseClawBench: Benchmarking Agents from Real Workplace Sessions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23654)
*Jincheng Zhong,Weizhi Wang,Che Jiang,Kai Tian,Zhenzhao Yuan,Junlin Yang,Dianqiao Lei,Kaiyan Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: EnterpriseClawBench是一个基于真实企业工作场景构建的智能体评估基准，包含852个可复现任务。由于数据涉及企业内部内容，仅公开构建和评估协议。最佳配置（Codex+GPT-5.5）得分仅0.663，表明企业智能体评估需要多维度报告，而非单一分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业智能体越来越多地在工作空间中运行，需要处理异构文件、调用工具和交付业务成果。然而，缺乏针对企业场景的标准化评估基准，现有基准无法反映真实企业环境的复杂性。

Method: 从大规模企业工作会话档案中构建基准，产出852个可复现任务，每个任务附带恢复的夹具(fixtures)、重写的提示、角色类别、技能子类、硬规则和语义评分标准。由于数据含企业敏感内容，仅公开构建协议和评估协议。

Result: 最佳配置（Codex with GPT-5.5）在EnterpriseClawBench上仅达到0.663分，说明企业智能体任务具有较高挑战性。

Conclusion: 企业智能体评估不能仅用单一分数衡量，必须报告组合、工件交付、视觉质量、成本、运行时间和技能迁移行为等多维度指标。

Abstract: Enterprise agents increasingly operate inside workspaces: they read heterogeneous files, invoke tools, and deliver business artifacts. We introduce EnterpriseClawBench, an enterprise agent benchmark constructed from proprietary, real-world agent sessions. Starting from a large archive of workplace sessions, the EnterpriseClawBench produces 852 reproducible tasks, each paired with recovered fixtures, rewritten prompts, role classes, skill subclasses, hard rules, and semantic rubrics. Because the sessions contain internal enterprise content, we do not release the benchmark data; instead, our reusable contribution is the construction and evaluation protocol. On EnterpriseClawBench, the best configuration reaches only 0.663 (Codex with GPT-5.5). These results show that enterprise agent evaluation must report harness--model combinations, artifact delivery, visual quality, cost, runtime, and skill-transfer behavior, rather than collapsing performance into a single score. Code: https://github.com/FrontisAI/EnterpriseClawBench

</details>


### [441] [Can LLMs Reliably Self-Report Adversarial Prefills, and How?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23671)
*Quang Minh Nguyen,Uzair Ahmed,Taegyoon Kim*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究大型语言模型在安全场景下的内省能力，发现模型无法可靠识别自身是否受到对抗性前缀攻击，平均27.3%的情况下声称被篡改的响应是有意为之。内省信号主要源于安全/拒绝相关推理，且该信号受探测方式影响显著。三种LoRA微调方法虽能扩大意图探测差距，但无法泛化至篡改探测，反而提高了多数模型的攻击成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前研究表明LLM在良性任务上具备内省能力，但尚不清楚在安全场景中模型能否可靠识别自身输出是否受到对抗性攻击，这关乎模型自我报告的可信度。

Method: 在10个开源指令微调LLM（3B-70B）和4个安全基准上，通过对抗性前缀攻击诱导模型生成不安全响应，然后使用不同探测问题（内部意图 vs 外部篡改）询问模型是否认为其输出是有意为之。同时采用权重正交化、LoRA微调（SFT、GRPO、DPO）等方法进行干预实验。

Result: 模型在被篡改的响应上平均27.3%声称是有意为之；内省信号主要来自安全/拒绝相关推理；权重正交化可消除预填与自然输出之间的声称率差距；探测方式不同会引出定性不同的回答；三种微调方法均扩大了意图探测差距但无法泛化至篡改探测，且多数模型攻击成功率反而上升。

Conclusion: LLM在安全场景下的内省能力不可靠，其自我报告存在风险。现有的微调干预手段只能实现部分缓解，甚至可能带来反效果，强调了对模型自我声称保持警惕的必要性。

Abstract: Prior work shows that large language models (LLMs) exhibit introspective capability on benign tasks. We extend the question to safety contexts and examine how reliably a model can recognize that its own prior response was elicited by an adversarial prefill attack. Across ten open-weight instruction-tuned LLMs (3B to 70B) and four safety benchmarks, no model reliably recognizes its own compromised outputs, with models claiming intent on prefilled responses at an average rate of $27.3\%$. Introspective signal stems largely from safety- and refusal-related reasoning. Orthogonalizing models' weights against the refusal direction collapses the gap between claiming rates on prefilled and natural outputs to near zero, though the direction is not its unique mediator. The signal is also probe-dependent: framing the question as internal intention versus external tampering elicits qualitatively different responses on the same models. We test three LoRA finetuning methods (SFT, GRPO, DPO) on eight models from 3B to 27B; all three widen the intention-probe gap on every model from 8B to 27B, with method ranking varying by model. The intervention does not transfer to the tampering probe and counterintuitively raises attack success rate under adversarial prefill on most models, amounting to a partial mitigation. These findings outline mechanisms underpinning the observed introspective signals in safety contexts and highlight risks in the reliability of LLM self-reports.

</details>


### [442] [Randomized YaRN Improves Length Generalization for Long-Context Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23687)
*Manas Mehta,Fangcong Yin,Greg Durrett*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Randomized YaRN方法，通过在短序列训练中引入随机位置编码和长度课程，显著提升大语言模型在超长序列（16K-128K）上的推理泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在短序列上预训练后，即使经过额外训练仍难以泛化到极长序列，需要找到更有效的长度泛化方法。

Method: 结合YaRN位置外推、随机位置编码（从更大位置范围采样）和长度课程策略，在短上下文训练中暴露模型到分布外位置表征。

Result: 在BABILong和MRCR基准上，使用<8K上下文训练，在16K-128K长度上持续提升推理性能，远超标准微调方法，在远外推长度上增益最大。

Conclusion: 逐步暴露模型到分布外位置分布是实现可泛化长上下文推理的有效策略。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are typically pretrained on short sequences and then extended to work on longer sequences with additional training. However, such LLMs still struggle to further generalize to very long sequences. We propose Randomized YaRN, a training method that improves length generalization by combining YaRN-based positional extrapolation with randomized positional encoding and a length curriculum. During training on short context data, tokens are assigned YaRN positional encodings sampled from a larger position range, exposing the model to out-of-distribution positional representations even on short-context inputs. We evaluate Randomized YaRN on two challenging long-context reasoning benchmarks, BABILong and Multi-Round Coreference Resolution (MRCR). When training on data with <8K context, Randomized YaRN consistently improves reasoning performance on context lengths from 16K to 128K and outperforms standard fine-tuning, with the largest gains appearing at far out-of-distribution lengths. Our results suggest that progressively exposing models to OOD positional distributions provides an effective recipe for generalizable long-context reasoning.

</details>


<div id='cs.MA'></div>

# cs.MA [[Back]](#toc)

### [443] [Specialize Roles, Mix Deployments: Pushing the Cost-Accuracy Frontier of LLM Agent Teams](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20629)
*Yinsicheng Jiang,Liang Cheng,Yeqi Huang,Yufan Zhao,Zhan Lu,Li Dong,Wenda Li,Edoardo Ponti,Luo Mai*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 提出AgentCARD基准，用于评估LLM代理团队的角色分配和部署模式，发现异构团队在成本-精度前沿上优于同构团队，且最优角色分配具有领域依赖性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代理基准通常评估固定模型或固定配置，无法为多角色团队中模型选择、角色分配和部署方式的成本-精度最优决策提供指导。

Method: 构建了角色分解评估框架、统一API/自托管成本模型、帕累托前沿分析以及基于Shapley值的角色瓶颈诊断方法。

Result: 异构团队在成本-精度前沿上始终占优；相比成本相同的同构团队，精度提升高达44%；通过混合部署，以12倍更低的单任务成本达到最强同构团队性能；最优角色分配具有领域依赖性。

Conclusion: AgentCARD支持多角色工作流的持续评估，为LLM代理团队的成本-精度最优部署提供了系统化的分析工具。

Abstract: LLM agents are increasingly deployed as multi-role teams, where tasks are divided across specialized roles such as planner, executor, and verifier. In these systems, cost and accuracy are no longer properties of a single model: they depend on which model fills each role and where it is hosted, including API, self-hosted, and hybrid deployment. Existing agentic benchmarks typically evaluate fixed models or fixed agent configurations, and therefore offer limited guidance for cost-accuracy-optimal deployment. We introduce AgentCARD, a role-aware benchmark suite for evaluating LLM agent teams across role assignment and deployment mode. AgentCARD combines a role-decomposed evaluation harness, a unified API/self-hosted cost model, Pareto-frontier analysis, and a Shapley-based diagnostic for identifying role bottlenecks. Our evaluation shows that heterogeneous teams consistently occupy the cost-accuracy frontier. They improve accuracy by up to $44\%$ over cost-equivalent homogeneous teams, or match the strongest homogeneous team at up to $12\times$ lower per-task cost through hybrid deployment. We further find that the best role assignment is domain-dependent: some domains are planner-bottlenecked, while others are executor-bottlenecked. Finally, AgentCARD extends beyond planner--executor teams to workflows with additional roles such as verification, and supports continual evaluation as new domains and team structures emerge. Our code is released at: https://github.com/Auto-CAP/AgentCAP

</details>


### [444] [How Much Coordination Gain Is Real? A Paired Noise-Floor Protocol for Multi-Agent LLM Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20695)
*Alibek T Kaliyev,Artem Maryanskyy*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文发现，多智能体LLM协调架构的基准测试结果存在显著的可重复性问题。在Claude Haiku 4.5上的实验表明，配置等效的协调协议产生的性能差异（最大+18pp）低于许多已发表论文声称的效果，且统计上不显著。作者建议使用"协调活跃pass^k"作为报告标准，并指出十个近期架构中有七个的声称效果低于实验观察到的噪声下限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 质疑多智能体LLM协调论文中报告的小基准差异是否真实反映了架构优劣，提出一个更基础的问题：当API输入配置等效时（通过代码审查和SHA-256字节审计匹配），不同协议在相同模型和基准上会产生多少配对trial-0分歧？

Method: 在Claude Haiku 4.5上对tau²-bench零售数据集进行实验，比较配置等效的协调协议（no_coord vs. intercept，两者在trial 0均无作用），使用两个n=100的随机种子。定义"协调活跃pass^k"作为最小报告协议，并在ET-MCP（一个符合MCP 2026-07-28标准的任务范围负知识存储）上运行测量。

Result: 配置等效对比给出配对差距为+10pp和0pp（两个种子），合并后+5pp，Wilson CI [-2,+12]，不显著。最大单种子对比（+18pp pull-vs-intercept）在第二个种子未复现（-3pp）。观察到的配对差距范围[-3,+18]pp，合并上限Wilson CI约15pp。十个近期多智能体协调架构中有七个的声称效果低于此局部下限。

Conclusion: 当前多智能体协调论文报告的基准差异可能处于统计噪声范围内，缺乏可重复性。建议采用"协调活跃pass^k"作为最小报告标准，并指出在Haiku 4.5上候选读取器（pull, intercept）并未改善trial-1恢复。

Abstract: Multi-agent LLM coordination papers report small benchmark deltas as evidence that one architecture beats another. A prior question: how much paired trial-0 disagreement do two protocols produce on the same model and benchmark when their API inputs are configuration-equivalent (matched by code inspection plus a SHA-256 byte audit), short of full identity-replay? On Claude Haiku 4.5 against tau^2-bench retail, the clean configuration-equivalent contrast (no_coord vs. intercept, both inert at trial 0) gives signed paired gaps of +10pp and 0pp across two n=100 seeds; pooled across both, +5pp with Wilson CI [-2,+12], not significant. The largest single-seed contrast (+18pp pull-vs-intercept, p_corr=0.012) did not reproduce at the second seed (-3pp, p_corr=1.0); no trial-0 contrast is significant after Bonferroni at either seed or pooled. The envelope of observed paired gaps spans [-3,+18]pp across two seeds, with pooled upper Wilson CI ~15pp. Seven of ten recent multi-agent coordination architectures report headline effects below this local floor, and one more sits inside the envelope; whether they survive a same-model paired replication is, by construction, untested in their original settings.
  We define coordination-active pass^k, pass^k restricted to trials where the coordination mechanism is logically active, as the minimum reporting protocol, with sample-size targets and runtime hooks in the body. Measurements run on ET-MCP, a task-scoped negative-knowledge store conformant with MCP 2026-07-28, used as a substrate to isolate reader-side choices, not as a contribution. On Haiku 4.5 the candidate readers (pull, intercept) do not improve trial-1 recovery; we give a preliminary diagnosis of failure modes with refinements on existing production hook surfaces.

</details>


### [445] [Structural Distinguishability of Static and Adaptive Policy Regimes in Agent-Based Regulatory Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20699)
*Roberto Garrone*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文通过一个可配置的排放调控ABM基准，比较了固定/自适应策略与固定/自适应代理的四种组合，发现即使平均结果相似，调控结论也可能不同，因此需通过机制可区分性而非仅平均表现来评估自适应策略ABM。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有政策导向的ABM将监管视为固定场景参数，无法区分调控结论究竟源于代理适应、政策适应还是二者的交互作用。

Method: 基于四机制架构，构建单一可配置的排放调控ABM，在匹配模拟条件下比较四种组合（固定政策/固定代理、固定政策/自适应代理、自适应政策/固定代理、自适应政策/自适应代理），并评估三种自适应控制器（设定点、安全边际、单边控制）。

Result: 基准恢复了预期的控制器原型行为：设定点控制追踪上限但频繁越界，安全边际控制通过保守减少违规，单边控制限制违规但可能在与自适应代理结合时趋向过度保守。

Conclusion: 方法论贡献：标量指标、上限相对符号诊断、轨迹模式与视觉检查共同揭示调控结论可能在平均结果相似时不同。自适应政策导向ABM应通过机制可区分性而非仅平均表现来评估。

Abstract: Agent-based models are widely used to evaluate policy interventions in complex socio-technical systems, yet many policy-oriented ABMs represent regulation as a fixed scenario parameter. This limits their ability to distinguish whether regulatory conclusions depend on agent adaptation, policy adaptation, or the interaction between both. Building on a previously proposed four-regime architecture, this paper contributes a controlled simulation benchmark rather than a new general framework. Using a single configurable emissions-regulation ABM, we compare constant policy/constant agents, constant policy/adaptive agents, adaptive policy/constant agents, and adaptive policy/adaptive agents under matched simulation conditions. We evaluate naive fixed policies, tracking-aware calibrated fixed policies, and three adaptive controllers: setpoint, safety-margin, and one-sided control. The benchmark recovers expected controller archetypes: setpoint control tracks the cap but produces frequent boundary crossings, safety-margin control reduces violations through conservatism, and one-sided control can limit violations but may ratchet toward over-conservatism when combined with adaptive agents. The contribution is methodological: scalar indicators, cap-relative symbolic diagnostics, trajectory motifs, and visual inspection jointly reveal how regulatory conclusions can differ even when average outcomes appear similar. Adaptive policy-oriented ABMs should therefore be evaluated through regime distinguishability, not only through average performance.

</details>


### [446] [Machine-Coached Policy Revision in Adaptive Agent-Based Regulatory Simulation: A Controller-Level Contestability Layer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20700)
*Roberto Garrone*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出一种轻量级机器辅导策略修订层，用于自适应代理基模型，通过可废止规则表示策略决策、生成解释，并将诊断失败转化为规则变更，支持控制器层面的可争议性（解释、质疑、修订、重评估）。在排放规制ABM实验中，该层有效减少了过度保守主义错误，同时维持违规、超调等性能护栏。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自适应ABM的诊断工作流大多是事后分析（ex post），仿真后的轨迹证据未被系统性地反馈回策略控制器，导致模型缺乏闭环的自我改进能力。

Method: 提出机器辅导策略修订层：1）将策略决策表示为带有显式冲突和优先级的可废止规则；2）为控制器行为生成解释；3）将诊断失败翻译为规则的增删或优先级变更。在排放规制ABM上进行受控实验，使用预定义辅导模板在VPVA机制中引入放松规则。

Result: 受控实验显示，添加放松规则后，在未见过的随机种子下，过度保守主义错误显著减少，同时违规、超调、波动性等护栏指标保持完好。

Conclusion: 机器辅导应理解为可解释自适应ABM在控制器层面的扩展，与因果诊断、信息论诊断、轨迹诊断互补，而非替代最优控制器或提供形式化保证。

Abstract: Policy-oriented agent-based models are increasingly used to study regulatory interventions in complex adaptive socio-technical systems. Recent adaptive ABM frameworks distinguish between static and adaptive agents, fixed and adaptive policies, and alternative controller designs. However, most diagnostic workflows remain ex post: trajectories are analysed after simulation, but the resulting evidence is not systematically fed back into the policy controller. This paper proposes a lightweight machine-coached policy-revision layer for adaptive agent-based regulation. The layer represents policy decisions as defeasible rules with explicit conflicts and priorities, generates explanations for controller actions, and allows diagnostic failures to be translated into rule additions, removals, or priority changes. The contribution is not a new optimal controller and does not claim formal guarantees for unrestricted machine coaching. Instead, it provides a simulation-compatible operationalization of controller-level contestability: policy decisions can be explained, challenged, revised, and re-evaluated in held-out simulation runs. A stylized emissions-regulation ABM is used as the experimental component. A controlled simulation experiment focuses on an over-conservatism failure in the VPVA regime. The predefined coaching template adds a relaxation rule to the symbolic controller, reducing over-conservatism recurrence under held-out seeds while preserving violation, overshoot, and volatility guardrails. The paper argues that machine coaching is best understood as a controller-level extension of explainable adaptive ABM, complementary to causal, information-theoretic, and trajectory-based diagnostics.

</details>


### [447] [BARD-MARL: Byzantine-Agent Detection for Learned Communication in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20701)
*Almond Kiruthu Murimi*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出BARD-MARL，一种基于拜占庭检测的后验诊断层，用于自适应交通信号控制中的多智能体通信MARL。它结合策略图特征与贝叶斯信任统计，在多种攻击下检测故障/对抗智能体，实验表明不同检测信号具有互补性，且单一方法无法在所有攻击场景中占优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在基于学习通信的协作多智能体强化学习中，训练好的策略可能通过已故障或被敌对的智能体路由信息，造成信任问题。本文旨在解决该场景下的拜占庭智能体检测问题。

Method: 提出BARD-MARL，作为BayesG之上的后验诊断层。结合两种智能体级别的证据流：(1) 从状态-动作轨迹中提取的策略图特征；(2) 从BayesG潜在掩码概率计算的贝叶斯信任统计量。

Result: 在25智能体网格中，10%观测翻转攻击下AUC-ROC达0.843；10%协调攻击下纯策略图检测达0.917。在100智能体网格中，统一BARD-MARL变体在10%固定动作和10%协调攻击下均达0.982 AUC-ROC。

Conclusion: 学习通信策略暴露了有用的诊断证据，但可信的抗性声明需要针对攻击的消融实验，并明确区分协调、检测与缓解三个环节。

Abstract: Learned communication improves coordination in cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning, but it also creates a trust problem: a trained policy may route information through agents that have become faulty or adversarial. This paper studies Byzantine-agent detection for learned-communication MARL in adaptive traffic signal control. We propose BARD-MARL, a post-hoc diagnostic layer on top of BayesG, which is used as an attributed communication substrate rather than as a contribution of this paper. BARD-MARL combines two agent-level evidence streams: policy-graph features extracted from state-action trajectories and Bayesian trust statistics computed from BayesG latent mask probabilities. Across fixed-action, observation-flip, random-noise, and coordinated attacks in SUMO traffic grids, the results show that these signals are complementary rather than universally dominant. On a 25-agent grid, BARD-MARL reaches 0.843 AUC-ROC under a 10% observation-flip attack, while policy-graph-only detection reaches 0.917 AUC-ROC under a 10% coordinated attack. On a 100-agent grid, the unified BARD-MARL variant reaches 0.982 AUC-ROC for both 10% fixed-action and 10% coordinated attacks. The study shows that learned communication policies expose useful diagnostic evidence, but credible resilience claims require attack-specific ablations and explicit separation between coordination, detection, and mitigation.

</details>


### [448] [Empowering Economic Simulation Through Situation-Aware Llm-Driven Generative System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20720)
*Zhimei Chen,Mu Chen*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出SAMAS框架，结合大语言模型和智能体建模，通过宏观结构模式与微观动态行为的联合建模，在经济模拟中实现了更真实的波动性和转折点预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统自上而下的经济建模忽视了个体多样性和社会互动复杂性，而现有的基于智能体的建模系统难以泛化到预定义场景之外，因此需要一种能更好捕捉社会经济结构复杂性的方法。

Method: 提出SAMAS框架，将宏观经济学知识嵌入大语言模型（LLM），并结合模拟步骤中积累的经济轨迹，对个体智能体进行建模，实现宏观结构模式与微观动态行为的联合建模。

Result: 在波动性真实性和转折点预测方面取得了优越的性能表现。

Conclusion: 通过LLM驱动的角色扮演和类人决策能力，SAMAS能够超越预定义场景的限制，更有效地模拟复杂经济系统中的宏观涌现现象。

Abstract: Traditional economic modeling typically follows a TOP-DOWN paradigm, neglecting individual diversity and the complexity of social interactions. To better capture the complexity of societal structure, Agent-Based Modeling (ABM) employs a BOTTOM-UP solution by incorporating micro-level dynamics to generate macroeconomic phenomena. Reinforcement Learning further improves its decision-making ability through tailored reward signals. However, existing ABM systems struggle to generalize beyond predefined scenarios. Recognizing the potential of LLM-driven role-playing in perception and human-like decision-making, we propose SAMAS, which models individual agents with rich macroeconomic understanding embedded in LLMs and economic trajectories experienced in the passing simulation steps. By jointly modeling both macro-level structural patterns and micro-level dynamic behaviors, SAMAS achieves superior performance in volatility realism and turning point prediction.

</details>


### [449] [Artificial collectives of specialists and generalists excel at different tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20877)
*John Meluso,Laurent Hébert-Dufresne,Christoph Riedl,H. Oliver Gao*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文通过系统实验研究了多智能体系统中智能体的解释能力、理性边界和任务质量如何交互影响集体性能。研究发现：专家型（窄解释能力）和通才型（宽解释能力）智能体形成的网络结构不同，对性能的影响因任务类型而异，且理性边界会调节这些关系，最终揭示了性能与收敛速度之间的根本性权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管针对多智能体系统的工程解决方案众多，但缺乏对人工集体智能的描述性科学理解，因此缺少如何设计资源高效的多智能体系统的原则。

Method: 通过系统实验，对优化智能体进行测试，表征智能体的解释能力、理性边界和任务质量如何交互影响集体性能。智能体分为专家型（窄解释能力）和通才型（宽解释能力），分别对应稀疏集中网络和密集去中心化网络。

Result: 1) 解释网络属性平均性能影响较小（0.07标准差），但对特定任务质量影响可达4.5倍（0.33标准差），某些任务甚至达1.84标准差。2) 通才型在生成、选择和协调任务上表现更好，专家型+少量通才中介在谈判任务上更优。3) 宽松理性边界下专家型通过更有效的高维空间采样胜出；紧缩边界下通才型通过更好的梯度估计胜出；中等边界下出现性能与收敛速度的根本性权衡。

Conclusion: 多智能体系统的设计应将解释网络与任务需求及智能体的计算限制相匹配，这对多智能体系统的效率和能耗具有重要意义。

Abstract: Collective artificial intelligence, where multiple agents work on shared tasks, holds potential to solve expansive problems in fields from medicine to collective governance. But while prescriptive engineering solutions abound, we lack descriptive scientific understanding of artificial collectives, and therefore principles for how to design resource efficient multi-agent systems. Through systematic experiments with optimizing agents, we characterize how agent interpretive abilities, rationality bounds, and task qualities interact to shape collective performance. Agents range from specialists, with narrow interpretive abilities, to generalists, with broad ones. Collectives of specialists correspond to sparse, centralized networks, while collectives of generalists correspond to dense, decentralized ones. We show that interpretive network properties have small performance effects on average (0.07 standard deviations of performance). However, for specific task qualities, these effects are 4.5 times larger (0.33 sd) and can reach much higher for certain task qualities (1.84 sd). This leads collectives of generalists to perform better on tasks that involve generating, choosing, and coordinating, while collectives of specialists with a few generalist mediators perform better on tasks that involve negotiating. Rationality bounds then moderate these relationships. At loose bounds, specialists outperform generalists through more effective sampling of high-dimensional decision spaces. At tight bounds, generalists outperform specialists through better gradient estimation. A fundamental trade-off between performance and convergence speed emerges at moderate bounds. These findings suggest that multi-agent design could benefit from matching interpretive networks to both task demands and agents' computational limits, with implications for the efficiency and energy costs of multi-agent systems.

</details>


### [450] [Monitoring Diameters of Causal Communication Graph with Spatio-Temporal Logic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21558)
*Lydia Bakiri,Jérémy Dubut,Sergio Mover*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文针对多智能体系统在连续时间空间中的验证需求，提出了一种扩展的时空逻辑muTGL，通过引入"空间视界"（space horizon）算子来约束通信链路的距离/成本，从而增强表达能力，支持可达性、逃逸等模态的编码，并提供了集中式离线监控算法，在共识式任务分配协议上进行了验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有muTGL逻辑无法表达对距离有界通信链路的可达性分析，也无法追踪通信链路的长度或成本，而这些对于分布式协议的图论分析（如算法复杂度与系统通信图直径相关）以及去中心化监控至关重要。

Method: 在muTGL逻辑中引入一个新的算子"空间视界"（space horizon），用于约束通信链路的距离界；通过该算子编码其他逻辑中的可达性、逃逸等模态，实现时空属性的深度纠缠；并设计了集中式离线监控算法。

Result: 该扩展逻辑能够编码原本muTGL无法表达的可达性和逃逸模态；通过共识式束算法（Consensus-Based Bundle Algorithms）的仿真案例展示了监控算法的有效性。

Conclusion: 空间视界算子的引入显著提升了muTGL的表达能力，使其能够处理带距离约束的时空属性验证，为多智能体系统的形式化验证提供了更有力的工具。

Abstract: Verification of multi-agent systems requires the ability to check meticulous topological properties when it comes to agents that can move through space in continuous time. This demands a logic with sufficient expressiveness to capture these dynamics. MuTGL logic has interesting properties for expressing entangled space-time properties. However, this logic lacks the expressivity needed to analyse reachability within specific distance bounds, or to track the length or the cost of communication chains: these are fundamental for decentralized monitoring, or graph-theoretic analysis of distributed protocols, where algorithmic complexities often relates with the system's communication graph diameter. We then introduce an extension of muTGL, including a new operator called the space horizon. This addition allows us to bound the distance of communication chains, hence enhancing the logic's expressiveness. We show that this operator allows to encode modalities from other logics, such as reachability or escaping which were not available in vanilla muTGL, while allowing a deeper entanglement of spatial and temporal properties. We provide a centralized offline monitoring algorithm for this logic and illustrate it on several examples on simulations of Consensus-Based Bundle Algorithms, distributed protocols for task allocation.

</details>


### [451] [Cohort Organized Learning: Clustering Through Agreement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21743)
*Finn Henry O'Shea,Maria Elena Monzani*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出CoOL（Cohort Organized Learning）方法，一种无需显式距离或相似度计算即可对数据进行聚类的方法。使用神经网络估计聚类，可处理向量数据和图像等多种数据类型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有聚类方法通常依赖显式的距离或相似度计算，这在高维或复杂数据上存在局限性。作者希望提出一种免于计算距离/相似度的聚类方法，以增强聚类在异构数据上的适用性。

Method: 提出CoOL方法，利用神经网络进行聚类估计；通过期望最大化（Expectation Maximization）推导梯度用于训练网络；监控训练过程中的收敛状态，并在训练后评估聚类质量。

Result: 在向量数据和图像数据上展示了CoOL的聚类效果，验证了其无需距离/相似度计算即可完成聚类任务的能力。

Conclusion: CoOL是一种灵活且通用的聚类方法，适用于多种数据类型（包括向量和图像），但存在一定局限性，未来可在相关任务上继续改进。

Abstract: In this article we describe Cohort Organized Learning (CoOL), a method for clustering data without explicit distance or similarity computations. Herein, we will describe CoOL, derive the gradients determined by expectation maximization to train the networks, show how to monitor convergence during training and evaluate the clusters after training, and discuss a series of examples and use cases. We also discuss CoOL's limitations and future prospects on related tasks. Because CoOL uses neural networks to estimate the clusters, it can be used to cluster any data that can be made compatible and we illustrate this on vector data and images.

</details>


### [452] [GARIP: A Running-Average Moving Reference for Last-Iterate Self-Play in Two-Player Zero-Sum Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22688)
*Can Savcı*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文研究双人零和博弈中自我对弈的收敛性问题，提出GARIP方法（以运行平均为锚点），证明其相比固定参考策略和周期性快照参考策略在收敛性和鲁棒性上的优势，并在矩阵博弈、Coin Game以及Connect Four/Othello等棋盘游戏中验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统自我对弈在双人零和博弈中导致梯度上升循环，末态迭代围绕均衡点震荡而非收敛。现代方法通过引入参考策略实现末态收敛，但固定参考策略只能达到正则化均衡，周期性快照（R-NaD）虽有效但机制不清晰。作者希望隔离参考策略选择对收敛行为的影响，并寻找更优的参考策略设计。

Method: 提出GARIP方法，以运行平均（running average）作为锚定参考策略。通过理论分析揭示坍缩机制：坍缩追踪参考的峰值滞后；在因果凸平均中，运行平均（平坦轮廓，峰值=均值）唯一最小化峰值，而快照的锯齿形轮廓峰值=2×均值。证明局部末态收敛性（常数锚定强度下锚定将基础映射的旋转缩放1-β，使循环变为压缩映射），并分析全局收敛（小β猜想成立，大β导致共识失败）。

Result: 在矩阵博弈、Coin Game、Connect Four/Othello上，GARIP与R-NaD的峰值性能相当，两者均远优于固定参考和无参考基线；但GARIP是更好的超参数默认选择：全网格坍缩率统计上无差异，但在传统参数化设置下匹配均值滞后的GARIP坍缩率0/40 vs 快照10/40（快照需缩短K才能匹配）。前瞻性（负权重）参考在过时侧表现更好，且优势仅出现在朴素自我对弈循环的场景（五个深度自我对弈循环）。

Conclusion: 运行平均作为参考策略在理论上具有最小化峰值滞后的最优性，在实践中提供与R-NaD相当但更鲁棒的收敛性能，且无需调节快照周期K。GARIP揭示了参考策略设计的关键机制——锚定强度控制旋转缩放，参考的滞后轮廓决定坍缩效率。

Abstract: Self-play with naive gradient ascent cycles in two-player zero-sum games: the last iterate orbits the equilibrium. Modern methods restore last-iterate convergence by regularizing toward a reference policy -- MMD a fixed one (reaching only the regularized equilibrium), R-NaD a periodic snapshot (the engine of DeepNash). We study GARIP, which anchors to the running average, and isolate what the choice of reference controls. Our central result is a mechanism: collapse tracks the peak lag of the reference, and among causal convex averages of a fixed mean lag the running average (flat profile, peak $=$ mean) uniquely minimizes that peak, while a snapshot's sawtooth has peak $= 2\times$ mean (a one-line theorem). Two consequences follow. Convergence: we prove local last-iterate convergence at constant anchor strength -- the anchor scales the base map's rotation by $1-β$, crossing the stability boundary and turning a recurrent base into a contraction (global convergence is conjectured at small $β$; we characterize a large-$β$ consensus failure). Robustness: GARIP matches R-NaD's peak performance -- on matrix games, the Coin Game, and the board games Connect Four/Othello, both moving references are far more robust than fixed-magnet and magnet-free baselines -- but is the better hyperparameter default; we report it both ways: over the full grid collapse rates are statistically indistinguishable, yet at conventional parameterizations a matched-mean-lag setting collapses in 0/40 vs 10/40 seeds (a snapshot matches it only by knowing to shorten $K$). The boundaries: an anticipatory (negative-weight) reference does better still on the stale side, and the advantage appears only where naive self-play cycles (five deep self-play loops). All experiments are pure JAX and reproducible.

</details>


### [453] [Decentralized Autonomous Traffic Management through Corridor Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23585)
*Jasmine Jerry Aloor,Aadarsh Govada,Hamsa Balakrishnan*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体强化学习的去中心化空中交通管理方法，使自主飞行器能够在无需中央协调或重新训练的情况下，零样本地适应不同流量密度、网络几何结构和异构飞行器性能的走廊网络。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着自主飞行器大规模引入和交通密度增加，集中式管理难以有效协调大量有人/无人飞行器，因此需要可扩展的去中心化方法管理先进空中机动（AAM）走廊中的交通流。

Method: 扩展了多智能体强化学习（MARL）方法，在单走廊场景中训练策略，然后以零样本方式将其应用于包含合并与分叉的复杂多走廊网络。

Result: 学习到的策略能够很好地迁移到不同流量密度、网络几何结构和异构飞行器性能的场景中；系统在走廊边界合规性、完成率、平均速度、飞行距离和飞行器间隔保持等指标上表现良好。

Conclusion: 尽管策略仅需局部协调的进入、穿越和退出行为，但集体上能够产生理想的走廊网络交通流，无需集中协调或模型重新训练。

Abstract: As autonomous aircraft are introduced at scale and traffic density increases, centralized management becomes insufficient to coordinate the large numbers of crewed and uncrewed aircraft. Dedicated Advanced Air Mobility (AAM) corridors have therefore been proposed for organizing high-density autonomous traffic flows. The desire to scalably provide autonomous aircraft flexibility in trajectory planning motivates the development of decentralized approaches to traffic management in AAM corridors.
  In this work, we extend a multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) approach to address the challenge of decentralized traffic flow management in air corridor networks. We test policies trained in a single-corridor setting on increasingly complex multi-corridor networks with combinations of merges and splits in a zero-shot manner. Experimental results demonstrate that learned behaviors transfer well to scenarios with varying traffic density, network geometry, and heterogeneous vehicle performance, without needing centralized coordination or model retraining. We evaluate system-level performance in terms of conformance to corridor boundaries, completion rates, average speeds, distance traveled, and maintenance of inter-aircraft separation. We find that although our policies require only locally coordinated entry, traversal, and exit behaviors, they collectively produce desirable traffic flows through the corridor network.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [454] [Towards CSI-Native Foundation Models: A Channel-Adaptive Roadmap for 6G](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20670)
*Chenyu Zhang,Xinchen Lyu,Chenshan Ren,Shuhan Liu,Qimei Cui*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出面向CSI原生的无线基础模型框架，通过尺度感知异构暴露、物理时频空坐标和相关性约束注意力三大设计，实现零样本泛化（NMSE降低>4dB）、尺度外推（8倍天线扩展下5.4dB增益）和推理效率提升（18.8%），在系统级评估中仅用7.01%密集导频开销即可达到-18.64dB NMSE，净频谱效率提升36.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无线基础模型将CSI视为任务张量而非传播条件信道响应，未能捕捉无线环境固有的时频空几何结构，导致泛化性能受限。

Method: 提出CSI原生基础模型的统一框架，在预训练、位置建模和注意力控制三个维度对齐信道需求：1）尺度感知异构暴露（scale-aware heterogeneous exposure）；2）物理时频天线坐标（physical time-frequency-antenna coordinates）；3）相关性约束的token交互（correlation-bounded token interaction）。

Result: 零样本泛化：跨空时频任务NMSE降低>4dB；尺度外推：8倍未见天线规模下增益达5.4dB；推理效率：移动感知处理加速18.8%；系统级评估：仅7.01%密集导频开销，NMSE达-18.64dB，净频谱效率比密集LMMSE提升36.6%，比WiFo提升15.5%。

Conclusion: CSI原生表示学习能够支持导频高效的无线接入，为6G系统中可复用的信道智能提供了新范式。

Abstract: Wireless foundation models offer a path toward reusable channel state information (CSI) intelligence for sixth-generation (6G) systems. However, existing generic-backbone adaptation and CSI pretraining methods often treat CSI as task tensors rather than propagation-conditioned channel responses, thereby failing to capture the intrinsic time-frequency-spatial geometry of wireless environments. This paper presents a channel-adaptive roadmap toward CSI-native foundation models, proposing a unified framework that aligns pretraining, positional modeling, and attention control with three channel requirements: scale-aware heterogeneous exposure, physical time-frequency-antenna coordinates, and correlation-bounded token interaction. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of the proposed framework across three dimensions: zero-shot generalization, reducing NMSE by more than 4 dB across spatial-temporal-frequency tasks; scale extrapolation, yielding up to a 5.4 dB gain under 8 times unseen antenna scaling; and inference efficiency, accelerating mobility-aware processing by up to 18.8%. A system-level evaluation with Sionna SYS further shows that the proposed framework uses only 7.01% of dense-pilot overhead, reaches -18.64 dB average NMSE, and improves average net spectral efficiency by 36.6% over dense LMMSE and 15.5% over WiFo, indicating that CSI-native representation learning can support pilot-efficient radio access.

</details>


### [455] [NeuroShield: A Device-Agnostic Foundation Model for EEG Authentication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20673)
*Matin Fallahi,Patricia Arias-Cabarcos,Thorsten Strufe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: NeuroShield是一个可重用的EEG身份认证基础模型，采用双阶段Transformer架构，能从可变通道和可变长度的EEG记录中学习身份判别嵌入。在15762名受试者、28116个session上预训练，微调后等错误率降低0.44-8.06个百分点，支持跨设备和跨数据集泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有EEG认证模型受限于采集设置（硬件、通道布局、信号时长），不同数据集需要独立开发模型，缺乏知识迁移和复用性。

Method: 提出NeuroShield双阶段Transformer架构，可处理可变通道和可变长度的EEG信号，在大规模多数据集上预训练后微调迁移。

Result: 在15762名受试者、3个公开数据集预训练，2个未见下游数据集验证，微调后EER降低0.44-8.06个百分点，能泛化到更长信号和未见过的通道布局。

Conclusion: NeuroShield是首个可复用、跨异构采集设置的EEG身份编码器，开源发布以促进社区采用和可重复研究。

Abstract: A central challenge in EEG authentication is that models are typically tied to the acquisition settings in which they are trained. In particular, variations in headset hardware, channel layout, and signal duration create heterogeneous recordings that existing models are not designed to handle, causing each new headset or dataset to be treated as a separate model-development problem. This fragmentation limits multi-dataset learning, hinders knowledge transfer, and reduces model reusability. To address this limitation, we present NeuroShield, a reusable foundation model for EEG authentication that learns identity-discriminative embeddings from variable-channel and variable-length EEG recordings through a dual-stage transformer architecture. We pretrain NeuroShield on three public EEG datasets comprising 15{,}762 subjects and 28{,}116 sessions, and evaluate transfer on two unseen downstream datasets. Our evaluations show that, after fine-tuning, NeuroShield reduces equal error rate by 0.44--8.06 percentage points relative to the state of the art. NeuroShield further generalizes to segments longer than those seen during training and operates across channel layouts not encountered during pretraining. These results establish NeuroShield as a reusable and adaptable EEG identity encoder across heterogeneous recording settings. We release NeuroShield as open source to support reproducibility and community adoption.

</details>


### [456] [Massive Activations Are Architecturally Robust: A Controlled Scratch/Commitment Residual Stream Test](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20743)
*Maruthi Vemula*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过提出Ledger Residuals架构，将残差流分为可变的"思考"流和受保护的"承诺"流，检验了大规模激活现象是否为残差流功能过载导致的伪影。实验发现，即使分离出专用解码通道，模型仍会在受保护通道中重建出起始标记上的大规模激活，且更强的稀疏惩罚反而使该特征更集中更持久，表明大规模激活是功能性特征而非偶然伪影。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前对于Transformer中大规模激活现象存在争议：一方认为这是残差流同时承担读写功能导致的伪影（artifact hypothesis），另一方认为这是模型功能所必需的。作者希望通过直接的架构干预来检验伪影假说是否成立。

Method: 提出Ledger Residuals架构，将残差流拆分为两个部分：(1) Deliberation（可变暂存流），中间计算可自由读写；(2) Commitment（受保护累加器），仅用于解码时读取。在160M和290M参数规模、匹配损失的语言模型上进行实验，检验大规模激活是否消失。

Result: (1) 即使有专用的"承诺"通道，模型仍在受保护通道中重建出固定的、集中于起始标记维度的大规模激活；(2) 重建的激活幅度虽小于标准Transformer，但更集中于起始标记；(3) 更强的稀疏惩罚不仅没有消除该特征，反而使其更持久、更集中。

Conclusion: 大规模激活在架构上是稳健的（architecturally robust）：无论模型从哪个表征通道解码，该特征都会重新出现，这支持其具有功能性而非偶然伪影的观点。

Abstract: Trained transformers reliably develop massive activations, a small number of hidden dimensions whose magnitude is far above the median and which concentrate on the sequence-start token. Whether these outliers are a removable artifact of the residual stream's overloaded read and write role, or instead a functional necessity, is actively debated. We test the artifact hypothesis directly, with an architectural intervention. Our architecture, Ledger Residuals, splits the residual stream into a mutable scratch stream (Deliberation) that intermediate computation may freely overwrite and a protected, decode-only accumulator (Commitment) that holds the representation the model reads out. If massive activations exist only because one stream is forced to be both scratchpad and answer, then a dedicated answer channel should remove the need for them. We find that it does not. In matched-loss language models at the 160M and 290M scales, the model rebuilds the canonical fixed-dimension, start-token outlier inside the protected channel. The rebuilt feature is smaller in magnitude than in a standard transformer but more sharply concentrated on the start token, and a stronger sparsity penalty makes it more persistent and more concentrated still, rather than removing it. Massive activations therefore look architecturally robust: they re-emerge in whichever representation the model decodes from, which is what we would expect if they are functional rather than incidental. We release our architecture and measurement code.

</details>


### [457] [CIExplainer++: Generating Causal and Interpretable Explanations for Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20747)
*Francisco Caldas,Sahil Satish Kumar,Ruben Belo,Cláudia Soares*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CIExplainer和G2TeXplainer两种方法：前者基于因果推断（Potential Outcome Framework）识别对GNN预测具有最大因果效应的子图，后者将因果子图转化为包含特征和关系信息的自然语言解释，以提升GNN的可解释性和可理解性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GNN解释方法缺乏对因果影响的严格识别，且生成的解释难以被人类直观理解。作者希望从因果推断角度出发，结合自然语言生成，使黑盒GNN模型更加可解释和可信赖。

Method: CIExplainer基于Potential Outcome Framework，通过扰动方式识别对GNN预测因果效应最大的子图；G2TeXplainer将识别出的因果子图转换为包含特征级和关系级信息的自然语言解释。

Result: 在多种GNN架构（GCN、GraphSAGE、GAT、GIN）和数据集上评估了CIExplainer的效果。

Conclusion: 结合因果推断的扰动法子图识别与自然语言生成，能够有效提升GNN解释的因果准确性和人类可理解性。

Abstract: Explainable Artificial Intelligence aims to make black-box models more trustworthy by presenting, in a human-understandable manner, the elements that lead to the model's output. This involves both (i) identifying components and connections with genuine causal influence on outputs and (ii) translating such structures into an interpretable representation. For the former, we introduce CIExplainer, a novel perturbation-based method grounded in causal inference for explaining Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). CIExplainer identifies the subgraph with the highest causal effects on GNN predictions using the Potential Outcome Framework. We evaluate and compare CIExplainer on various GNN architectures (GCN, GraphSAGE, GAT, GIN) and datasets.
  To bridge subgraph explanations with human interpretability, we further propose G2TeXplainer, a method that transforms causal subgraphs into natural language explanations that capture both feature-level and relational information.

</details>


### [458] [Evidential Fusion Network for Multimodal Survival Prediction under Missing Modalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20757)
*Yucheng Xing,Hailan Mo,Zi Wang,Ling Huang,Mengling Feng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出EMMS模型，利用Dempster-Shafer理论和高斯随机模糊数进行多模态融合，在模态缺失场景下实现生存预测，无需生成缺失数据，在四个癌症数据集上取得最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态生存预测模型假设数据完整，对临床中常见的模态缺失问题缺乏鲁棒性。

Method: 采用Dempster-Shafer理论和高斯随机模糊数进行多模态决策融合，同时考虑偶然不确定性和认知不确定性以及模态可靠性；将缺失模态视为空证据，避免干扰可用输入。

Result: 在四个癌症数据集上达到最先进性能，提供校准且可解释的不确定性估计，无额外计算开销。

Conclusion: EMMS是一种简单、计算高效的方法，无需生成缺失数据即可处理多模态生存预测中的模态缺失问题。

Abstract: Recent multimodal survival prediction models have demonstrated strong predictive performance by leveraging complementary information across modalities. However, such models generally assume data completeness and exhibit limited robustness toward missing modalities, which are frequently encountered in real-world clinical settings. We propose the Evidential Missing Modality Survival Fusion (EMMS) model for multimodal survival prediction under missing modalities. EMMS offers a straightforward, computationally effective approach to survival analysis without requiring a generative phase for missing data. By employing Dempster-Shafer theory and Gaussian Random Fuzzy Numbers for multimodal decision fusion, it considers both aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty alongside modality reliability for fusion. Moreover, the model treats missing modalities as vacuous evidence, preventing interference with available inputs and naturally reflecting increased uncertainty and calibrated predictions. Extensive experiments on four cancer datasets demonstrate state-of-the-art performance while providing calibrated and interpretable uncertainty estimates under incomplete multimodal observations, without introducing additional computational overhead.

</details>


### [459] [MAS-PromptBench: When Does Prompt Optimization Improve Multi-Agent LLM Systems?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23664)
*Juyang Bai,Laixi Shi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了多智能体系统中系统提示词优化的潜力与挑战，发现优化能带来显著性能提升，但效果高度依赖系统配置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体系统（MAS）由多个基于LLM的智能体组成，系统提示词是关键的优化面，但将其优化从单智能体扩展到多智能体面临搜索空间指数增长等独特挑战，尚不清楚提示词优化在多智能体系统中的效果和敏感性。

Method: 在多种MAS设置（不同任务、工作流、通信协议、团队规模）下系统研究系统提示词优化，将两种先进的单智能体优化方法自然扩展到多智能体场景作为基准。

Result: 发现提示词优化在多智能体系统中能释放显著的性能增益，但优化效果高度依赖于系统配置，并揭示了其中的开放挑战。

Conclusion: 提示词优化对MAS性能提升具有潜力，但效果受系统配置影响显著，该领域仍面临开放挑战。

Abstract: Multi-agent systems (MAS) offer a scalable path forward for agentic AI, comprising multiple LLM-based agents, each assigned a system prompt and a position within a workflow that governs inter-agent coordination and output aggregation. System prompts thus form a critical and accessible optimization surface: they specify agents' roles and behaviors, enabling system-level improvements without model finetuning. Although prompt optimization has shown substantial potential for single LLMs, extending it to MAS poses distinct challenges, notably an exponentially growing search space. It remains unclear whether, when, and by how much prompt optimization improves MAS performance, and how sensitive such gains are to system configuration. In this work, we systematically study system-prompt optimization across a broad range of MAS setups varying in task, workflow, communication protocol, and team size, benchmarking two prompt optimizers that naturally extend state-of-the-art single-agent methods. The results reveal its potential to unlock significant gains while exposing open challenges, characterizing when and how much prompt optimization helps across diverse MAS settings.

</details>


### [460] [ELADO: Elliptic PDE Assessment Datasets for Operator Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20771)
*Frank Ehebrecht,Toni Scharle,Martin Atzmueller*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了ELADO，一个针对椭圆偏微分方程神经算子学习的系统基准测试套件，通过构造多组数据集来揭露和量化神经算子架构在学习椭圆PDE解算子时的失效模式，重点关注重尾分布、频谱偏移和输入敏感性等挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的神经算子基准测试主要关注平均性能，未能充分揭示模型在椭圆PDE问题中自然出现的失败模式。作者旨在构造一个系统性的基准来隔离和量化这些难度来源，以促进更鲁棒的算子学习架构设计。

Method: 围绕Poisson方程和Helmholtz方程构建多组非恒定系数数据集，通过可控的数据生成过程隔离五个难点：(1)轻尾系数场导致的重尾解分布；(2)输入数据的谱分布偏移；(3)频域重尾分布；(4)输入敏感性的局部Lipschitz分析；(5)输入信号复杂度在归一化后对预测精度的影响。

Result: 评估多种神经算子架构后发现，重尾目标、频谱偏移和输入敏感性均会显著降低预测精度，而标准数据集和指标（如平均相对L²误差）可能掩盖这些退化现象。

Conclusion: 现有标准基准和指标不足以揭示神经算子在椭圆PDE问题中的关键失效模式，ELADO提供了更严格的测试环境，有助于推动更鲁棒的算子学习方法的发展。

Abstract: We introduce ELADO (Elliptic PDE Assessment Datasets for Operator Learning), a systematic benchmark suite constructed to show and quantify failure modes of neural operator architectures when learning solution operators of elliptic PDEs. While the benchmarks of existing datasets focus on average case performance, the ELADO datasets are constructed to highlight challenges that arise naturally in elliptic PDE problems. In particular, we construct several datasets built around Poisson's equation and the Helmholtz equation, each with non-constant coefficients. We define a controllable data-generating process to create datasets, that are designed to isolate a distinct source of difficulty. Specifically, these are (1) heavy-tailed solution distributions arising from light-tailed coefficient field distributions, (2) spectral distribution shift of the input data, (3) heavy-tailed distributions in the frequency domain of solutions, arising from light-tailed coefficient field distributions, (4) input sensitivity of learned operators, quantified by an empirical local Lipschitz analysis, and (5) the effect of input signal complexity on prediction accuracy under controlled amplitude normalization. We evaluate several neural operator architectures across all datasets and show that heavy-tailed targets, spectral shift, and input sensitivity each cause substantial degradation of the prediction accuracy that standard datasets and metrics (e.g., the mean relative $L^2$ error) may obscure.

</details>


### [461] [B[FM]$^2$: Brain Foundation Model via Flow Matching with SplitUNet](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20812)
*Jaedong Hwang,Kathleen Zhang,Wei Dai,Konstantinos Kontras,Maarten Vanmarcke,Maarten De Vos,Ila Fiete,Paul Pu Liang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: B[FM]²是一种基于流匹配的脑电图基础模型，直接在原始多通道EEG信号上预训练，无需离散化、分块或掩码。通过引入SplitUNet解决时间-电极不对称问题，仅用约307小时数据就在9个标准EEG分类任务中的7个上达到SOTA，且生成的合成EEG难以与真实数据区分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有EEG基础模型将连续多通道EEG波形离散化为块或码本令牌，破坏了连续脑节律并掩盖了细粒度时间动态。作者希望设计一种更符合EEG数据特性的预训练方法。

Method: 提出B[FM]²，直接对原始EEG信号进行连续时间流匹配预训练，无需分块、令牌化或掩码。针对多通道EEG的时间-电极不对称性（时间密集采样且高度自相关，电极通道数少），设计SplitUNet速度网络：每个块分解为独立的1D时间卷积和1D电极卷积，仅对时间维度进行下采样，保持电极拓扑结构。

Result: 在9个标准下游EEG分类任务中7个达到SOTA；预训练数据仅需36,895个片段（约307小时），比现有EEG基础模型少1-2个数量级（约30倍）；生成的合成EEG使得两名认证神经科医生无法与真实脑数据区分（Cohen's κ=-0.096）。

Conclusion: B[FM]²表明，直接在原始信号上进行连续时间流匹配预训练，并设计适合EEG结构特征的网络架构，可以在极少的预训练数据下取得优异的下游表现，并具备生成高质量合成EEG的能力。

Abstract: EEG foundation models can learn generalizable representations from large-scale EEG corpora to enable single-backbone transfer across diverse clinical and brain-computer interface tasks. Existing models typically discretize the continuous multi-channel EEG waveform into patches or codebook tokens and train a transformer with masked self-supervision. Recognizing that this discretization fragments continuous brain rhythms and obscures fine-grained temporal dynamics, we present B[FM]$^2$(Brain Foundation Model via Flow Matching), whose inductive bias aligns with the data by pretraining directly on the raw signal using continuous-time flow matching without patches, tokenization, or masking. However, multi-channel EEG signals pose an architectural challenge for flow matching: time is densely sampled and highly autocorrelated (thousands of timepoints), while the electrode axis is short (tens of channels) at distinct scalp positions. To address this time-electrode asymmetry, we introduce SplitUNet, a velocity network that factorizes each block into separate 1D temporal and 1D electrode convolutions and downsamples only along time, preserving electrode topology throughout the hierarchy. B[FM]$^2$ sets a new state of the art on 7 of 9 standard downstream EEG classification tasks, using a pretraining budget of only 36,895 segments ($\approx$ 307h), 1-2 orders of magnitude ($\approx$ 30x) less than required by existing EEG foundation models. Further, it generates synthetic EEGs that two board-certified neurologists cannot distinguish from brain data (Cohen's $κ=$ -0.096). https://jd730.github.io/projects/BFM2

</details>


### [462] [CELEUS: Certifiable and Efficient LLM Evaluation via E-Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20820)
*Zhijian Zhou,Zesheng Ye,Zhaorun Chen,Bo Li,Feng Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Celeus框架，通过E-process构建任意时刻有效的置信区间，结合不确定性引导采样和代理辅助近似，实现高效且统计严格的LLM评估，在保证覆盖概率的同时减少54-62%的评估样本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM评估方法在反复更新置信区间并基于其决定何时停止时，无法保证声称的覆盖概率（如95%），存在理论与实践的差距。本文旨在填补这一空白，构建任意时刻有效的置信区间。

Method: 提出Celeus框架，利用E-process构建任意时刻有效的置信区间。具体包括两个关键组件：(i) 不确定性引导采样，选择信息量大的样本；(ii) 代理辅助近似，对未评估样本进行估计。证明这些信号在给定历史条件下对评估分数无偏，从而实现统计上严格的e-process置信区间。

Result: Celeus在达到目标精度时比基线方法少用54-62%的评估样本，同时保持任意时刻有效的覆盖概率。理论上证明置信区间能以近参数速率（至多对数因子）收缩，并分析了最优采样规则。

Conclusion: Celeus成功弥合了LLM评估中理论严谨性与实际应用之间的差距，通过E-process实现了任意时刻有效的可认证评估，大幅提升了评估效率。

Abstract: Can we trust evaluation scores to capture an LLM's true real-world performance? Certifiable evaluation answers this question by providing guarantee for LLM evaluation. In particular, existing methods sequentially curate evaluation samples and keep updating confidence intervals (CIs) that cover the true performance with high probability (e.g., 95%) until some conditions are satisfied, e.g., the CI width reaches a target precision. However, existing methods are not generally anytime-valid: the claimed coverage (e.g., 95%) may fail when CIs are repeatedly updated and used to decide when to stop, leaving a gap between theoretical rigor and practice. This paper bridges this gap by proposing Celeus, a Certifiable framework for Efficient LLM evaluation, which leverages E-processes to build anytime-valid CIs. Concretely, we propose signals that combine two ingredients: (i) Uncertainty-guided sampling to select informative samples for evaluation, and (ii) Surrogate-assisted approximations for unevaluated samples. We prove that such signals remain unbiased for the evaluation score conditional on the past, enabling statistically-grounded and anytime-valid $e$-process CIs. More importantly, the two ingredients reduce estimation variance and help reach the target precision with fewer evaluated samples. We also prove that CIs obtained by Celeus can shrink at a near-parametric rate up to logarithmic factors and analyze the oracle variance-optimal sampling rule that motivates the empirical uncertainty-guided one. Experiments show that Celeus reaches the target precision using 54-62% fewer evaluated samples than baselines, while preserving anytime-valid coverage.

</details>


### [463] [Evolutionary Discovery of Developmental Reward Schedules in Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20858)
*Alan Nadelsticher Ruvalcaba*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个进化框架来自动发现深度强化学习中的发育性奖励调度（developmental reward schedules），将三个生物启发的动机成分（自主性、新奇性和反应性）通过时变权重动态组合。在MiniGrid任务上验证，进化方法表现优于传统基线，自动发现的调度模式与预设的发育顺序不同——新奇性始终成为早期主导信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RL中奖励组成的时序结构通常由人工设计并固定不变，忽略了训练过程中动机优先级的变化。本文旨在探索如何自动发现最优的发育性奖励调度，使得代理的动机随时间动态调整。

Method: 提出进化框架，将三种生物启发动机成分（agency、novelty、reactivity）通过时变权重组合。使用四种进化算法（CMA-ES、xNES、DE、L-SHADE）自动优化权重序列，并与外在奖励基线及三种手工设计方法对比，在DoorKey-6x6和KeyCorridorS3R1两个稀疏奖励MiniGrid任务上评估。

Result: DoorKey-6x6上所有进化方法均超越基线，L-SHADE最优（相对提升11.4%）；KeyCorridorS3R1上仅CMA-ES表现最好，其余进化方法泛化能力弱于基线。自动发现的调度中，新奇性始终成为早期训练的主导信号，与预设的发育顺序不符。

Conclusion: 进化优化是发现深度强化学习中发育性奖励调度的有前景方法。计算最优与生物最优的调度模式可能存在差异——进化在计算环境中找到的最优解未必遵循生物学上的发育顺序。

Abstract: The temporal structure of reward composition in reinforcement learning (RL) is typically hand-designed and held fixed throughout training, leaving the progression of motivational priorities largely unexplored. In this work, we propose an evolutionary framework for discovering developmental reward schedules, in which three distinct biologically inspired motivational components -- agency, novelty, and reactivity -- are combined through time-varying weights that dynamically shift over the course of training. Evaluated on two sparse-reward MiniGrid tasks: DoorKey-6x6 and KeyCorridorS3R1, our framework compares the generalizability of four evolutionary algorithms: CMA-ES, xNES, DE, and L-SHADE against an extrinsically motivated baseline (our main comparison point), and three additional hand-designed methods. On DoorKey-6x6, all evolved methods outperform the non-evolved baselines, with L-SHADE achieving the best performance -- an approximate relative mean improvement of 11.4% over the extrinsic only baseline. On KeyCorridorS3R1, CMA-ES achieves the best overall performance, with the remaining evolved methods showing weaker and less reliable generalization capability compared to the extrinsic only baseline. Interestingly, the discovered schedules diverge from our defined developmental ordering, with novelty consistently emerging as the dominant early signal during training, across both tasks. Collectively, our results position evolutionary optimization as a promising approach for developmental reward schedule discovery in deep reinforcement learning, and suggest that what evolution finds to be optimal in computational settings may differ from what it finds to be optimal in biology. The code for this project can be found at: https://github.com/alannadels/Evolutionary_RL.git.

</details>


### [464] [Machine Learning Classification of Cryopathy Syndromes: A Comprehensive Comparative Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20874)
*Nataliya Shakhovska,Valentyna Chopyak,Ivan Izonin,Vira Haievska*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究利用机器学习方法对2,686名患者的实验室数据（冷球蛋白测定、沉淀试验、血凝素和溶血素滴度等）进行冷球蛋白血症综合征的自动分类。结果表明，尽管存在严重的类别不平衡和临床重叠，随机森林与梯度提升树的软投票集成模型表现最佳，基于冷球蛋白的交互特征是最具预测力的变量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 冷球蛋白血症综合征的分类十分困难，因为实验室模式在不同诊断类别间经常重叠，且某些诊断较为罕见。这使得常规解读冷球蛋白相关检测变得复杂，增加了对专家判断的依赖。因此，研究旨在开发机器学习方法以自动分类该综合征，并提供临床决策支持的实用策略。

Method: 分析了2,686名患者的实验室记录（14个诊断类别），数据预处理包括清洗、编码、插补、归一化及构建临床交互特征。评估了12种建模策略，包括随机森林、梯度提升树、多层感知器、软投票集成、SMOTE过采样、层次分类等。采用分层训练-测试评估和分层5折交叉验证，主要指标为宏平均F1分数、准确率、Top-3准确率和期望校准误差。

Result: 软投票集成（随机森林+梯度提升树）取得了最佳多分类性能；交叉验证确认了平衡随机森林模型的稳定性；基于树的方法始终优于神经网络；特征工程提升了判别能力；基于冷球蛋白的交互特征是最具信息量的预测因子。

Conclusion: 尽管任务因类别不平衡和临床重叠而具有挑战性，树集成方法为冷球蛋白血症综合征的自动化分类提供了实用策略，可辅助临床决策。

Abstract: Cryopathy syndromes are difficult to classify because laboratory patterns often overlap across diagnostic categories, while some diagnoses are rare. This makes routine interpretation of cryoglobulin-related tests challenging and increases dependence on expert judgment. The aim of this study was to develop and compare machine learning approaches for automated classification of cryopathy syndromes from laboratory data and to identify a practical strategy for clinical decision support. Methods: We analysed laboratory records from 2,686 patients assigned to 14 diagnostic categories. The dataset included demographic variables, cryoglobulin measurements, precipitation tests, and hemagglutinin and hemolysin titers. Data preprocessing included cleaning, encoding, imputation, normalization, and construction of clinically informed interaction features. We evaluated 12 modelling strategies, including Random Forest, Gradient Boosted Trees, Multi-Layer Perceptron, soft-voting ensembles, class balancing with Synthetic Minority Over-sampling Technique, hierarchical classification, period-aware models, targeted binary classifiers, and probability calibration. Performance was assessed using stratified train-test evaluation and stratified 5-fold cross-validation. The main metrics were macro-averaged F1 score, accuracy, Top-3 accuracy, and expected calibration error. The overall task proved difficult because of marked class imbalance and clinical overlap between diagnoses. The best multiclass performance was achieved by a soft-voting ensemble of Random Forest and Gradient Boosted Trees. Cross-validation confirmed stable performance for the balanced Random Forest model. Tree-based methods consistently outperformed the neural network model. Feature engineering improved discrimination, and the most informative predictors were derived cryoglobulin-based interaction features.

</details>


### [465] [Understanding Latent Flow Models for Tabular Data Synthesis: Targets, Paths, and Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20878)
*Bahrul Ilmi Nasution*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对潜空间流模型在表格数据生成中的性能进行了实证研究，比较了不同学习目标、概率路径和采样策略在效用、风险和计算成本之间的权衡，并给出了实用配置建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在受监管领域中共享合成表格数据时，需要在分析效用、信息披露风险和计算成本之间取得平衡。潜空间流模型虽然灵活，但不同配置（学习目标、概率路径、采样动力学）在有限步积分和固定计算预算下的行为差异尚不清楚，缺乏系统的配置指导。

Method: 在七个数据集上对表格潜流模型进行实证研究，评估了四种学习目标（速度匹配、分数匹配、噪声匹配、后验匹配）在最优传输（OT）和方差保持（VP）路径下、使用ODE和SDE采样以及不同积分预算的表现。

Result: (1) 学习目标很大程度上决定了效用-风险操作区间：速度匹配和后验匹配倾向于更高效用，分数匹配和噪声匹配倾向于更低披露风险；(2) 中间点采样常改善分布保真度，OT路径比VP路径更能容忍提前停止，从而在固定预算或风险阈值下节省计算量；(3) 提炼出实用默认配置和指南以支持发布前的模型选择。

Conclusion: 学习目标是决定效用-风险权衡的关键因素，配置与采样选择可进一步调节性能；OT路径在计算效率上优于VP路径；研究结果可指导在披露风险和资源约束下的实际模型选择。

Abstract: Synthetic tabular data enables microdata sharing in regulated domains, yet deploying continuous-time generative models requires balancing analytical utility, disclosure risk, and computational cost. Latent-space flow models are flexible, but theoretical equivalences across learning targets, probability paths, and sampling dynamics can translate into different behaviour under finite-step integration and explicit compute budgets. We present an empirical study of tabular latent flow models across seven datasets, evaluating velocity, score, noise, and posterior matching objectives under optimal transport (OT) and variance-preserving (VP) paths, ODE and SDE sampling, and varying integration budgets. Our contributions are threefold: (1) we show that the learning target largely determines the utility-risk operating regime, with velocity and posterior matching tending to yield higher utility, while score and noise matching tend to achieve lower disclosure risk; (2) we demonstrate that configuration and sampling choices shift performance, with midpoint often improving distributional fidelity and OT paths often tolerating earlier stopping than VP, enabling compute savings under fixed budgets or risk thresholds; and (3) we distil these findings into actionable defaults and practical configuration guidance to support pre-release model selection under disclosure risk and resource constraints. The code implementation and supplementary materials can be accessed in https://github.com/rulnasution/tabular-latent-flow/.

</details>


### [466] [Temporal Causal Prior-Data Fitted Networks for Panel Data with Learned Reliability Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20889)
*Shravan Talupula,Saurabh Sharma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TCPFN，一个面向工业时序数据的零样本因果发现基础模型。TCPFN通过因果判断头、混合训练先验、离散token面板数据架构和FAISS上下文选择，在19个基准数据集上取得优异零样本因果发现性能（AUROC最高0.98），并能在单GPU上6小时处理高达1,275维的工业数据集，相比传统方法PCMCI提速超过50倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果基础模型仅适用于静态横截面数据，神经时序方法需要逐数据集训练，且均无法输出逐对可靠性信号。工业时序数据对可扩展性和可靠性有极高要求，亟需一个既能零样本推理又能提供置信度信号的时序因果发现基础模型。

Method: TCPFN包含四大贡献：1) 因果判断头，联合预测空效应概率、混淆强度、可识别性、中介分数和因果机制；2) 混合训练先验，覆盖六种因果机制（独立、直接、混淆、中介、时变混淆、反馈）以及前门和工具变量先验；3) 离散token面板数据架构，采用交叉注意力遮蔽防止跨时间步信息泄露；4) 基于FAISS的工业级零样本推理与一步后验校正。

Result: 在19个基准数据集上：Tennessee Eastman AUROC 0.96，SWaT 0.93，Causal Rivers 0.98，CAUSRCA 0.97，Null检测器NullF1 0.94/AUROC 0.99。工业案例：TCPFN在单GPU上6小时处理V=1,275维造纸数据集；相同数据上PCMCI对V=666子集需81.5小时，扩展到V=1,275约需12.5天。

Conclusion: TCPFN是首个面向工业规模时序数据的零样本因果发现基础模型，兼具高性能、可扩展性和可靠性信号输出，在精度和效率上显著超越传统方法，展示了从控制器-测量耦合到跨子系统因果关系的工业应用潜力。

Abstract: Estimating causal effects in industrial time series requires handling temporal dynamics, time-varying treatments, and unobserved confounders. Existing causal foundation models (CausalPFN, CausalFM) operate only on static cross-sectional data; neural temporal methods (CRN, G-Net) require per-dataset training; and concurrent temporal-PFN proposals have not been demonstrated at industrial scale. None output explicit per-pair reliability signals alongside their CATE estimates.
  We introduce Temporal Causal Prior-Data Fitted Networks (TCPFN), a foundation model for zero-shot temporal causal discovery with learned reliability signals. TCPFN makes four contributions: (1) a Causal Judgment Head that jointly predicts null-effect probability, confounding strength, identifiability, mediation fraction, and causal regime; (2) a mixed training prior covering six causal regimes (independent, direct, confounded, mediated, time-varying confounded, feedback) plus CausalFM-style front-door and instrumental-variable priors; (3) a discrete-token panel-data architecture with cross-attention masking that prevents inter-horizon leakage; (4) zero-shot inference at industrial scale via FAISS-based context selection and one-step posterior correction.
  On 19 benchmark datasets across five domains, TCPFN achieves competitive zero-shot causal discovery: AUROC 0.96 on Tennessee Eastman, 0.93 on SWaT, 0.98 on Causal Rivers, 0.97 on CAUSRCA. The null detector reaches NullF1 0.94, AUROC 0.99. TCPFN scales to V=1,275 on a proprietary Kraft pulp-and-paper dataset in 6 hours on a single GPU; PCMCI, a CPU-only library, on a V=666 sub-panel of the same data took 81.5 hours, extrapolating by O(V^2) to ~12.5 days at V=1,275. TCPFN's top edges identify cross-subsystem causal relationships while PCMCI's surface within-instrument controller-measurement coupling -- a scalability case study.

</details>


### [467] [MMGNN: Multi-level, multi-color graph neural networks for molecular property prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20906)
*Trung Nguyen,Duc Duy Nguyen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MMGNN，通过将分子图分解为重叠的原子类型对子图（2D基于共价键、3D基于空间几何），在多个分类和回归任务上取得了优于传统方法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统分子消息传递神经网络通过单一图传播所有化学相互作用，容易混淆不同交互信号，且需要深层传播才能捕获长程效应。

Method: 提出MMGNN框架：1) 将分子图分解为原子类型对特异的重叠子图；2) MMGNN-2D基于共价连接构建化学着色子图，MMGNN-3D基于空间邻近构建几何着色子图并添加距离/角度/扭转描述符；3) 每个子图共享消息传递骨干网络，最终通过原子级聚合与分子读出得到整体表征。

Result: 在MoleculeNet的5个分类和3个回归基准上：MMGNN-2D取得分类任务最高宏平均AUC-ROC (0.838)和ESOL最低RMSE (0.803)；MMGNN-3D在BBBP取得最高AUC-ROC (0.956)和FreeSolv最低RMSE (1.793)。

Conclusion: 重叠的交互特异性子图分解是分子性质预测中一种有竞争力的策略，拓扑与几何表征具有互补优势。

Abstract: Molecular message-passing neural networks commonly propagate chemically diverse interactions through a single graph, which may mix interaction-specific signals and require deep propagation to capture long-range effects. We introduce the Multi-level, Multi-color Graph Neural Network (MMGNN), a hierarchical framework that decomposes a molecular graph into overlapping atom-type-pair-specific subgraphs while preserving atom-level resolution. MMGNN-2D constructs chemical-colored subgraphs from covalent connectivity, whereas MMGNN-3D constructs geometric-colored subgraphs from spatial proximity and augments their edges with distance, angular, and torsional descriptors. Both variants apply a shared communicative message-passing backbone to each subgraph and combine the resulting representations through atom-wise aggregation and molecular readout. We evaluated MMGNN on five classification and three regression benchmarks from MoleculeNet using common scaffold splits and five independent runs. MMGNN-2D achieved the highest macro-average AUC-ROC of 0.838 across the classification datasets and the lowest RMSE on ESOL (0.803). MMGNN-3D obtained the highest mean AUC-ROC on BBBP (0.956) and the lowest RMSE on FreeSolv (1.793), indicating complementary strengths of topological and geometric representations. Structural and leave-one-out analyses further illustrate how the subgraph decomposition affects learned representations and atom-type-pair sensitivities. These results support overlapping interaction-specific graph decomposition as a competitive strategy for molecular property prediction.

</details>


### [468] [Physics-Guided Dual-Stream Heterogeneous Graph Neural Network for Predicting Full-Field Structural Response of Stiffened Panels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20916)
*Yuecheng Cai,Jasmin Jelovica*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出双流异构图神经网络(DS-HGNN)，用于薄壁结构全场应力和位移预测，在加筋板箱梁上验证，相比六种基线模型取得最低误差，且训练样本减少19%-38%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型复杂结构的迭代设计与优化需要快速准确的场预测，传统有限元分析计算成本高，现有神经网络代理难以处理可变拓扑和复杂边界条件。

Method: DS-HGNN：1) 面板级异构图表示；2) 物理引导的边状态初始化(边类型、空间信息、边界运动学)；3) 双流消息传递(纵向/横向分离+跨流交换)；4) FiLM条件的一维谱卷积；5) 谱旁路低秩读出重建物理场。

Result: 在多个加筋板数据集上，DS-HGNN的应力和位移RMSE均低于六种基线异构图模型；仅用19%-38%训练样本即可达到与最强基线相当的精度；能捕捉屈服及屈服后应力特征。

Conclusion: DS-HGNN通过双流异构设计和物理信息注入，有效平衡了预测精度与数据效率，为复杂薄壁结构力学场快速预测提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Iterative design and optimization of large, complex structures require fast and accurate prediction of stress, displacement, and other fields. Finite element analysis (FEA) is computationally expensive for this task. Existing neural network surrogates often struggle with varying topologies and complex boundary conditions. This study proposes the novel Dual-Stream Heterogeneous Graph Neural Network (DS-HGNN) for full-field stress and displacement prediction in thin-walled structures, demonstrated on box beams made of stiffened panels. DS-HGNN operates on panel-level heterogeneous graph representations and introduces physics-guided edge states initialized from edge types, spatial information, and boundary kinematics. These states are updated through dual-stream message passing that separates longitudinal and transverse structural information while allowing cross-stream exchange. Geometry and loading effects are incorporated through Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM)-conditioned 1-D spectral convolutions, and physical fields are reconstructed using a spectral-bypass low-rank readout. The model is evaluated on stiffened panel datasets with different geometries, boundary kinematics, loading conditions, and material nonlinear responses. DS-HGNN achieves the lowest stress and displacement RMSE compared with six benchmark heterogeneous graph neural network models. It also reaches comparable accuracy to the strongest benchmark models using 19%-38% fewer training samples. A targeted evaluation further shows that DS-HGNN captures yield and post-yield stress features.

</details>


### [469] [Short-Term Electricity Demand Forecasting for New England Using a Hybrid Transformer-XGBoost Framework with Weather, Calendar, and COVID-19 Indicators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20918)
*Reza Ghanavati,Behrooz Mosallaei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Transformer编码器与XGBoost混合框架预测新英格兰地区短期电力需求，在测试集上RMSE为8,876 MWh、MAPE为2.05%、R-squared为0.906。研究发现COVID-19特征在训练期有效但在测试期造成过拟合，揭示了时间有效性衰减机制——疫情行为扰动在2020-2021年驱动强信号，但到2022年中已完全适应，流行病学特征变为放大过拟合的噪声。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 短期电力需求预测对电力系统可靠运行、能源市场规划和基础设施优化至关重要，现有方法在整合外部变量（如气象、流行病学数据）和捕捉时间动态方面仍有不足。

Method: 采用Transformer编码器提取时间特征，结合XGBoost梯度提升决策树构建混合框架。输入包括覆盖新英格兰六州六个城市的气象观测、日历/节假日效应、自回归需求滞后项及COVID-19流行病学变量。超参数优化使用Optuna与多变量Tree-structured Parzen Estimator，经500次试验，采用70/15/15无泄漏时间序列划分。

Result: 混合模型测试RMSE为8,876 MWh、MAPE为2.05%、R-squared为0.906；纯表格XGBoost基线RMSE为9,304 MWh、MAPE为2.21%、R-squared为0.896。Diebold-Mariano检验显示427.7 MWh差异在统计上不显著（DM=-1.126, p=0.262）。消融实验发现移除COVID特征使混合模型RMSE恶化3.2%，但使XGBoost改进1.2%。SHAP时间分析显示8个COVID特征中有5个在测试集上排名高于训练集。

Conclusion: 时间有效性衰减是核心机制：COVID-19行为扰动在2020-2021年驱动了强需求信号，但到2022年中人群已完全适应，流行病学特征沦为放大对陈旧疫情模式过拟合的噪声。模型设计需考虑外部变量的时间有效性衰减。

Abstract: Accurate short-term electricity demand forecasting is critical for reliable power system operation, energy market planning, and infrastructure optimization. This paper presents a hybrid framework combining a Transformer encoder for temporal feature extraction with gradient-boosted decision trees (XGBoost) for daily electricity demand forecasting across New England. The framework integrates meteorological observations from six cities spanning all six New England states, calendar and holiday effects, autoregressive demand lags, and COVID-19 epidemiological variables. Hyperparameter optimization uses Optuna with a multivariate Tree-structured Parzen Estimator over 500 trials, with a leakage-free 70/15/15 chronological train-validation-test split. The hybrid model achieves a test RMSE of 8,876 MWh, MAPE of 2.05%, and R-squared of 0.906. A tabular-only XGBoost baseline achieves RMSE of 9,304 MWh, MAPE of 2.21%, and R-squared of 0.896. A Diebold-Mariano test (Harvey-Leybourne-Newbold correction) confirms the 427.7 MWh difference is statistically indistinguishable from noise (DM = -1.126, p = 0.262). An ablation study reveals COVID-19 features improved training accuracy but had asymmetric test effects: removal degraded hybrid RMSE by 3.2% while marginally improving XGBoost-only by 1.2%. A SHAP temporal analysis shows 5 of 8 COVID features rank higher on the post-acute test set than during pandemic-active training, indicating the model over-applies learned pandemic patterns. These findings establish temporal validity decay as a central mechanism: behavioral disruptions drove a strong COVID-demand signal during 2020-2021, but adaptation was complete by mid-2022, leaving epidemiological features as noise amplifying overfitting to stale pandemic patterns.

</details>


### [470] [$Ω$: Operator-based Mixture Ensemble for Generative Assimilation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20920)
*Pouria Behnoudfar,Nan Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Ω框架，结合条件高斯代理、无监督分数学习和生成采样，高效处理高维非线性系统中非高斯后验分布的数据同化问题，无需真实后验样本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法（集合卡尔曼滤波假设高斯性不准确，粒子滤波可扩展性差，生成方法需监督训练）难以有效表征非高斯后验分布，且实际应用中缺乏真实后验样本。

Method: 1) 条件高斯代理模型提供解析闭合形式条件后验；2) 利用该解析形式高效恢复高维未观测分量；3) 通过去噪分数匹配仅学习与解析基线的残差（无监督）；4) 用高斯混合表示完整非高斯后验；5) 退火朗之万采样从基线向目标后验迭代精化。

Result: 在多个含间歇性和极端事件的湍流模型上验证，持续提高了后验精度。

Conclusion: Ω框架通过解析基线+残差学习的策略，在保持可扩展性的同时准确刻画非高斯后验，为实际数据同化问题提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Characterizing non-Gaussian posterior distributions in partially observed high-dimensional nonlinear systems remains a fundamental challenge in data assimilation. Ensemble Kalman filters rely on Gaussian approximations that can be inaccurate for strongly non-Gaussian posteriors, whereas particle filters suffer from severe scalability limitations. Recent score-based generative approaches improve posterior characterization but typically require supervised training with ground-truth posterior samples, which are unavailable in most practical applications. We introduce $Ω$ (Operator-based Mixture Ensemble for Generative Assimilation), a scalable framework that integrates conditional Gaussian surrogate modeling, unsupervised score learning, and generative sampling. The conditional Gaussian surrogate provides a nonlinear non-Gaussian baseline approximation while admitting closed-form conditional posterior distributions for the unresolved variables. First, $Ω$ exploits these closed-form conditional distributions to analytically recover the high-dimensional unobserved component, reducing computational cost and mitigating the curse of dimensionality. Second, $Ω$ learns only the residual discrepancy beyond an analytical baseline through denoising score matching using ensemble trajectories alone, eliminating the need for ground-truth posterior samples and substantially reducing the learning burden. Third, $Ω$ reconstructs the full non-Gaussian posterior distribution of both observed and unobserved variables via a Gaussian mixture representation, capturing multimodal, skewed, and heavy-tailed statistics. Finally, $Ω$ employs annealed Langevin sampling to iteratively refine ensemble members from the baseline toward the target posterior. $Ω$ is validated on several turbulent models with intermittency and extreme events, consistently improving posterior accuracy.

</details>


### [471] [Hierarchical Pooling for Sheaf Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20932)
*Dionisia Naddeo,Carlo Abate,Pietro Liò,Nicola Toschi,Filippo Maria Bianchi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出HiSP，一种基于局部谱粗化的Sheaf感知池化框架，通过将细粒度stalk特征投影到簇内Sheaf Laplacian的低频特征模式上来构建粗粒度表示，并分析了由截断损失和实现损失导致的逼近误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Sheaf神经网络主要在固定图分辨率下运行，缺乏 principled 的池化机制来构建层次化表示。

Method: HiSP框架：给定图分划后，将细粒度stalk特征投影到簇内Sheaf Laplacian的低频特征模式上构建粗粒度stalk；定义上链级别的延拓映射；通过Galerkin算子将细粒度Sheaf能量表示在粗粒度空间上；分离分析截断损失（丢弃局部模态）和实现损失（将投影算子表示为粗Sheaf）。

Result: 提出了一个兼容SNN的池化层，提供了PyG实现，支持批处理、提升Sheaf Laplacian和层次化架构。

Conclusion: HiSP为Sheaf神经网络提供了首个 principled 的层次化池化机制，通过局部谱粗化在保留Sheaf结构信息的同时实现图降采样。

Abstract: Sheaf Neural Networks (SNNs) generalize Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) by replacing scalar node signals with stalk-valued signals and by using restriction maps to measure compatibility across edges. Unlike standard graph diffusion, which encourages neighboring node features to become similar, sheaf diffusion promotes consistency through the restriction maps and can therefore model more general relationships between neighboring nodes. However, existing sheaf neural architectures mainly operate at a fixed graph resolution and do not provide a principled pooling mechanism for building hierarchical representations. In this paper, we introduce Hierarchical Sheaf Pool (HiSP), a sheaf-aware pooling framework based on local spectral coarsening. Given a partition of the graph, HiSP constructs each coarse stalk by projecting fine stalk-valued features onto the low-frequency eigenmodes of the cluster-internal sheaf Laplacian. These local modes define a cochain-level prolongation map, which allows the fine sheaf energy to be represented on the coarse space through a Galerkin operator. We further analyze the approximation induced by coarsening by separating truncation loss, due to discarded local modes, from realization loss, due to representing the projected operator as a coarse sheaf. Finally, we implement HiSP as a GNN pooling layer compatible with SNNs and provide a PyG implementation supporting batching, lifted sheaf Laplacians, and hierarchical architectures.

</details>


### [472] [Towards Robust Training in NNGPT AutoML Pipeline: A Loss-Optimizer Pairing Selection Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20933)
*Anton Abramochkin,Radu Timofte,Dmitry Ignatov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了6种优化器与3种损失函数的18种组合，在LEMUR异构架构池的33种基础架构、6个图像分类数据集上的表现。共产生594个自动生成的变体，实验表明不存在普适最优组合。Cross-Entropy搭配Adam或AdamW是最稳健的选择；NGL在适配自适应优化器时是卷积分类器的有力替代；Adagrad和Adadelta在固定超参数下表现不佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究在异构架构池中，是否存在一种通用的损失函数与优化器组合（single recipe）能够适用于所有模型，还是说最优配对因模型结构差异而不同，从而为AutoML和NNGPT框架提供可操作的选型指导。

Method: 采用3种损失函数（CEL、NLL、NGL）与6种优化器（SGD+Momentum、Adam、AdamW、RMSprop、Adagrad、Adadelta）组成18种配置，应用于LEMUR池中33种兼容的基础架构，在6个图像分类数据集上通过源级注入管道自动生成594个变体，固定超参数以确保差异仅来自损失-优化器配对。

Result: 无单一配对普适最优；Cross-Entropy+Adam/AdamW最稳健；NGL配自适应优化器可替代CEL，但配SGD或累积方法时性能大幅下降；Adagrad与Adadelta在所有损失函数下均表现不佳，对学习率敏感。

Conclusion: 损失函数与优化器的选择需根据架构特性定制，不能一概而论，为NNGPT框架提供了具体的选型建议。

Abstract: The choice of loss function and optimizer is an important decision, that shapes further model training. Yet automated architecture search pipelines (AutoML) benefits significantly more from the optimal pairing selection and vice versa. This paper investigates whether a single recipe is sufficient for heterogeneous architecture pools, or whether the optimal pairing varies across structurally diverse models. We conduct a systematic empirical study of all $3 \times 6 = 18$ combinations of six optimizers (SGD+Momentum, Adam, AdamW, RMSprop, Adagrad, Adadelta), paired with three loss functions: Cross-Entropy (CEL), Negative Log-Likelihood (NLL), and the recently introduced genetically evolved NGL loss across the base models presented in LEMUR heterogeneous architecture pool on six image classification datasets (CelebA-Gender, CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNette, MNIST, SVHN). The 18 loss-optimizer configurations are applied to each of the 33 compatible base architectures taken from the LEMUR pool, resulting in 594 variants that were generated fully automatically by a source-level injection pipeline and evaluated under fixed hyperparameters, ensuring that observed accuracy differences are attributable solely to the loss-optimizer pairing. Our results confirm that no single pairing is universally optimal. Cross-Entropy with Adam or AdamW is the most robust choice across architecture families and datasets. NGL is a competitive alternative to CEL on standard convolutional classifiers, but only when paired with adaptive optimizers; it degrades substantially with SGD or accumulation-based methods. Adagrad and Adadelta consistently underperform under fixed hyperparameters regardless of loss function, highlighting their sensitivity to learning rate tuning. These findings provide actionable guidance for loss-optimizer selection within NNGPT Framework.

</details>


### [473] [Learning through Internalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20937)
*Nikolaos Tsilivis,Nirmit Joshi,Marko Medvedev,Julia Kempe,Nati Srebro*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了神经网络系统（特别是Transformer）如何将显式计算过程（如思维链CoT）内化到自身权重中，分析了内化过程的难易程度、分布外性能退化问题，并通过奇偶性学习任务首次提供了内化成功的理论证明，展示了模型从有CoT监督逐步过渡到直接计算的过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究神经网络系统如何通过内化过程吸收显式计算步骤到自身权重中，并探讨这一机制如何促进学习，特别是理解Transformer如何内化半自动机的仿真过程以及内化的局限性。

Method: 通过理论分析和实验研究Transformer内化思维链（CoT）令牌的过程，分析不同类别半自动机的内化难度，并通过简化的一层Transformer在奇偶性学习任务上提供内化成功的可证明分析。

Result: 首次提供了内化成功的可证明分析：在奇偶性学习任务上，简化的一层Transformer先通过显式CoT监督学习目标，然后在CoT令牌逐步移除过程中内化自回归生成，学会直接计算奇偶性。同时发现内化会导致分布外性能的逐步退化。

Conclusion: 内化过程是神经网络学习的重要机制，但也伴随着分布外泛化性能下降的代价。该研究为理解内化过程提供了理论基础，并与正分布偏移现象相关联。

Abstract: We study internalization processes, by which neural-network-based systems absorb an explicit computational procedure into their own weights, and how they facilitate learning. We investigate how transformers internalize the simulation of semiautomata by internalizing chain-of-thought (CoT) tokens, which classes of semiautomata are harder to internalize, and expose the flip side of internalization, that is, a progressive degradation of out-of-distribution performance. We then provide the first provable analysis of successful internalization: for the task of learning parities, we show that a simplified one-layer transformer provably first learns the target with explicit CoT supervision and then internalizes the autoregressive generation as CoT tokens are progressively removed, learning to directly compute the parity. This task is computationally hard to learn from data without CoT supervision. Finally, we discuss how learning through internalization relates to the \textit{Positive Distribution Shift} phenomenon recently introduced by~\citet{Med+26}.

</details>


### [474] [Grouped Query Experts: Mixture-of-Experts on GQA Self-Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20945)
*Vishesh Tripathi,Abhay Kumar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GQE在分组查询注意力(GQA)基础上引入混合专家层，每个token只激活一半的查询头，在250M参数规模、30B token预算下达到与全激活GQA基线相当的下游精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准密集注意力在长序列下计算成本呈二次方增长，且对所有token统一激活所有注意力头，浪费计算资源。

Method: 在GQA的每组中引入路由器，为每个token选择k个查询头专家，而所有KV头保持密集不变，从而减少活跃查询头的计算量。

Result: 在250M参数规模、30B token预算下，激活一半查询头即可匹配全激活GQA基线的下游任务准确率。

Conclusion: GQE通过选择性激活查询头，在保持GQA的KV缓存优势的同时，有效降低了注意力计算成本。

Abstract: Self-attention is central to Transformer performance and is often the most expensive part of the Transformer at long context lengths because its pairwise token interactions scale quadratically with sequence length. Standard dense attention also applies the same set of attention heads to every token regardless of token difficulty or information content. This uniform activation can waste compute, especially as sequences grow longer and attention cost increases rapidly. We propose Grouped Query Experts (GQE), a mixture-of-experts layer on top of grouped-query attention (GQA). Within each GQA group, a router selects k query-head experts per token while all key-value (KV) heads remain dense and unchanged. Thus, GQE keeps the KV cache benefits of GQA and reduces only the active query-head computation. On a fixed 30B token budget at the 250M parameter scale, GQE matches the all-active GQA baseline in downstream accuracy while activating half the query heads per token.

</details>
