Although multimodal LLMs can generate reasonable ECG narratives, their zero-shot diagnostic discrimination remains limited. Therefore, clinically framed, domain-specific architectures remain essential for AI-based ECG interpretation.

</details>


### [661] [SVD-Surgeon: Optimal Singular-Value Surgery for Large Language Model Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23568)
*Mahmoud Safari,Frank Hutter*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SVD-Surgeon 是一种无需训练的 LLM 低秩压缩方法，通过对奇异值进行二阶修剪补偿，在现有 SVD 压缩器基础上提升困惑度-压缩权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM 部署受限于内存和计算需求，现有低秩压缩方法（如 SVD）虽然有效，但主要关注如何分解和保留哪些成分，忽略了修剪奇异值后对损失的补偿。

Method: 将 Optimal Brain Surgeon (OBS) 框架引入奇异值基，将每个奇异值视为参数，计算被截断奇异值对保留奇异值的闭式二阶补偿更新，同时推导出用于选择修剪目标的显著性指标。

Result: 在 OPT 系列和 LLaMA 2-7B 上，SVD-Surgeon 叠加于 SVD-LLM 之上，在不进行重训练的情况下显著改善了困惑度-压缩权衡。

Conclusion: SVD-Surgeon 可作为现有 SVD 压缩器的即插即用增强模块，通过二阶补偿有效提升压缩质量，且无需额外训练。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) achieve remarkable performance across a wide range of tasks, but their deployment is constrained by substantial memory and compute requirements. Low-rank compression via singular value decomposition (SVD) is an effective remedy, but existing methods focus on how to factorize and which components to keep. We introduce SVD-Surgeon, a training-free method that brings the Optimal Brain Surgeon (OBS) framework to the singular-value basis. Treating each singular value as a parameter, it computes a closed-form update of the retained singular values that compensates, to second order in the model loss, for those removed by truncation. The same analysis yields a saliency for choosing which values to prune. As it operates directly on the singular-value factorization, SVD-Surgeon can be layered on top of existing SVD compressors. Applied to SVD-LLM, a leading SVD-based method, it improves the perplexity-compression trade-off on the OPT family and LLaMA 2-7B without any retraining.

</details>


### [662] [Learning Graphs through Continuous Information Entropy Fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22895)
*Hui Cong,Bo Sun,Ziheng Jiao,Yisheng An*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出场信息图网络（FGN），通过潜在连续信息熵场解释图结构，使图成为场的离散实例化。FGN学习标量场来调节消息传递，形成场与节点表示共演化的自强化循环，在节点和图分类任务上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统图论将边视为原始构造，仅描述关系存在与否（描述性），却无法解释关系为何产生。论文旨在提供一个解释性框架，揭示图结构背后的因果机制。

Method: 提出Field-informed Graph Network (FGN)：1）从节点特征学习标量场；2）利用该场调节消息传递（场调制权重）；3）信息论目标函数平衡结构保真度与场平滑性；4）场与节点表示形成自强化共演化循环。

Result: 在节点分类和图分类基准上表现优越，对扰动具有鲁棒性，且生成的场表示具有结构一致性。

Conclusion: FGN通过将图学习从描述性框架转变为解释性框架，不仅提升了性能，还通过学习自身共演化过程揭示了图结构背后的潜在因果机制。

Abstract: Graph theory is inherently descriptive, capturing what relationships exist but not why they arise, because it treats edges as primitive constructs. This paper proposes a new explanatory framework for graph learning, where relationships emerge from latent continuous information entropy fields, and a graph becomes a discrete instantiation of an underlying field. To formalize this field, we introduce the Field-informed Graph Network (FGN). It learns a scalar field from node features and leverages it to modulate message passing. The information-theoretic objective balances structural fidelity with field smoothness, forming a self-reinforcing loop. In this loop, the field modulates information diffusion through field-modulated weighting, and the updated node representations iteratively refine the field. As a result, FGN learns by simulating its own co-evolution. Extensive experiments on node classification and graph classification benchmarks demonstrate superior performance, robustness to perturbations, and structurally coherent field representations.

</details>


### [663] [Tapered Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23670)
*Reza Bayat,Ali Behrouz,Aaron Courville*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Tapered Language Models (TLMs)，通过在固定预算下将更多参数容量分配给早期层、更少给后期层（采用余弦调度逐渐缩减MLP宽度），在不同架构（Transformer、Gated Attention、Hope-attention、Titans）和规模下均能提升困惑度和下游性能，无需额外参数或计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语言模型默认在深度方向上均匀分配参数，但越来越多的证据表明各层对最终输出的贡献是非均匀的——后期层更多是对残差流的微调而非变换。本文质疑参数容量是否应反映这种不对称性。

Method: 通过控制实验验证：在固定预算下，给早期层更多容量、后期层更少容量能提升困惑度。基于此提出TLMs，对MLP宽度采用平滑余弦调度逐步缩减，在三种模型规模和四种架构（Transformer、Gated Attention、Hope-attention、Titans）上进行验证。

Result: TLMs在所有架构和规模下均优于均匀宽度的基线，提升了困惑度和下游基准性能。反向分配（早期少、后期多）则效果变差。

Conclusion: 深度感知的容量分配是一种简单、架构无关的语言模型设计轴，是在固定预算下无需额外代价即可获得的性能提升手段。

Abstract: Modern language models, including transformer, recurrent, and memory-based variants, share a common chassis: a stack of identical layers in which parameters are allocated uniformly across depth. This is a default inherited from the original transformer and largely unchanged since, yet a growing body of evidence suggests that layers contribute non-uniformly to the final output, with later layers refining the residual stream rather than transforming it. We ask whether parameter capacity should reflect this asymmetry. Our controlled experiment shows that, under a fixed budget, allocating more capacity to earlier layers and less to later layers improves perplexity over a uniform-width baseline, while the reverse allocation hurts. Building on this result, we introduce Tapered Language Models (TLMs), an architectural principle in which a parameter-bearing component is monotonically tapered across depth under a fixed total budget. MLPs are the natural site for this instantiation: they dominate parameter count across all modern LM families and expose width as a single, clean axis of variation. Across three model scales and four architectures (Transformer, Gated Attention, Hope-attention, and Titans), tapering MLP width via a smooth cosine schedule consistently improves perplexity and downstream benchmark performance over uniform baselines, at no additional parameter or compute cost. These findings establish depth-aware capacity allocation as a simple, architecture-agnostic axis of language model design, a free lever hidden in plain sight.

</details>


### [664] [PromptDyG: Test-Time Prompt Adaptation on Dynamic Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22914)
*Guoguo Ai,Chaoxi Niu,Hui Yan,Joey Tianyi Zhou,Yew-Soon Ong,Guansong Pang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PromptDyG是一种利用无监督测试时提示（prompt）适配进行动态图在线学习的新框架，在冻结的骨干网络上通过最小化无标签熵来持续建模演化模式，在六个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动态图方法（DTDGs）采用离线离线学习设置，一次训练后不再更新，无法捕捉：1）图快照间不断演化的复杂性；2）测试图快照中的分布偏移问题。

Method: 提出PromptDyG框架，在无监督测试时通过最小化特征级的无标签熵，在冻结的骨干网络上学习表达性动态图提示（prompt），实现在线实时更新。

Result: 理论上证明该无监督提示适配能保证正负样本对之间更大的相似性边际，从而提升动态预测准确性；实验上在六个基准数据集上一致且显著优于最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: PromptDyG通过轻量级提示适配有效解决了动态图在线学习中的分布偏移和演化复杂性捕捉问题。

Abstract: Activities in numerous evolving systems can be represented as dynamic graphs in snapshot form at different time intervals, i.e., discrete-time dynamic graphs (DTDGs). Existing methods show impressive advances in capturing historical temporal evolution patterns in DTDGs, but they focus on addressing an offline learning setting, where models are trained using historical snapshots once and then evaluated to all subsequent graph snapshots without further updating. This fails to capture 1) the nature of evolving complexities across graph snapshots and 2) the distribution shift in the testing graph snapshots. To address these problems, we propose PromptDyG, a novel framework that leverages unsupervised test-time Prompt adaptation for Dynamic Graph learning under a live-update online setting. The key insight is that an expressive dynamic graph prompt can be learned on a frozen backbone via minimization of feature-wise, label-free entropy to efficiently and continuously model the evolving patterns. We show theoretically that this unsupervised prompt adaptation can guarantee a larger similarity margin between positive and negative pairs, facilitating more accurate dynamic predictions. It is further confirmed by our extensive empirical results on six benchmark datasets that show consistent and significant improvements of PromptDyG over state-of-the-art baselines.

</details>


### [665] [GRAIN: Group Aggregation via Min-Norm Objective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22917)
*Nghia Bui,Jiarui Yao,Lijing Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GRAIN算法，用最小范数凸组合替代小批量优化中的均值聚合，解决梯度冲突，降低训练方差，在大型预训练模型上提升性能且无额外开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习中的学习不稳定性问题在过参数化时代尤为突出，大型预训练模型训练成本高、下游数据少，重复运行降低方差不可行，需要一种轻量级方法稳定训练过程。

Method: GRAIN算法用最小范数凸组合替代均值聚合，保证聚合更新与每个组梯度内积非负，解决批内和批间梯度冲突，收敛率与SGD相同为O(1/T)。

Result: 在生成、分类、回归等大规模任务上，GRAIN一致提升了平均性能并降低了运行间方差，且无额外训练或存储开销。

Conclusion: 最小范数解几乎必然区别于算术均值，能提供比SGD更紧的一致性稳定性界，是稳定大规模模型训练的有效轻量级方案。

Abstract: Learning instability is a long-standing problem across machine learning, but it is especially acute in the overparameterized regime that defines modern deep learning: large models fine-tuned or trained on limited data traverse flat loss landscapes with many nearly-equivalent minima, and stochastic factors (initialization, data order, dropout, hardware non-determinism) can route optimization to very different solutions. The rise of large pretrained models (LPMs) makes the problem more urgent: training cost is high, downstream data is often small, and repeated runs for variance reduction are prohibitive. We introduce \textbf{GRAIN} (\textbf{G}roup \textbf{A}ggregation via m\textbf{IN}-norm objective), a lightweight training algorithm that replaces the mean aggregation used in mini-batch optimization (both across mini-batches and within a mini-batch) with a min-norm convex combination of group-wise gradients. \mName guarantees a non-negative inner product between the aggregated update and every group gradient, resolving intra- and inner-batch gradient conflict, and retains an $\mathcal{O}(1/T)$ convergence rate comparable to SGD. Under mild smoothness and absolute-continuity assumptions, the min-norm solution differs almost surely from the arithmetic mean, which yields a uniform-stability bound for \mName strictly tighter than the standard bound for SGD. Empirically across generation, classification, and regression at LPM scale, \mName delivers consistent improvements in mean performance and reductions in run-to-run variance over a broad suite of tasks, with no extra training-time or storage cost beyond a single backward pass.

</details>


### [666] [Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning for Sparse-Reward Search in Commutative Algebra](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22922)
*Giorgi Butbaia,Paul Orland,Coco Huang,Davide Passaro,Lucas Fagan,Michele Tarquini,Hailong Dao,David Eisenbud,Ali Shehper,Sergei Gukov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于层次强化学习（HRL）的约束选项框架，结合等变图神经网络策略，成功解决了Kalai代数Hirsch猜想的反例构造问题，在稀疏奖励环境下显著优于经典RL算法和贪心搜索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习解决数学猜想面临极端奖励稀疏的挑战，作者以Kalai代数Hirsch猜想为例，试图通过强化学习构造其反例，探索HRL在数学问题中的应用可能。

Method: 将反例构造问题重构为图上的稀疏奖励强化学习问题；提出基于约束选项的HRL框架，并采用等变图神经网络作为策略网络，以学习有用的时间抽象。

Result: 在多个度数范围内，该方法一致优于经典RL算法和贪心搜索策略。

Conclusion: 首次将HRL成功应用于交换代数领域的问题，证明了层次化结构在稀疏奖励数学问题中的有效性。

Abstract: Applying machine learning techniques to solving long-standing mathematical conjectures can be particularly challenging due to their extreme reward sparsity. As an illustrative example, we consider Kalai's algebraic Hirsch conjecture and recast the construction of its counterexamples as a sparse-reward reinforcement learning problem on graphs. We propose a constrained options-based HRL framework with an equivariant graph neural network policy, which allows us to learn useful temporal abstractions for this task. We evaluate our approach over a wide range of degrees and demonstrate that it consistently outperforms classical RL algorithms as well as greedy search. By exploiting the hierarchical structure of the problem, we effectively provide a first-of-its-kind application of HRL to a problem in commutative algebra.

</details>


### [667] [EEG Benchmarking Needs a Task Specification Layer: NeuroDoc for Rulebook-Guided, Executable Benchmark Construction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22925)
*Chengxuan Qin,Zhige Chen,Shu Peng,Rui Yang,Jiping Cui,Yikai Dong,Jun Li,Liu Peng,Zhida Shang,Mingze Tang,Kay Chen Tan,Jibin Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结构化任务规范语言和共享规则手册，用于标准化异构公共EEG数据集，并发布了包含53个条目、245个任务定义的基准语料库，通过NeuroDoc和NeuroAudit工具支持规则驱动的文档管理，并在四个EEG基础模型上验证了可执行性和可审计性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有EEG数据集缺乏共享的任务规范层，任务语义分散在论文、代码和人工解释中，导致异构数据集难以转化为可复用的基准单元。

Method: 提出结构化任务规范语言+共享规则手册：每个基准条目表示为任务文档+可执行任务内核；规则手册定义任务字段、证据要求、文档-内核对齐、审查状态和机器可检查约束。配套NeuroDoc和NeuroAudit工具支持全流程管理。

Result: 发布了经社区审查的EEG基准语料库（53个已完成条目，245个任务定义），并在四个EEG基础模型骨干上验证了可执行性。

Conclusion: 该工作构建了可复用、可审计、可执行的EEG基准测试基础设施，有效弥合了异构数据集与标准化评估之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) foundation models increasingly rely on multi-dataset training and evaluation, yet public EEG datasets still lack a shared task specification layer that can turn heterogeneous recordings into reusable benchmark units. Existing standards organize files, metadata, and provenance, but they do not specify EEG tasks under a common language and rulebook, leaving critical task semantics scattered across papers, code, and manual interpretation. We investigate whether heterogeneous public EEG datasets can be standardized through a structured task specification language paired with a shared rulebook. Our methodology represents each benchmark entry as a task document synchronized with an executable task kernel, with the rulebook defining task fields, evidence requirements, document-kernel alignment, review states, and machine-checkable constraints. Using this methodology, we release a community-reviewed EEG benchmark corpus centered on 53 completed and reviewed entries with 245 task definitions spanning diverse paradigms, and we introduce NeuroDoc and NeuroAudit as the operational support layer for rulebook-guided drafting, upgrading, review, amendment, and release management. We further examine whether the resulting benchmark units can be instantiated in a shared downstream setting across four EEG foundation model backbones, providing execution-based evidence for reusable, auditable, and executable EEG benchmarking infrastructure.

</details>


### [668] [FORGE: Fused On-Register Gradient Elimination for Memory-Efficient LLM Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22932)
*Dikshant Kukreja,Kritarth Prasad,Avinash Anand,Zhengkui Wang,Erik Cambria,Timothy Liu,Aik Beng Ng,Simon See,Bapi Chatterjee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FORGE提出一种将优化器步骤融合到反向传播中的方法，每次在寄存器中逐tile处理梯度，使得每个梯度tile生成即被消费，无需将完整梯度张量化，从而大幅降低训练内存占用并提升速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有反向模式自动微分采用两阶段调度：先反向传播计算所有梯度并写入内存，然后优化器再读取更新。这导致所有层梯度同时存活，形成训练的内存瓶颈。论文认为这种物化的梯度是微分分阶段的产物，而非学习所需，因此提出消除它。

Method: FORGE将优化器的更新步骤折叠进反向传播过程，以tile为单位在寄存器中逐块处理：每个梯度tile生成后立即被优化器消费，从不形成完整的梯度张量。融合仅改变更新时机，不改变计算结果——在全精度下数学上等价，在bf16/8-bit下偏差有界且通过随机舍入实现无偏存储。

Result: 相比标准优化器，FORGE能将优化器步骤的内存减少一半以上；在小batch size（微调、持续预训练典型场景）下运行速度提升约1.5倍；集成到张量并行的Megatron-LM后，在相同GPU上支持8B模型训练时允许的微批大小是标准优化器的4倍。

Conclusion: FORGE证明了传统训练中梯度张量化的必要性是可消除的，通过逐tile融合反向传播与优化器更新，可以显著降低内存瓶颈并提升训练效率，且方法具备通用性，适用于任何逐元素更新规则的线性层。

Abstract: Reverse-mode differentiation computes every weight gradient, writes it to memory, and only then lets the optimizer read it back. This two-phase schedule sets the memory ceiling of modern training: at the seam between the phases, every layer's gradient is live at once. We argue that this materialized gradient is an artifact of how differentiation is staged, not a quantity that learning requires -- and we eliminate it. FORGE folds the optimizer step into the backward pass and applies it one tile at a time, entirely in registers, so each gradient tile is consumed the instant it is produced and never becomes a tensor. The fusion changes only when the update happens, not what it computes: in full precision the fused step is provably exact -- the identical optimizer update, for every element-wise rule -- and that exactness survives tensor- and sequence-parallel sharding; in the bf16 and 8-bit regimes used in practice it is faithful rather than bit-identical, its deviation bounded and, for the weight store, rendered unbiased by stochastic rounding. Because each gradient tile is born and consumed in the same registers, it is never converted down to bf16 to be stored and read back; FORGE thus preserves the full-precision fidelity that both bf16 and 8-bit optimizers lose to that conversion. Nor is the method tied to one architecture or one optimizer: linear layers are ubiquitous, and FORGE reclaims the gradient memory of any of them under any element-wise rule. Empirically FORGE more than halves the memory of an optimizer step and, at the small batch sizes typical of fine-tuning and continued pretraining, runs about 1.5x faster; integrated into tensor-parallel Megatron-LM it fits 8B training at four times the micro-batch a standard optimizer allows on the same GPUs.

</details>


### [669] [Provable Benefits of RLVR over SFT for Reasoning Models: Learning to Backtrack Efficiently](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22938)
*Stanley Wei,Juno Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从理论上证明，强化学习（RLVR）相比监督微调（SFT）在推理能力上具有指数级优势，其关键在于RLVR能教会模型从死胡同中高效回溯（backtrack），而SFT仅学习最短路径无法做到这一点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究为何强化微调比纯监督微调能带来更好的推理能力，从理论层面解释这一经验现象背后的原因。

Method: 将链式推理（CoT）建模为图上的路径发现问题，从理论上对比SFT和RLVR两种训练方法在回溯能力上的差异，并通过推理时间计算复杂度进行指数级分离证明。

Result: 证明了RLVR训练下的模型能够学会从死胡同高效回溯，而SFT模型无法做到这一点，导致两者在推理时间计算上存在指数级差距。此外，RLVR模型的推理轨迹可以蒸馏到基座模型，使其同样具备高效回溯能力。

Conclusion: RLVR不仅能在推理时带来显著收益，其学到的推理模式还可以通过蒸馏传递给其他模型，为未来提升推理能力提供了理论依据和实践方向。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated that reinforcement fine-tuning of pretrained base models can lead to significant gains in reasoning performance at inference time. In this work, we theoretically analyze why reinforcement fine-tuning induces better reasoning ability than purely supervised fine-tuning (SFT) methods. We model chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning as a pathfinding problem on graphs and compare the popular method of reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) against traditional SFT. We prove that SFT, when trained on golden shortest paths without negative examples, fails to learn how to efficiently backtrack. In contrast, an RLVR-trained model can learn how to efficiently backtrack from dead ends using only outcome reward. This leads to an exponential separation in inference-time compute between the two methods, and demonstrates that RLVR leads the model to learn the location of difficult decisions in a reasoning chain, ultimately allowing for better allocation of inference-time compute. Finally, we show that the reasoning traces of an RLVR model can be distilled to train a base model to backtrack efficiently as well.

</details>


### [670] [Neural Operator Processes for Probabilistic Operator Learning under Partial Observations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22946)
*Jose Miguel Lara-Rangel,Serge Guillas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出神经算子过程（NOPs），将神经过程条件化与神经算子解码统一，实现从稀疏、不规则观测中预测完整解场，并支持确定性与概率性预测。实验表明稀疏条件算子学习可行，局部几何信息在非周期设置中至关重要，而潜在变量条件化需补充而非覆盖局部几何路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经算子通常需要密集输入-输出训练场和完全观测的输入进行推理，但许多科学问题需要在不确定性下从稀疏、不规则或部分观测中预测解场。

Method: 提出NOPs框架，结合神经过程条件化（使用卷积池化摘要和查询对齐注意力两种策略）与神经算子解码，在共享编码器-解码器架构中支持确定性和概率性预测。

Result: 在函数回归和三个PDE基准上：1）稀疏条件算子学习可行，可在多种情况下匹配密集网格行为；2）非周期设置中保留局部上下文-查询几何信息至关重要，但在频谱平滑周期设置中则不然；3）当潜在变量条件化补充而非覆盖局部几何路径时，不确定性感知算子学习才能成功。

Conclusion: 为部分观测下的概率算子学习提供了基础，有助于弥合算子学习与函数空间概率元学习之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: Neural operators learn mappings between function spaces, but are typically developed with dense input-output training fields and fully observed inputs at inference. Many scientific problems require instead predicting solution fields from sparse, irregular, or partial observations under uncertainty. We introduce Neural Operator Processes (NOPs), a framework that unifies neural-process conditioning with neural-operator decoding to predict full output fields from limited context. NOPs condition on sparse joint input-output observations and support deterministic and probabilistic prediction within a shared encoder-decoder architecture. We study two conditioning strategies, convolutional pooled summaries and query-aligned attention, and analyze how their interaction with latent stochastic variables depends on PDE geometry. Across function regression and three PDE benchmarks, we find that sparse conditional operator learning is viable and can match dense-grid behavior in several regimes, that preserving local context-query geometry is essential in non-periodic settings but less so in spectrally smooth periodic regimes, and that uncertainty-aware operator learning succeeds when latent conditioning complements rather than overwrites the local geometric pathway. These results provide a basis for probabilistic operator learning under partial observations and help bridge operator learning and probabilistic meta-learning in function space.

</details>


### [671] [DT-GOL: Dual-Track Geometric Online Learning in Nonstationary Environment with Label Delay](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22950)
*Yulin Wang,Yi He,Dianlong You,Di Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DT-GOL框架，通过几何空间推理替代时间补偿，解决在线学习中标签延迟导致的概念漂移适应问题，实验证明其显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线学习中的标签延迟问题被长期忽视，传统方法依赖时间补偿机制难以在标签缺失时快速适应动态环境变化。

Method: 提出DT-GOL框架：1) 将延迟建模为半监督任务，利用特征拓扑演化作为几何代理；2) 动态证据校准机制生成感知不确定性的软标签；3) 解耦双轨架构，主学习器用延迟真值稳定更新，瞬态分支用软几何知识进行低风险前向适应。

Result: 在真实和合成数据集上，DT-GOL显著优于现有最先进基线方法，尤其在概念漂移场景下表现突出。

Conclusion: 从时间补偿转向空间推理是解决标签延迟问题的有效路径，双轨架构成功平衡了稳定性和可塑性。

Abstract: Online learning is crucial for handling complex data streams in big data applications. Recent research has begun to focus on dynamic scenarios, i.e., non-stationary environments. However, a crucial yet often overlooked aspect is label latency, where new data may not receive labels in time due to the slow and expensive labeling process, thus hindering rapid adaptation to dynamic environments.
  To resolve this impasse, we propose Dual-Track Geometry Online Learning (DT-GOL), a novel framework that shifts from temporal compensation to spatial reasoning to bridge the supervised latency gap. By modeling the delay challenge as a semi-supervised task, we leverage real-time topological evolution of features as a reliable geometric surrogate for unobservable conceptual changes to achieve proactive supervised adaptation within the delay window. Unlike rigid self-training, we introduce a dynamic evidence calibration mechanism that distills geometric information into soft labels that perceive uncertainty, effectively mitigating the confirmation bias inherent in hard pseudo-labels. Furthermore, to resolve the stability-plasticity dilemma, we design a decoupled dual-track architecture in which a master learner serves as a stable anchor, updated strictly from delayed ground truth, while a transient branch leverages soft geometric knowledge for low-risk forward adaptation. Extensive experiments on real and synthetic datasets demonstrate that DT-GOL significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art baseline methods, especially in scenarios with concept drift.

</details>


### [672] [PG-MAP: Joint MAP Optimization for Inference-Time Alignment of Diffusion and Flow-Matching Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22958)
*Ruolan Sun,Pawel Polak*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出PG-MAP，一种无需训练的推理时对齐框架，通过对条件c和隐变量z_t进行联合Gibbs-MAP/近端能量优化，实现文本到图像模型在扩散和流匹配两种框架下的对齐改进，在多个指标上超越基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推理时对齐方法仅沿单一控制轴（如无分类器引导、注意力编辑或奖励基隐变量扰动）进行操作，无法建模条件与隐变量之间的联合依赖关系，且难以跨生成传输（如扩散vs流匹配）进行迁移。

Method: 提出PG-MAP框架，将推理时对齐形式化为轨迹级Gibbs-MAP/近端能量优化，通过前向一致性耦合联合更新条件c和隐状态z_t，并可选择性地由冻结的偏好奖励引导。框架可以适配扩散模型和流匹配模型，并支持与调优后的无分类器引导结合。

Result: 在扩散模型（SD 1.5, SDXL）上持续提升PickScore和Aesthetic等对齐指标；在流匹配模型（SD3.5-medium）上达到91.9% PickScore和75.7% HPS胜率。人类评估进一步确认了相对于强基线的优势。Oracle路由分析表明条件和隐变量优化的相对重要性取决于提示类型。

Conclusion: PG-MAP通过统一框架同时建模条件和隐变量的联合优化，有效提升了多种生成模型的推理时对齐效果，并揭示了按提示类型自适应选择优化路径的潜在提升空间。

Abstract: Inference-time alignment of pretrained text-to-image models is typically performed along a single control axis, such as classifier-free guidance, attention editing, or reward-based latent perturbations. This limitation prevents modeling joint dependencies between conditioning and latent variables and hinders transfer across generative transports. We propose PG-MAP, a training-free framework that formulates inference-time alignment as a trajectory-level Gibbs-MAP / proximal energy optimization over the conditioning $c$ and latent state $z_t$ via a forward-consistency coupling, optionally guided by a frozen preference reward. This joint formulation enables coordinated updates across modalities while remaining compatible with both diffusion and flow-matching models through transport-specific adaptations. Across diffusion backbones (SD~1.5, SDXL), PG-MAP consistently improves alignment metrics such as PickScore and Aesthetic, and can be effectively combined with tuned classifier-free guidance to achieve the strongest overall performance. On flow-matching models (SD3.5-medium), the framework reduces to a latent-only variant, achieving $\mathbf{91.9\%}$ PickScore and $75.7\%$ HPS win rates against a static baseline, with controlled experiments ruling out noise-related artifacts. Human evaluations further confirm consistent preference over strong baselines, including tuned CFG and compute-matched universal guidance. Finally, an oracle-routing analysis shows that the relative importance of conditioning and latent optimization depends on prompt types, surfacing further headroom that a per-prompt selector could exploit.

</details>


### [673] [Attacking the Trusted Imagination: Oracle-Level Integrity Attacks on Imagine-then-Act World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22966)
*Linghan Chen,Kaiyan Ji,Minyu Guo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现视觉-语言-行动(VLA)策略中的世界行动模型(WAM)存在一个安全漏洞：攻击者可以轻易破坏其"想象"的未来潜在轨迹z~，而不影响反应式策略本身。通过可微的观测到想象的映射进行投影梯度下降攻击，实现了约60倍于随机的非目标破坏效果。下游依赖该想象的系统（如视觉MPC）首次出现任务失败，而反应式策略保持鲁棒。提出了一种无参数的降噪检测器，AUC达到1.0。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA策略的安全性研究主要关注反应式策略的鲁棒性，但忽略了"先想象再行动"设计中，世界行动模型(WAM)生成的未来想象轨迹z~作为下游系统（安全门、视觉MPC、校验器）的输入，可能成为被攻击的更薄弱环节。这种不对称性尚未被充分研究。

Method: 采用基于能力的威胁模型，使用L-infinity有界观测扰动。通过全可微的观测到想象映射进行投影梯度下降(PGD)攻击。提出一种无参数的降噪检测器（利用离流形特性）。在RynnVLA-002、LingBot-VA和LaDi-WM三个模型上评估。

Result: 非目标破坏效果约为随机的60倍，检测器AUC达1.0；目标控制攻击效果有限；自适应攻击者若要逃避检测必须放弃破坏；反应式策略对破坏后的想象保持鲁棒；但原生想象驱动的MPC首次出现任务失败（epsilon=0.01时，成功率从0.70降至0.05，Fisher检验p<10^-4）。

Conclusion: WAM的想象模块是VLA系统中更脆弱的安全面，破坏容易而精确控制困难；反应式策略与想象驱动系统在安全性上解耦；离流形特性可用于有效检测攻击；需要专门针对想象模块的安全性设计。

Abstract: Many recent vision-language-action (VLA) policies adopt an imagine-then-act design. A world-action model (WAM) first imagines a short future as a latent trajectory z~, on which the action is then conditioned. We identify this trusted imagination, rather than the reactive policy, as the exposed attack surface. A downstream oracle, such as a safety gate, a visual model-predictive-control (MPC) planner, or an imagine-then-check verifier, consumes z~ as a prediction of the future. The robustness of the policy therefore does not entail the robustness of systems that rely on the WAM. The underlying phenomenon is an asymmetry. Corrupting the imagination is easy, since it requires only displacing z~ from its natural-future manifold. Steering it precisely is hard, since it must reach a specified on-manifold target. We adopt a capability-based threat model with an L-infinity-bounded observation perturbation. The attacker applies projected gradient descent through the fully differentiable observation-to-imagination map. The same off-manifold property motivates a parameter-free denoiser detector. We evaluate three targets: RynnVLA-002, LingBot-VA, and LaDi-WM. Untargeted corruption is roughly 60x stronger than random and is detected at AUC 1.0. Targeted control remains bounded. An adaptive attacker evades detection only by forgoing corruption. The reactive policy remains robust to corrupted imagination. A native imagination-driven MPC, however, exhibits the first adversary-specific task failure (at epsilon=0.01, success 0.70 versus 0.05; Fisher p < 10^-4).

</details>


### [674] [Topological Out-of-Domain Generalization in Dynamical Systems Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22969)
*Georg Trede,Charlotte Ricarda Doll,Elias Weber,Daniel Durstewitz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文分析了现有动力系统重建模型在跨域预测（如跨越临界点）时存在的根本局限性，识别出三项核心缺陷（模型结构假设与物理系统特性不匹配），并提出特征分裂等组合修复方案，实现了对新动力 regimes 的零样本准确预测，并推导出可靠外推范围的闭式界限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动力系统行为预测是科学ML中一个关键但未解决的核心问题——真正的科学理论应该能对未观测到的参数/动力 regimes 做出预测。现有分层和超网络方法虽能同时训练多个DS并提取底层控制参数，但跨临界点等真正域外预测能力仍然有限，通常需要微调或完全重新训练。

Method: (1) 数学分析先前模型局限性的根源，识别出三个核心缺陷（结构假设与物理系统特性不匹配）；(2) 提出组合修复方案，最重要的是特征分裂（feature splitting）；(3) 推导出可靠外推范围的闭式界限（closed-form bound）。

Result: 所提出的技术实现了对新动力 regimes 的准确零样本预测（zero-shot prediction），能够跨越训练观测 regimes 之外的临界点进行预测。

Conclusion: 通过识别并修复模型结构假设与物理系统特性之间的不匹配，特别是引入特征分裂，可以显著提升动力系统重建模型在跨临界点等域外场景下的零样本泛化能力，并给出了理论上的可靠外推范围界限。

Abstract: Predicting the behavior of dynamical systems (DS) beyond the dynamical and parameter regimes observed in training is a pivotal and essentially unresolved problem in scientific ML. It is central to any good scientific theory, which we expect to be able to make predictions about regimes not covered by currently available data. Recent hierarchical and hyper-network guided approaches for DS reconstruction (DSR) enable training on many DS simultaneously, and revealed that extracted latent features are often related to crucial control parameters of the underlying DS that varied across the training corpus. However, true out-of-domain forecasting abilities of these models, e.g., across tipping points, remain limited, and fine-tuning, or even full model retraining, on time series from the new dynamical regime is usually required. Here, we mathematically analyze the root of these limitations in previous model formulations and identify three core shortcomings rooted in a mismatch between structural assumptions of the reconstruction model and typical properties of physical systems. We propose a combination of remedies for these shortcomings, most importantly feature splitting, and furthermore derive a closed-form bound on the reliable extrapolation range. We demonstrate empirically that our techniques allow for accurate zero-shot prediction into new dynamical regimes, outside the observed training regime, as, e.g., encountered across tipping points.

</details>


### [675] [TaLK: Text-attributed Graph Dataset Distillation via Coupling Language Model with Graph-Aware Kernel](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22975)
*Yeongho Kim,Yeonje Choi,Kijung Shin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TaLK是一种针对文本属性图的高效数据集蒸馏方法，通过结合语言模型和图感知神经正切核，在仅用1%合成数据时达到97%的全数据集性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有TAG学习方法需联合训练LM和GNN，计算成本高、难以扩展；已有数据集蒸馏方法不适用于多模态的TAG，且仍需要反复在完整数据集上训练昂贵的LM-GNN模型。

Method: 提出TaLK方法，将LM与图感知神经正切核（graph-aware neural tangent kernel）耦合，实现高效的数据集蒸馏，避免在完整数据集上重复联合训练，同时保留文本和结构信息。

Result: 在多个TAG基准上，TaLK持续优于现有基线方法，仅用1%合成数据即可达到97%的全数据集性能。

Conclusion: TaLK有效解决了TAG数据集蒸馏的挑战，兼顾了文本语义和图结构信息，显著降低了训练成本。

Abstract: Text-attributed graphs (TAGs) are widely used in many real-world domains, and learning on TAGs requires jointly modeling text semantics and graph structure. A standard approach for modeling TAGs is to combine a language model (LM) and a graph neural network (GNN), but joint training is computationally expensive and difficult to scale. Dataset distillation is a promising way to reduce training costs, but existing methods are not well suited to TAGs because they are typically designed for a single modality or still require repeatedly training expensive LM-GNN models on the full dataset during distillation. To address this, we propose TaLK, an effective dataset distillation method for TAGs that couples an LM with a graph-aware neural tangent kernel.This design enables efficient dataset distillation, avoiding repeated joint training on the full dataset while reflecting both textual and structural information for effective TAG learning.Experiments on multiple TAG benchmarks show that TaLK consistently outperforms existing baselines and achieves up to 97% of full-dataset performance with only 1% synthetic data.

</details>


### [676] [Neural Architecture Search of Sample Reweighting Networks for Complex Distribution Shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22991)
*Keisuke Sugawara,Kento Uchida,Shinichi Shirakawa*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究针对MW-Net在同时存在标签噪声和类别不平衡时性能下降的问题，引入神经架构搜索（NAS）来自动优化权重网络的隐藏层结构，并选择分类模型中合适的中层特征作为输入，从而提升了在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MW-Net在单一分布偏移（如仅标签噪声或仅类别不平衡）下表现良好，但在两者同时存在时难以仅靠分类损失和简单网络确定合适的样本权重，导致性能下降。

Method: 采用树结构Parzen估计器（TPE）进行神经架构搜索，探索MW-Net的最优隐藏层数量和节点数，同时选择分类模型中最适合的中间层作为MW-Net的输入。

Result: 在同时包含标签噪声和类别不平衡的CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100数据集上，NAS增强的MW-Net相比原始MW-Net取得了更好的性能。

Conclusion: 神经架构搜索能够有效提升MW-Net在复合分布偏移场景下的样本重加权能力，证明了自动化架构设计对于复杂噪声环境的适应性价值。

Abstract: Sample reweighting is a major approach to addressing distribution shifts, such as label noise and class imbalance. Meta-Weight-Net (MW-Net) is a promising sample reweighting network that computes weights based on classification loss. Although MW-Net improves prediction performance under a single type of distribution shift using a simple neural network, its performance degrades when facing both label noise and class imbalance, where it is hard to determine appropriate weights solely from classification loss and using a simple network. In this study, we introduce neural architecture search to MW-Net to mitigate such performance degradation. Using the tree-structured Parzen estimator, we explore the optimal number of hidden layers and nodes and select the most suitable intermediate layer in the classification model to serve as the input for MW-Net. Experimental results on the CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 datasets that were modified to include both label noise and class imbalance demonstrate the effectiveness of neural architecture search for MW-Net.

</details>


### [677] [Do Sparse Autoencoders Learn Meaningful Concept Hierarchies?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22994)
*Nils Grandien,David Steinmann,Felix Friedrich,Kristian Kersting*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对稀疏自编码器（SAE）中层级结构缺乏统一评估标准的问题，从语义网络和分类学研究中推导出泛化/特化层级的关键需求，并设计了一套定量评估协议。在视觉数据上的实验表明，现有SAE特征空间虽可作为层级基础，但构建良好层级结构仍具挑战，尤其是特征吸收（包括硬吸收和连续软吸收）会系统性地损害层级质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SAE方法虽开始引入层级结构，但缺乏统一的评估标准和定量协议，评估多依赖定性展示和零散指标，难以进行严格比较。

Method: 从语义网络和分类学研究中推导出泛化/特化层级的关键需求，设计了一套具体的定量评估协议，并在视觉数据上对当前SAE方法进行系统评估。

Result: 特征空间通常能为合理层级提供基础，但建立良好层级结构仍困难；特征吸收（硬吸收和连续软吸收）会系统性地破坏层级质量。

Conclusion: 揭示了特征吸收与层级质量之间的根本矛盾，为未来SAE层级结构的构建指明了需要解决的核心问题。

Abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have become an important tool for unsupervised concept discovery in large models. To make the resulting feature spaces more interpretable and manageable, recent approaches have begun imposing hierarchical structure, either explicitly or as an implicit effect of training constraints, yet rigorous comparison remains difficult. There are no agreed-upon requirements for what a meaningful feature hierarchy should satisfy, and evaluation has largely relied on qualitative illustrations with fragmented quantitative protocols. To address this, we derive a set of key requirements for generalization/specialization hierarchies in unsupervised concept discovery, drawing on semantic net and taxonomy research alongside recent SAE work, and use them to derive a concrete evaluation protocol. Applying this protocol to current SAE approaches trained on visual data, we find that while feature spaces generally provide a basis for sensible hierarchies, establishing good hierarchical structure remains challenging. In particular, feature absorption, both in its well-known hard form and in a continuous, soft form, systematically compromises hierarchy quality, pointing to a fundamental tension that future approaches will need to navigate.

</details>


### [678] [A Novel Approach to Temporal QoS Estimation via Extended Kalman Filter-Incorporated Latent Feature Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23010)
*Ye Yuan,Song Wang,Hongxun Zhou,Ling Wang,Xin Luo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种扩展卡尔曼滤波增强的潜在特征分析（EKL）模型，通过双向模型-数据驱动学习实现高效准确的时序QoS预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有纯数据驱动的主流方法在预测时序QoS时难以捕捉非平稳时序模式，导致数据波动时预测精度下降。

Method: 提出EKL模型，包含三部分：1）基于扩展卡尔曼滤波的模型驱动特征生成器捕捉时序模式；2）基于交替最小二乘的数据驱动特征生成器识别时不变潜在特征；3）基于密度导向的并行策略实现负载均衡提升计算效率。

Result: 在真实时序QoS数据集上，EKL在计算效率和预测精度方面均优于现有最先进模型。

Conclusion: EKL通过双向模型-数据驱动学习有效解决了纯数据驱动方法在非平稳时序QoS预测中的局限性，兼具理论收敛性证明和实际性能优势。

Abstract: Predicting temporal Quality of Service (QoS) data is critical for optimizing network services and rationalizing resource allocation in cloud computing and service-oriented systems. Existing mainstream methods have achieved promising predictive performance. However, their purely data-driven manner limits their ability to capture non-stationary temporal patterns, thereby leading to accuracy degradation when temporal QoS data exhibits fluctuations. To tackle this limitation, we propose a novel Extended Kalman Filter-Enhanced Latent Feature Analysis (EKL) model to perform efficient and accurate temporal QoS prediction from the perspective of bidirectional model-data-driven learning. Its main idea is three-fold: a) designing a model-driven feature producer to obtain the temporal latent features to capture the intricate temporal pattern following the principle of an Extended Kalman Filter; b) building a data-driven feature producer based on the alternating least squares algorithm to identify time-invariant latent features describing intrinsic user-service characteristics; c) exploiting a density-oriented parallel strategy that achieves workload balancing by sorting users in accordance with their service invocation density, which effectively elevates computational efficiency. In addition, we provide a rigorous theoretical analysis to formally prove the convergence of the proposed EKL. Experimental evaluations conducted on real-world temporal QoS datasets reveal that our proposed EKL surpasses existing state-of-the-art models with respect to both computational efficiency and prediction accuracy for missing temporal QoS data.

</details>


### [679] [Counterfactual learning of new adaptive instructional policies using logged data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23015)
*Samuel Girard,Sein Minn,Amel Bouzeghoub,Jill-Jênn Vie*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个离线上下文赌博机框架，利用Rasch模型将学生-题目交互映射到连续潜在能力-难度空间，仅从历史交互日志中学习自适应教学策略，优化“心流”状态，并在四个真实数据集上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 智能辅导系统（ITS）中优化教学策略通常需要昂贵的在线实验或可能无法捕捉真实动态的学生模拟器，因此需要一种仅从历史日志数据中学习新策略的方法，避免额外数据收集成本。

Method: 采用离线上下文赌博机框架，使用Rasch模型将学生能力与题目难度映射到连续潜在空间，将辅导过程建模为连续随机赌博机问题；设计以“心流”优化为目标的新奖励函数（平衡挑战与成功）；提出回合特定的行为策略估计，同时作为倾向性模型和诊断工具。

Result: 在四个大规模真实数据集上，该方法一致优于历史行为策略；策略学习与可视化可在数秒内完成。

Conclusion: 有效的教学策略可以从离线日志中快速学习并可视化，为改进自适应学习系统提供了可扩展的路径，无需额外数据收集。

Abstract: Optimizing instructional policies in Intelligent Tutoring Systems (ITS) typically requires costly online experimentation or student simulators that may fail to capture real-world dynamics. This paper introduces an offline contextual bandit framework that learns new adaptive policies directly from logged interaction data. By mapping student-item interactions onto a continuous latent proficiency-difficulty scale using a Rasch model, we cast the tutoring process as a continuous stochastic bandit problem. We propose a novel reward function designed to optimize ''flow'' by balancing task challenge with student success. Our approach includes a round-specific behavior policy estimation that serves as both a propensity model for off-policy evaluation and a diagnostic tool for ITS adaptivity. We demonstrate the efficacy of this framework across four large-scale real-world datasets, achieving consistent policy improvements over the logged behavior policy. The results show that effective instructional policies can be learned and visualized within seconds of computation, providing a scalable path for improving adaptive learning systems without further data collection.

</details>


### [680] [EvoRubrics: Dynamic Rubrics as Rewards via Adversarial Co-Evolution for LLM Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23038)
*Hongxin Ding,Baixiang Huang,Yue Fang,Weibin Liao,Zheng Li,Jinyang Zhang,Zhijing Wu,Junfeng Zhao,Yasha Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EvoRubrics提出了一种共演化强化学习框架，其中策略LLM和评估生成器在每步训练中相互对抗、共同进化，从而解决静态评估标准与动态策略间的失配问题，实现自动课程学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于评估的奖励信号虽然可解释且细粒度，但静态评估标准随模型能力提升逐渐失效，导致奖励饱和与漏洞利用。现有动态方法依赖外部模型或标准答案，且更新粒度粗糙。

Method: 提出EvoRubrics框架，包含策略LLM和评估生成器两个角色，通过对抗性互动在每一步训练中共同进化：策略在评估指导下改进，评估则自适应调整标准以保持判别力，形成自动课程学习。

Result: 在多个基准上一致优于静态和动态评估基线；学到的评估生成器可作为可迁移的奖励模型；即使完全自监督（无外部监督）的变体也能获得有意义的性能提升。

Conclusion: 生成与评估之间的共演化本身就能提供足够丰富的学习信号，验证了无外部监督下自我博弈式学习的有效性。

Abstract: Rubric-based rewards offer interpretable and fine-grained optimization signals for reinforcement learning in open-ended tasks where verifiable answers are unavailable. However, pre-constructed rubrics remain static throughout training, creating a fundamental mismatch with the evolving policy: fixed criteria gradually lose discriminative power as the model improves, leading to reward saturation and potential hacking. Recent dynamic rubric methods partially address this but rely on external frontier models or ground-truth answers, and update rubrics only at coarse granularity. We propose EvoRubrics, a co-evolutionary RL framework where a Policy LLM and a Rubric Generator jointly improve through adversarial interaction within each training step. As the policy improves under the rubric generator's guidance, the rubric generator adapts its criteria to remain discriminative and informative, enabling evaluation to track the policy in real time and naturally inducing an automatic curriculum. Experiments show that EvoRubrics consistently outperforms static and dynamic rubric baselines across benchmarks. The learned Rubric Generator further generalizes as a transferable reward model. Notably, even a fully self-supervised variant without any external supervision achieves meaningful gains, suggesting that co-evolution between generation and evaluation alone can provide sufficiently rich learning signals. Our code is publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/EvoRubrics-2155/.

</details>


### [681] [Prime Fourier Embeddings: A Principled Basis for Modular Arithmetic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23044)
*Hyunsang Hwang,Suhyun Bae,Donghun Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Prime Fourier Embeddings (PFE)，通过数论傅里叶分析为整数编码预构建代数结构，使得模运算任务中线性模型自动按素数通道分解，并基于中国剩余定理实现通道专业化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准神经嵌入难以捕捉数字的代数结构（如模运算），需要从零学习，效率低下且缺乏理论保证。

Method: 利用素数索引的(cos, sin)对构建PFE嵌入，基于Q上的调和分析；通过Schur引理证明任何等变线性映射必然是每个素数独立的分块对角矩阵。

Result: 任务相关通道与无关通道的专业化比率超过500倍；在无平方复合模数上达到完美的分布内测试准确率。

Conclusion: PFE为模运算提供了理论上最优的预结构化表征，中国剩余定理可准确预测哪些素数通道与任务相关，实现了高效的代数推理。

Abstract: Numbers have algebraic structure that standard neural embeddings often fail to expose. We introduce Prime Fourier Embeddings (PFE), which encode integers as prime-indexed (cos, sin) pairs derived from the harmonic analysis of Q, providing a pre-structured representation in which modular arithmetic reduces to selecting the relevant prime channel rather than discovering algebraic structure from scratch. We prove that any linear map equivariant with respect to the product group action on PFE must be block-diagonal with one independent block per prime -- a consequence of Schur's lemma applied to the resulting character decomposition. For square-free composite moduli, the Chinese Remainder Theorem predicts which prime channels are task-relevant. Both predictions are confirmed empirically: ablation studies show specialization ratios exceeding 500x between task-relevant and task-irrelevant channels, with perfect in-distribution test accuracy across all square-free composite moduli tested.

</details>


### [682] [PeLAP-A: Adaptive Latent Pruning for Lightweight Latent Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23086)
*Kissa Zahra,Zaib Un Nisa*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出PeLAP-A框架，通过学习通道重要性掩码来剪枝潜在扩散模型中的冗余通道，发现即使所有通道被压制到接近零，去噪UNet仍能取得更好性能（"稀疏性崩溃"现象）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究潜在扩散模型中各潜在通道是否均等贡献于扩散过程，以及是否存在显著冗余。

Method: 在标准潜在扩散流水线中引入一个可学习的通道级重要性预测器（两层MLP），对全局池化后的潜在特征生成软掩码，抑制不重要的潜在通道；联合训练扩散损失、重建损失和稀疏性损失。

Result: 在CIFAR-10上，强稀疏正则化（λ=0.01）下，重要性预测器将所有通道驱动至接近零，但去噪UNet的扩散损失更低（0.0236 vs 0.0240），VAE重建MSE也更低（22.59 vs 24.67）。

Conclusion: 发现了"稀疏性崩溃"现象，揭示了潜在扩散模型的信息需求存在显著冗余，去噪UNet对潜在通道抑制具有惊人的鲁棒性。

Abstract: Latent diffusion models achieve strong generative performance by operating in a compressed latent space produced by a variational autoencoder (VAE). However, it remains unclear whether all latent channels contribute equally to the diffusion process, or whether significant redundancy exists. We introduce PeLAP-A (Adaptive Latent Pruning for Diffusion), a lightweight framework that augments a standard latent diffusion pipeline with a learnable channel-wise importance predictor. A two-layer MLP operating on globally pooled latent features produces a soft mask that suppresses unimportant latent channels before they enter the denoising UNet. The entire system is trained jointly on CIFAR-10 under a combined diffusion, reconstruction, and sparsity loss. Experiments reveal a striking result: under aggressive sparsity regularization (lambda = 0.01), the importance predictor drives all latent channels to near-zero yet the denoising UNet achieves lower diffusion loss (0.0236 vs. 0.0240) and lower VAE reconstruction MSE (22.59 vs. 24.67) compared to the unpruned baseline. We term this the sparsity collapse phenomenon and provide an analysis of why it occurs and what it reveals about the information requirements of latent diffusion models. These findings constitute an exploratory study of sparsity dynamics in latent diffusion training, and demonstrate that denoising UNets can remain remarkably robust to latent channel suppression even under aggressive regularization. Code is available at: https://github.com/kissasium/PeLAP-A.git.

</details>


### [683] [FlowTrain: Flow-Based Decoupled Training for Industrial-Grade Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23087)
*Zhida Jiang,Zhaolong Xing,Yang Pei,Xiaolong Chen,Yuanhang Xiao,Chengzhi Huang,Xiyu Liu,Haopeng Liu,Qingyuan Sang,Lingfeng Zhou,Jiaxing Wang,Zicheng Zhang,Wenzhe Wang,Xinyu Liu,Yan Li,Zhen Chen,Ke Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FlowTrain提出了一种基于数据流的解耦训练框架，将VLM训练重构为生产者-消费者数据流模型，通过统一内存池协调编码器和主干网络的独立执行，并引入异构并行分配器和动态打包调度器，实现了超过50%的MFU和最高1.7倍的吞吐量提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业级VLM分布式训练的效率远低于单模态LLM，现有方案（ monolithic设计或分离部署）仍不够高效，VLM训练可以进一步解耦。

Method: 提出FlowTrain框架：1) 基于生产者-消费者数据流的解耦训练，通过统一内存池协调编码器和主干网络的独立执行；2) 异构并行分配器，通过求解吞吐量匹配问题分配模块特定的并行策略；3) 动态打包调度器，根据实际LLM端计算成本动态构建平衡的微批次。

Result: 在真实工作负载上，FlowTrain实现了超过50%的MFU和最高1.7倍的吞吐量提升，缩小了与纯LLM训练的效率差距。

Conclusion: FlowTrain通过流式解耦设计有效提升了VLM分布式训练效率，证明了VLM训练可以进一步解耦以实现更高的并行效率。

Abstract: Industrial-grade distributed training of vision-language models (VLMs) remains far less efficient than that of unimodal LLMs. Existing solutions either follow a monolithic design that assigns uniform parallelism to heterogeneous modules or adopt a disaggregated deployment that separates modules while executing them as a batch-synchronized pipeline. In this paper, we highlight that the above solutions are still not sufficient, and VLM training can be further decoupled. To this end, we present FlowTrain, a flow-based decoupled training framework that reformulates VLM training as a producer-consumer dataflow coordinated through a unified memory pool. The encoder and backbone can progress independently over a global virtual address space. Since this execution decoupling fundamentally changes the optimization objective of allocation and scheduling, FlowTrain further introduces a heterogeneous parallel allocator that assigns module-specific parallelism strategies by solving a throughput matching problem. The dynamic packing scheduler is used to construct balanced microbatches at runtime according to the actual LLM-side computation cost. Extensive experiments on real-world workloads show that FlowTrain achieves over 50% MFU and up to 1.7x throughput improvement, narrowing the efficiency gap to LLM-only training.

</details>


### [684] [FLFL: Federated Latent Factor Learning for Private Recovery of Spatio-Temporal Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23091)
*Chengjun Yu,Di Wu,Yi He,Jia Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种联邦潜在因子学习（FLFL）模型，用于在保护数据隐私的前提下，对无线传感器网络中缺失的时空信号进行高精度恢复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有潜在因子学习（LFL）模型需要将传感器采集的信号集中存储在中央服务器，这在数据隐私日益敏感的背景下变得不可接受。

Method: 提出FLFL模型：1）基于LFL设计传感器级联邦学习框架，传感器仅上传梯度信息而非原始数据；2）将时空相关性作为正则化约束融入联邦学习框架，提高恢复精度。

Result: 在四个真实WSN数据集上的实验表明，FLFL在恢复精度和隐私保护方面显著优于八种最新的联邦及非联邦信号恢复模型。

Conclusion: FLFL能够在不泄露原始数据的前提下，准确恢复WSN中的缺失数据，有效兼顾了恢复性能与隐私保护需求。

Abstract: Wireless sensor network (WSNs) stands out as a burgeoning and promising domain in intelligent sensing. Owing to various factors such as sudden sensor malfunctions or deliberate shutdown of partial nodes to save energy, the collected sensing signals from WSNs commonly have massive missing data, leading to adverse effects on subsequent analysis or decision-making. Latent factor learning (LFL) has proven to be highly effective in recovering the missing data for WSNs. However, the existing LFL models require the collected sensing signals to be maintained in one central place like a central server, which is becoming unacceptable for data owners who are getting increasingly privacy-sensitive. To address this issue, this paper innovatively proposes a federated latent factor learning (FLFL) model for privacy-preserving spatio-temporal signal recovery. Its main idea is two-fold: 1) it designs a sensor-level federated learning framework based on LFL, where each sensor only needs to upload gradient information rather than raw data for training a privacy-preserving recovery model, and 2) it incorporates the spatio-temporal correlation into the designed federated learning framework as the regularization constraint to improve its recovery accuracy. With such designs, FLFL can not only accurately recover the missing data of WSNs but also ensure data owners' privacy-preserving of raw data. To evaluate the proposed FLFL model, extensive experiments have been conducted on four real-world WSN datasets. The results demonstrate that FLFL significantly outperforms eight state-of-the-art federated and non-federated signal recovery models in terms of recovery accuracy with privacy-preserving.

</details>


### [685] [Minimax Quantile Lower Bounds for Interactive Statistical Decision Making with Privacy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23096)
*Raghav Bongole,Amirreza Zamani,Tobias J. Oechtering,Mikael Skoglund*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对交互式统计决策问题，发展了一套δ-显式极小值分位数理论，弥补了传统极小值风险准则无法刻画罕见但严重后果的不足。通过建立分位数与风险之间的结构关系，推导了高概率交互式Fano方法与Le Cam方法，并扩展到含互信息隐私约束的场景。对高斯均值估计、双臂及K臂高斯bandit问题，给出了在置信水平δ和隐私预算下显式的下界结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统极小值风险（minimax risk）与遗憾（regret）是基于期望的准则，无法刻画罕见但后果严重的失败场景。为了弥补这一不足，本文旨在发展一种基于分位数的理论框架，以更好地评估交互式统计决策中的尾部风险。

Method: 1. 建立了极小值分位数、下极小值分位数与极小值风险之间的结构关系，包括分位数到期望的转换以及两者在可数置信水平集外的等价性。2. 推导了两种高概率反演工具：交互式Fano方法和交互式Le Cam方法。3. 通过限制可接受决策类，将互信息隐私纳入同一框架。4. 针对坐标高斯私有化，提出了一个两点模板来分离隐私引起的方差膨胀。

Result: 给出了显式下界结果：高斯均值估计的平方误差为log(1/δ)/n尺度；双臂有界均值高斯bandit为√(T log(1/δ))尺度；K臂bandit为√(KT log(1/δ))尺度。隐私问题中，隐私通过高斯方差膨胀因子体现。

Conclusion: 本文提出的极小值分位数理论能够有效刻画交互式统计决策中的尾部风险，并自然兼容隐私约束，为高概率统计学习与决策提供了理论工具。

Abstract: Minimax risk and regret are expectation-based criteria and do not capture rare but consequential failures. To address this concern, we develop a $δ$-explicit minimax-quantile theory for interactive statistical decision making (ISDM). We first provide structural relations between minimax quantiles, lower minimax quantiles, and minimax risk. This includes a quantile-to-expectation conversion and an equivalence between strict and lower minimax quantiles outside a countable set of confidence levels. We then derive two converse tools for ISDM: a high-probability interactive Fano's method and a high-probability interactive Le Cam's method. Then, we show that mutual-information (MI) privacy can be handled in the same framework by restricting the admissible decision class. For coordinatewise Gaussian privatization, we derive a two-point template that isolates the privacy-induced variance inflation. We instantiate this template for Gaussian mean estimation, and use the same two-point strategy directly for two-armed Gaussian bandits. We then derive a minimax quantile lower bound for the $K$-armed Gaussian bandit problem, showing that the interactive Fano method captures the exploration cost over multiple possible best arms. The resulting lower bounds are explicit in the confidence level $δ$ and in the privacy budget for the private problems. They yield $\log(1/δ)/n$ scaling for squared-error Gaussian mean estimation, $\sqrt{T\log(1/δ)}$ scaling for two-armed bounded-mean Gaussian bandits, and $\sqrt{KT\log(1/δ)}$-type scaling for the $K$-armed bandits, with privacy appearing through a Gaussian variance-inflation factor for the private problems.

</details>


### [686] [ReNIO: Reweighting Negative Trajectory Importance for LLM On-Policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23104)
*Chen Lin,Kedi Chen,Wei Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出ReNIO方法，通过学生-教师概率比识别错误推理轨迹中的关键token并赋予更高权重，在不依赖最终答案正确性的情况下改进同策略蒸馏，在数学推理和代码生成任务上取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准同策略蒸馏（OPD）平等对待所有学生生成输出（SGO），但实验发现仅用错误SGO训练优于仅用正确SGO，表明不同SGO的信息量存在不对称性。作者希望利用这一信号，在不需完整答案rollout的情况下提升蒸馏效果。

Method: 提出ReNIO框架：通过学生到教师的概率比（student-to-teacher probability ratio）识别导致错误推理轨迹的关键token（pivotal tokens），将这些token的信息聚合为归一化的样本权重，天然赋予可能的错误轨迹更大权重，且无需观察最终答案正确性。该方法保留了前缀训练优势。

Result: 在数学推理（Qwen3-1.7B提升8.90%，R1-Distill-Qwen-7B提升10.00%）和代码生成任务上，ReNIO显著改进了OPD和OPSD性能。

Conclusion: ReNIO通过重加权负轨迹重要性，有效利用错误推理轨迹中的探索性信号，在不依赖答案正确性的情况下提升LLM推理能力，是一种实用且高效的蒸馏增强方法。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) improves LLM reasoning by training a student model on its own generated outputs, but standard OPD treats all student-generated outputs (SGOs) equally regardless of their informativeness. We observe a consistent asymmetry in controlled filtering experiments: in both OPD and on-policy self distillation (OPSD), training only on incorrect SGOs outperforms training only on correct ones. Our further analysis suggests that models trained on correct-only SGOs tend to generate shorter reasoning traces and show weaker reflection behavior, while incorrect SGOs better preserve exploratory reasoning near the model's capability boundary. To exploit this signal without requiring full answer-containing rollouts, we introduce ReNIO, which Reweights Negative trajectory Importance for LLM On-policy distillation. By using the student-to-teacher probability ratio, ReNIO identifies pivotal tokens leading to wrong reasoning traces and aggregates their information into a normalized sample weight, inherently assigning larger weights to likely negative trajectories without observing the correctness of final-answer. Since Re-NIO only uses prefix-conditioned token probabilities, it preserves OPD's prefix training advantage over full-rollout reinforcement learning. Across both mathematical reasoning and code generation tasks, ReNIO improves both OPD and OPSD, with representative relative gains of up to 8.90% for Qwen3-1.7B and 10.00% for R1-Distill-Qwen-7B on mathematical reasoning benchmarks. Code repo: https://github.com/BDML-lab/ReNIO.

</details>


### [687] [Temporal-Spectral Alignment with Frequency Adaptation for Source-Free Time-Series Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23120)
*Shichang Meng,Linquan Wu,Xuan Ai,Linqi Song*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SAFA提出了一种面向时间序列的无源域自适应方法，通过频率自适应模块调节目标信号的相位和幅度，实现时频对齐，解决特征漂移和时间漂移问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无源域自适应方法主要关注时间动态特性，但忽略了时间序列数据中的频谱偏移问题，即源域和目标域在频域上的分布差异。

Method: 1) 多尺度建模源域，同时捕捉时间依赖和频谱特征；2) 引入可训练的频率自适应模块，在频域中调节目标信号的相位和幅度，使其与源分布对齐。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，SAFA方法有效且鲁棒。

Conclusion: SAFA通过时频对齐策略，有效解决了时间序列无源域自适应中的频谱偏移问题，提升了跨域迁移性能。

Abstract: The goal of source-free domain adaptation (SFDA) for time-series data is to transfer knowledge from a pre-trained source model to an unlabeled target domain without requiring access to source data, while addressing feature shift and temporal drift inherent in the signals. Although existing approaches have explored temporal dynamics in unsupervised source-free adaptation, they largely overlook spectral shifts in time-series data. Towards this end, we propose a novel approach termed temporal-Spectral Alignment with Frequency Adaptation (SAFA) for source-free time-series domain adaptation. Specifically, we first model the source domain at multiple scales by jointly capturing temporal dependencies and spectral characteristics. To adapt time-series data in the target domain, we introduce a trainable frequency adaptation module that modulates the phase and amplitude of target signals in the frequency domain to align them with the source distribution. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate the efficacy and robustness of SAFA.

</details>


### [688] [The Fractal Neural Operator: Overcoming Spectral Bias in Chaotic Attractors via Prime-Harmonic Weierstrass Encodings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23123)
*Kanishk Awadhiya*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Fractal Neural Operator (FNO)，利用非共振素数基和Harmonic Weierstrass编码器为混沌动力系统注入无限频谱分辨率，在Lorenz-63系统上实现347个Lyapunov时间的预测，超过基线2.3倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习模型（Transformer、Neural Operator）存在"谱偏差"，表现为低通滤波器特性，会平滑掉高频信息。这对混沌动力系统是灾难性的，因为其奇怪吸引子具有分形几何和无限谱密度，传统方法无法有效捕捉。

Method: 提出Fractal Neural Operator (FNO)，核心创新是Harmonic Weierstrass编码器，利用非共振素数基（而非传统的2^k几何编码）来近似连续动力系统，注入无限频谱分辨率到潜在空间，避免谱间隙和共振问题。

Result: 在Lorenz-63混沌系统上，FNO将有效预测时域扩展到347个Lyapunov时间，比当前最优的Reservoir Computing基线提升2.3倍。

Conclusion: "混沌"并非神经网络本质上不可预测，而是需要非可微、分形嵌入流形来应对。FNO证明了通过恰当的频谱编码策略，深度学习可以显著超越传统方法在混沌系统预测上的能力。

Abstract: Deep learning models, particularly Transformers and Neural Operators, exhibit a well-documented "spectral bias," effectively acting as low-pass filters that smooth out high-frequency information. While benign in fluid dynamics, this bias is catastrophic for Chaotic Dynamical Systems, where the underlying strange attractor is characterized by fractal geometry and infinite spectral density. We introduce the Fractal Neural Operator (FNO), a novel architecture that utilizes a non-resonant prime number basis to approximate continuous dynamical systems. Unlike geometric encodings ($2^k$), which suffer from spectral gaps and resonance, our Harmonic Weierstrass Encoder injects infinite spectral resolution into the latent space. We demonstrate that FNO extends the valid prediction horizon of the Lorenz-63 system to 347 Lyapunov times, exceeding state-of-the-art Reservoir Computing baselines by a factor of 2.3x. These results suggest that "chaos" is not inherently unpredictable to neural networks, but rather requires non-differentiable, fractal embedding manifolds.

</details>


### [689] [Weighted Score-Oriented Losses for Temporally Localized Event Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23145)
*Edoardo Legnaro,Sabrina Guastavino,Francesco Marchetti*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种时间局域化的加权评分导向损失函数(wSOL)，用于事件预测和检测任务。该损失函数通过引入时间权重来区分不同时间位置预测的重要性，能够直接优化基于事件的评估指标（如F1、关键成功指数等），且可微可反向传播。在三个基准数据集上的实验表明，wSOL在评估效用具有时间局部性时优于交叉熵和未加权评分导向损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有事件检测系统的训练目标（如交叉熵）与评估指标（基于事件窗口和误报成本的指标）之间存在严重不匹配。神经网络训练时使用逐点准确率损失，但部署评估时使用基于事件的指标，这种评分-损失不匹配导致模型优化方向与最终评价目标不一致。

Method: 基于Marchetti等人的加权评分导向损失框架，提出时间局域化wSOL。通过引入时间权重，对事件附近的误报进行折扣，并对有可接受警报在先的漏报降低惩罚。该损失基于期望混淆矩阵，可实例化为平衡准确率、真实技能统计量、F1、关键成功指数等评分函数，且保持可微性以支持反向传播优化。

Result: 在三个时间序列事件预测/检测基准数据集上，将wSOL与交叉熵、未加权评分导向损失进行对比。实验表明，当评估效用具有时间局部性且未被逐点标签编码时，wSOL能显著提升性能。

Conclusion: wSOL通过弥合训练损失与评估指标之间的鸿沟，有效提升了事件检测系统在实际部署中的表现。其核心价值在于将时间局部性的先验知识融入损失函数设计，实现了从逐点优化到事件级优化的转变。

Abstract: Operational event-detection systems are rarely assessed by pointwise accuracy alone. In anomaly detection, changepoint detection, and warning systems, the utility of an alarm depends on its temporal position relative to an event. This produces a score-loss mismatch. Neural networks are commonly trained with classical loss functions, such as cross-entropy, whereas deployment decisions are obtained by thresholding network predictions, merging alarms through post-processing rules, and evaluating them with event-based metrics defined by detection windows and false-alarm costs. This paper studies a temporally localized specialization of weighted score-oriented loss (wSOL) for event prediction. Starting from score-oriented losses based on expected confusion matrices and from the weighted SOL framework of Marchetti et al., we consider temporal weights that discount near-event false positives and reduce false-negative penalties when an event is preceded by an admissible alarm. The resulting objective is differentiable with respect to the network predictions, and therefore can be optimized by back-propagation. It can be instantiated with balanced accuracy, true skill statistic, F1, critical success index, and related confusion-matrix scores. We evaluate the proposed approach by comparing cross-entropy, unweighted score-oriented loss, and wSOL on three benchmark datasets for time-series event prediction and detection. The results show that wSOL can improve performance when the evaluation utility is localized in time and is not already encoded by the pointwise labels.

</details>


### [690] [Substitution-Based Analysis of Structural Novelty for Generative Models of Materials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23166)
*Masahiro Negishi,Aron Walsh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文评估了当前生成式AI模型在无机晶体设计中的局限性，发现81-92%的生成晶体要么是训练数据中的重复结构，要么可以通过元素替换获得，尤其在高中称性晶体系统中表现明显。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管生成式AI在无机晶体设计中取得了快速进展，但尚不清楚这些模型是否真正扩展了材料搜索空间，还是仅仅复现了已知结构。作者希望区分AI生成晶体中的真正创新与简单复现。

Method: 开发了一套工作流，将AI生成的晶体分类为：训练集重复、可通过元素替换获得、或两者皆不符合。应用于多个代表性生成模型，并分析结构指纹特征。

Result: 81-92%的化学有效且亚稳态的生成晶体属于训练重复或元素替换结构；高中称性系统中此倾向尤为强烈；低称性非重复/非替换结构可解释为训练密集区域的插值，而高中称性重复结构则是训练稀疏区域的记忆化。

Conclusion: 当前生成式AI模型在高中称性区域偏向已知结构原型，限制了真正的创新发现；但在低称性结构空间中仍具备一定的探索能力。

Abstract: There has been rapid progress in generative artificial intelligence (AI) models for inorganic crystal design, which can efficiently generate large numbers of candidate compounds after being trained on databases of known crystals. However, it remains unclear whether they genuinely expand the accessible materials search space beyond conventional strategies such as elemental substitution within known structure types. We address this question by developing a workflow to assess whether AI-generated crystals are duplicates of training structures, reproducible by elemental substitution, or unmatched by either criterion. Applying this workflow to representative generative models reveals that 81-92% of chemically valid and metastable generated crystals are either training duplicates or substitution-derived structures. This tendency is particularly strong in high-symmetry crystal systems, even though many possible structural prototypes remain unexplored. Further analysis of the underlying structural fingerprints shows that low-symmetry structures beyond duplication or substitution can be interpreted as interpolation in training-data-rich regions, while high-symmetry duplicates appear to result from memorisation in training-sparse regions. Our findings highlight a limitation in the current generation of models that exhibit a bias towards known structural prototypes in the high symmetry regions, but enable wider exploration of the low-symmetry structural space.

</details>


### [691] [Position: Correct Answer, Wrong Mechanism -- When AI Scientists Defend General Claims Their Own Data Contradicts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23175)
*Steven Young Eulig*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文论证在AI科学家系统评估中，仅关注最终答案是不够的，必须同时测量任务结果、机制保真度和认知诚实度。通过对编码智能体在Geant4模拟中重新发现已知粒子识别可观测量的28个episode分析，发现存在"正确答案错误机制"（CAWM）现象，即智能体通过错误推理得到正确结果，且诚实与机制保真度在同一轨迹中也会分离。研究提出轻量级测试（一步机制偏移检查+伴随重计算）可检测所有CAWM案例。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI科学家系统评估仅关注最终答案，忽略了过程正确性。本文指出这种结果导向的评估方式不足，需要区分测量任务结果、机制保真度和认知诚实度三个维度。

Method: 通过28个episode的编码智能体实验（含8个跨模型探测episode），让智能体在Geant4模拟中重新发现已知的粒子识别可观测量。分析智能体的推理过程、结果正确性及机制一致性。

Result: 在4/20的主模型episode和3/8的跨模型episode中观察到"正确答案错误机制"（CAWM）现象。当给予部分误导性先验时，所有5个智能体均能基于证据拒绝错误成分，但其中一个智能体在捍卫其选择的观测变量时使用了与自身数据不一致的物理学推理。提出的一步机制偏移检查和伴随重计算两个轻量级测试可检测所有CAWM案例。

Conclusion: 编码智能体在基于模拟的科学发现场景中，是可靠的工具但不可靠的科学合著者。合著者信任需要机制保真度验证，而智能体自身无法可靠地完成这种自我验证。所提出的轻量级测试可以有效检测这种失败模式。

Abstract: AI scientist systems are described as tools, coauthors, or founders, but we evaluate them as if only the final answer matters. This position paper argues that outcome-only evaluation is insufficient, and that task outcome, mechanism fidelity, and epistemic honesty must be measured separately. Our evidence comes from 28 episodes of a coding agent attempting to rediscover a known particle identification observable in a Geant4 simulation, including an 8-episode probe across two additional frontier models. In 4/20 primary-model and 3/8 cross-model episodes, agents reach right-looking results through incorrect reasoning that breaks when conditions change, which we call Correct Answer, Wrong Mechanism (CAWM). Honesty and mechanism fidelity dissociate within a single agent trajectory. When given a partially misleading prior, all five agents reject the false component on evidence, yet one defends its chosen observable with physics inconsistent with its own data. In the simulation-based discovery setting studied here, coding agents prove reliable tools but unreliable scientific co-authors for open-ended claim-making, where co-author trust requires mechanism-fidelity verification they do not reliably self-apply. The failure is detectable, and we propose a lightweight test. A one-step regime-shift check needs only the agent's claim and flags the over-generalized cases. A companion recomputation flags the remaining cases when the correct observable is known. Together, these checks flag every CAWM case in this study.

</details>


### [692] [EML Trees Are Universal Approximators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23179)
*Joe Germany,Elie Abdo,Joseph Bakarji*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了EML（Exp-Minus-Log）函数作为NAND门的连续模拟，研究了树状结构EML组合的表达能力。证明了这类树对W^{k,∞}空间函数具有通用逼近性质，并提出了相应的学习算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 寻找一种连续可微的、具有组合性的基本构建模块（类似NAND门在数字电路中的作用），以实现对初等函数的表示和逼近。

Method: 利用经典神经网络逼近论证方法，结合显式构造EML树来模拟多项式表示，证明树状EML组合对W^{k,∞}空间函数的通用逼近性质。同时提出针对带有拟合参数的EML树的学习算法。

Result: 证明了树状EML组合对W^{k,∞}（k∈N）空间函数具有通用逼近性质，并通过实际优化问题验证了学习算法的可行性。

Conclusion: EML树为函数逼近提供了一个具有理论基础的框架。

Abstract: The recently introduced EML (Exp-Minus-Log) function acts as continuous analogue of NAND gates, providing a compositional building block capable of representing elementary functions. In this work, we study the expressive power of tree-structured compositions of EML functions. We show that such trees enjoy a universal approximation property for functions in $W^{k, \infty}$ for $k \in \mathbb N$, drawing on classical neural network approximation arguments while exploiting the ability to explicitly construct EML trees that mimic polynomial representations. We further propose a learning algorithm for EML-type trees equipped with fitting parameters, and demonstrate its feasibility in practical optimization problems. Our results establish EML trees as a theoretically grounded framework for function approximation.

</details>


### [693] [Stage-dependent integer-binary encoding in factorization-machine black-box optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23188)
*Ryo Ogawa,Mayumi Nakano,Yuya Seki,Shu Tanaka*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对黑箱优化问题，提出阶段依赖的FMQA框架，在学习阶段使用one-hot编码、搜索阶段使用domain-wall编码，实验表明学习阶段的编码是性能主导因素，精细离散化下阶段依赖编码可进一步优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统FMQA在整个优化过程中使用单一的整数-二进制编码，但最适合代理模型学习的编码与最适合Ising机搜索的编码可能不同，因此需要阶段依赖的编码策略。

Method: 提出阶段依赖的FMQA框架，推导了one-hot和domain-wall QUBO矩阵之间的转换公式（在可加常数范围内保持可行整数状态上的代理目标不变），并设计了OhDw变体（学习用one-hot、搜索用domain-wall）。

Result: 在Rastrigin函数上（N=2,5；q=61,301）验证：学习阶段使用one-hot编码始终优于domain-wall或binary编码；OhDw在N=5,q=301时优于纯one-hot FMQA，但在N=5,q=61时纯one-hot更优。

Conclusion: 学习阶段使用one-hot编码是优化性能的主要驱动因素，阶段依赖编码在精细离散化条件下可进一步改善性能。

Abstract: Black-box optimization (BBO) deals with problems where objective functions lack explicit analytical forms and are expensive to evaluate. Factorization machine with quadratic-optimization annealing (FMQA) constructs a surrogate model using a factorization machine (FM) and optimizes it with an Ising machine. Conventional FMQA applies a single integer-binary encoding throughout the optimization process, although the encoding best suited to surrogate learning may differ from the one best suited to Ising-machine solution search. We propose a stage-dependent FMQA framework and derive conversion formulas between one-hot and domain-wall QUBO matrices that preserve the surrogate objective over feasible integer states up to an additive constant. We evaluate the OhDw variant, which employs one-hot encoding for learning and domain-wall encoding for search, on the Rastrigin function with input dimensions N = 2 and 5 and discretization levels q = 61 and 301. Across all conditions, the dominant factor governing optimization performance is the encoding used in the learning stage, with one-hot encoding consistently yielding lower residual errors than domain-wall or binary encoding. The additional benefit of switching to domain-wall encoding for solution search is condition-dependent. For N = 5 and q = 301, OhDw achieves a lower residual error and solutions closer to the global optimum than one-hot-only FMQA, whereas for N = 5 and q = 61 the latter achieves a lower residual error. These results indicate that one-hot encoding in the learning stage is the primary performance driver and that stage-dependent encoding can provide further improvement under finer discretization.

</details>


### [694] [Bridge the Gaps: Heterogeneous Attributed Graph Clustering via Quaternion Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23199)
*Xinxi Chen,Junyang Chen,Yiqun Zhang,Chuangming Qiu,Xiang Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出AGREE框架，一种端到端的任意类型属性图表示学习方法，通过多级对齐、四元数图卷积和浅层图架构，统一处理数值和类别属性，缓解过平滑和过主导效应，无需预定义聚类数即可实现高效聚类。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有属性图聚类面临两个核心挑战：1) 属性异构性——真实数据常包含数值和类别混合属性，难以统一表示学习；2) 图学习中的表征退化问题——深度图传播导致节点嵌入过度相似（过平滑），以及图表示放大拓扑影响、抑制判别性属性信息（过主导）。

Method: 提出AGREE框架，包含：1) 多级对齐与基于相似度的图构建，统一处理任意类型属性；2) 四元数图卷积增强属性交互以缓解过主导；3) 浅层图架构缓解过平滑；4) 联合优化图重建与聚类，训练时无需预设聚类数。

Result: 在多种基准数据集上，AGREE在准确性、鲁棒性和适应性方面均取得了优异的整体性能。

Conclusion: AGREE通过统一处理异构属性并缓解图学习中的表征退化问题，为任意类型属性图聚类提供了一种有效且灵活的端到端解决方案。

Abstract: Attributed graph clustering partitions nodes by jointly exploiting node attributes and graph topology. It remains challenging due to attribute heterogeneity and representation degradation during graph learning. Real-world datasets often contain heterogeneous attributes, i.e., numerical and categorical attributes, complicating unified representation learning. This challenge becomes more complex in attributed graphs, where constructing a clustering-friendly graph structure from attributes and topology remains difficult. Under deep graph architectures, repeated graph propagation causes node embeddings to become overly similar, leading to the over-smoothing (OS) effect. Meanwhile, graph representation learning amplifies topological influence, making discriminative attribute information harder to exploit for clustering, an effect we refer to as over-dominating (OD). To bridge these gaps, an end-to-end framework, Any-type attributed Graph REpresentation lEarning (AGREE), is proposed. It unifies attributed graphs and any-type attributed data through multi-level alignment and similarity-based graph construction. Quaternion-based graph convolution strengthens attribute interaction to alleviate OD, while shallow graph architectures help relieve OS. The learned embeddings are jointly optimized for graph reconstruction and clustering, without requiring a predefined number of clusters during training. Experiments on diverse benchmarks show that AGREE achieves strong overall performance in accuracy, robustness, and adaptability.

</details>


### [695] [Leveraging AutoML for Sustainable Deep Learning: A Multi-Objective HPO Approach on Deep Shift Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23208)
*Leona Hennig,Marius Lindauer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文利用AutoML技术（多保真超参数优化+多目标优化）自动设计深度移位神经网络（DSNN），在图像分类任务中同时提升约20%的精度并减少超60%的碳排放，揭示了量化策略中反直觉的模型特定权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习模型计算开销大，带来环境和资源挑战；DSNN使用移位操作降低推理复杂度，但其设计空间尚未被充分理解和优化。

Method: 结合多保真超参数优化与多目标优化，将精度和能耗作为互补目标，自动搜索DSNN的Pareto最优设计配置。

Result: 相比默认DSNN，优化后的配置在提升约20%性能的同时，碳排放减少超60%；发现量化网络中低精度量化小部分网络层在能耗和性能上更优，该发现跨多种骨干架构得到验证。

Conclusion: 自动化多目标优化可有效平衡DSNN的精度与能耗，量化策略存在反直觉的模型特定权衡，为低资源环境下的高效深度学习设计提供了新思路。

Abstract: Deep Learning (DL) has advanced various fields by extracting complex patterns from large datasets. However, the computational demands of DL models pose environmental and resource challenges. Deep Shift Neural Networks (DSNNs) present a solution by leveraging shift operations to reduce computational complexity at inference. Compared to common DNNs, DSNNs are still less well understood and less well optimized. By leveraging AutoML techniques, we provide valuable insights into the potential of DSNNs and how to design them in a better way. We focus on image classification, a core task in computer vision, especially in low-resource environments. Since we consider complementary objectives such as accuracy and energy consumption, we combine state-of-the-art multi-fidelity (MF) hyperparameter optimization (HPO) with multi-objective optimization to find a set of Pareto optimal trade-offs on how to design DSNNs. Our approach led to significantly better configurations of DSNNs regarding loss and emissions compared to default DSNNs. This includes simultaneously increasing performance by about 20% and reducing emissions, in some cases by more than 60%. Investigating the behavior of quantized networks in terms of both emissions and accuracy, our experiments reveal surprising model-specific trade-offs, yielding the greatest energy savings. For example, in contrast to common expectations, quantizing smaller portions of the network with low precision can be optimal with respect to energy consumption while retaining or improving performance. We corroborated these findings across multiple backbone architectures, highlighting important nuances in quantization strategies and offering an automated approach to balancing energy efficiency and model performance.

</details>


### [696] [Efficient Network Inference via Hardware-Aware Architecture Search, Model Pruning & Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23210)
*Lucas Heublein,Mark Deutel,Axel Plinge,Felix Ott*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了面向嵌入式GNSS干扰监测的高效神经网络推理方法，结合迭代结构化剪枝、后训练静态量化和硬件感知的零样本神经架构搜索（NAS），在资源受限硬件上实现了模型压缩与任务性能的平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 嵌入式GNSS干扰监测需要实时处理大量IQ样本，而高表达力的深度神经网络虽能实现鲁棒的干扰分类，但在资源受限硬件上部署存在性能与可部署性之间的矛盾。

Method: 以MCUNet为紧凑基线，采用迭代结构化剪枝、后训练静态量化和硬件感知零样本NAS三种技术进行模型压缩与架构优化。

Result: 在GNSS干扰数据集上的实验表明，结合压缩与硬件感知设计能有效降低模型大小、计算复杂度和内存占用，同时保持任务性能。

Conclusion: 为在iMXRT1062 MCU、Raspberry Pi Zero 2W和Raspberry Pi 5等嵌入式平台上开发实时GNSS干扰监测的紧凑ML模型提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Embedded global navigation satellite system (GNSS) interference monitoring requires fast and memory-efficient inference to process large volumes of raw in-phase and quadrature (IQ) samples in real time. At the same time, increasingly expressive deep neural networks (DNNs) are needed for robust interference classification and characterization across diverse signal conditions. This creates a fundamental tension between predictive performance and deployability on resource-constrained hardware. In this paper, we investigate efficient network inference for GNSS interference characterization using iterative structured pruning, post-training static quantization, and hardware-aware zero-shot neural architecture search (NAS). Starting from MCUNet as a compact baseline, we analyze how model compression and automated architecture optimization affect model size, computational complexity, and memory usage while maintaining task performance. Experiments on a GNSS interference dataset, covering both classification and generalized characterization, show the benefits of combining compression and hardware-aware design for embedded deployment. Our results provide practical guidance for developing compact machine learning (ML) models for real-time GNSS interference monitoring on embedded platforms (iMXRT1062 MCU, Raspberry Pi Zero 2W, and Raspberry Pi 5).

</details>


### [697] [Deep learning-based detection of cessation of breathing in pre-term infants](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23213)
*Dineo Serame,Lionel Tarassenko,Mauricio Villarroel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究评估了基于深度学习的早产儿呼吸暂停（COBE事件）检测方法，使用阻抗呼吸描记术（IP）、心电图（ECG）和光电容积描记术（PPG）信号，对24名早产儿约430小时的NICU记录进行分析。研究发现，相比模型架构复杂度，信号模态对检测性能影响更大，其中基于IP的单模态模型表现最优（平衡准确率86.8-88.0%），多模态融合（IP+PPG的ConvNeXt架构）达到最佳效果（平衡准确率88.7%，F1分数0.75）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 早产儿呼吸暂停在NICU中难以可靠检测，现有监护仪主要依赖呼吸频率和血氧饱和度阈值，导致高假阳性率且常漏检短暂或不规则事件。本研究旨在利用常规采集的临床信号，通过深度学习方法提高自动化检测能力，无需额外硬件。

Method: 使用来自24名早产儿约430小时的NICU记录，包含IP、ECG和PPG信号。三位独立评审者对COBE事件进行标注，生成346个COBE和608个非COBE事件的数据集。比较了浅层CNN、残差网络（ResNets）和ConvNeXt架构，并使用独立留出测试集进行评估。

Result: 信号模态对检测性能的影响大于架构复杂度。单模态IP模型平衡准确率86.8-88.0%，优于ECG（62.6-69.7%）和PPG（65.1-66.4%）衍生的呼吸替代信号。多模态融合略优于单独IP。最佳模型为IP+PPG输入的ConvNeXt，平衡准确率88.7%，F1分数0.75。

Conclusion: 深度学习模型应用于常规NICU监测信号可可靠检测COBE事件，并强调了在数据受限的新生儿监护环境中信号模态的重要性。

Abstract: Apnoea of prematurity is characterised by recurrent episodes of cessation of breathing and remains difficult to detect reliably using routinely monitored physiological signals in the Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU). Existing bedside monitors rely primarily on respiratory rate and oxygen saturation thresholds, often generating high false-positive alarm rates and missing short or irregular events. Improving automated detection using routinely acquired clinical signals could enhance identification of clinically meaningful events without additional sensing hardware.
  We evaluated deep learning-based detection of apnoea-related Cessation Of BrEathing (COBE) events using impedance pneumography (IP), electrocardiography (ECG), and photoplethysmography (PPG) signals from approximately 430 hours of NICU recordings collected from 24 pre-term infants. Three independent reviewers annotated COBE events, producing a dataset of 346 COBE and 608 non-COBE events. We compared a shallow convolutional neural network (CNN), residual networks (ResNets), and a ConvNeXt architecture using an independent held-out test set.
  Across all architectures, detection performance was influenced more strongly by signal modality than by architectural complexity. Unimodal IP-based models achieved balanced accuracies of 86.8-88.0%, outperforming ECG-derived (62.6-69.7%) and PPG-derived (65.1-66.4%) respiratory surrogates. Multimodal fusion yielded modest improvements over IP alone. The best-performing model, a ConvNeXt architecture combining IP and PPG inputs, achieved 88.7% balanced accuracy and an F1 score of 0.75 on the independent test set.
