While prior work has advanced task performance through handcrafted or automatically generated multi-agent workflows, robustness is often treated as an afterthought, leaving systems vulnerable to external adversaries and internal failures. We propose AutoRAS, a framework for the Automated design of Robust Agentic Systems. AutoRAS formulates system design as generating a sequence of symbolic primitives that jointly encode structural connectivity and behavioral actions, and learns to optimize this sequence using execution-derived safety signals and flow-based sequence-level objectives. Extensive experiments show that AutoRAS achieves the best performance in both vanilla and adversarial settings, with the smallest performance degradation under attacks. Further analyses demonstrate strong transferability, stable optimization behavior, stability across primitive sets, and favorable cost trade-offs. Our code is available at $\href{https://github.com/guohezuy/AutoRAS}{\text{this https URL}}$.

</details>


### [810] [Towards Transparent Mental Health Insights: An Explainable AI Model for Career-Related Depression and Anxiety Among University Students Using Structured Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21474)
*Arsham Azam,Rasikh Ali,Tayyaba Farhat,Sheeraz Akram*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种结合多模态数据与联邦学习的可解释AI框架，用于在保护隐私的前提下识别大学生职业焦虑与抑郁的早期指标，在巴基斯坦学生数据集上取得了92.08%的准确率，并通过可解释性技术识别出回避直视、面部表情减少和社交退缩等关键行为标记。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大学生职业相关的焦虑和抑郁问题日益严重，影响心理健康和学业成就。现有方法缺乏隐私保护、跨机构协作以及文化适应性，因此需要一种可解释、可扩展且隐私安全的AI系统来早期识别心理健康问题。

Method: 构建了一个可解释AI框架，使用结构化的行为数据与面试视频中的面部情绪特征进行中间融合，结合注意力机制；采用标签平滑提升泛化能力；利用联邦学习实现跨机构协作训练而不共享原始数据；使用Integrated Gradients和SHAP进行模型解释。

Result: 在巴基斯坦大学生心理健康调查数据集上，模型取得了F1分数89.12%、召回率86.54%、准确率92.08%、精确率91.88%的性能。可解释性分析识别出回避直视、较低的面部表现力和社交退缩等与心理学理论一致的行为标记。

Conclusion: 该研究提供了一个可解释、可扩展且具文化敏感性的AI系统，用于心理健康预诊断，具有融入全球学生支持服务的潜力。

Abstract: Career anxiety and depression among university students present a growing challenge to mental health and academic achievement. This study proposes an Explainable AI (XAI) framework using multimodal data and Federated Learning (FL) to identify early indicators of career-related mental health problems in a privacy-preserving and culturally responsive manner. The framework combines structured behavioral data and facial emotion features from interview videos via an intermediate fusion neural network with attention mechanisms. Label smoothing was applied to improve model generalizability. FL was used across institutions to enable collaborative training without raw data sharing. Evaluation was conducted using the Student Mental Health Survey dataset from university students across Pakistan. Our model attained an F1-score of 89.12%, recall of 86.54%, accuracy of 92.08%, and precision of 91.88%. Using Integrated Gradients and SHAP, the model identified key behavioral markers of depression including avoidance of direct gaze, lower facial expressiveness, and social withdrawal, consistent with psychological theory. This research presents an interpretable, scalable, and context-sensitive AI system for mental health pre-diagnosis with potential integration into student support services globally.

</details>


### [811] [Balancing Performance and Diversity in GRPO Autoregressive Text-to-Image Post-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21498)
*Yuanhao Chiang,Hongbo Duan,Chunru Yang,Jiahua Pei,Yi Liu,Xueqian Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文在统一f-散度框架下系统研究GRPO风格的自回归文本到图像生成对齐，发现JS散度能在参考策略约束与优化效果间取得最佳平衡，实验验证其性能优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GRPO式在线强化学习方法在自回归文生图对齐中，通常将参考策略散度视为固定超参数，忽略了不同散度选择对策略优化的直接影响，缺乏系统性理论分析。

Method: 在统一f-散度框架（包括前向KL、反向KL和JS散度）下进行系统的理论分析，揭示不同散度对token级更新的差异化影响，并在LlamaGen和Janus-7B模型上进行实验验证。

Result: JS散度在大多数评估指标上取得最强或极具竞争力的优化性能，同时保持了良好的生成多样性。

Conclusion: JS正则化通过缓解对参考策略的均匀偏差同时抑制大幅偏离，实现了最优的权衡，为自回归文生图对齐提供了有效的散度选择指导。

Abstract: Autoregressive text-to-image (T2I) generation has recently advanced rapidly, yet aligning generated images with human preferences remains challenging. GRPO-style online reinforcement learning provides an effective framework; however, existing methods typically treat reference-policy divergence as fixed, despite its direct impact on policy optimization. We study this overlooked factor within a unified f-divergence framework, encompassing forward KL, reverse KL, and JS divergence, for GRPO-style autoregressive T2I alignment. Our systematic theoretical analysis reveals that different divergences reshape token-level updates in distinct ways. In particular, under the sampled-token shaping form used, JS regularization achieves a favorable trade-off by mitigating uniform bias relative to the reference policy while still discouraging large deviations. Extensive experiments on LlamaGen and Janus-7B show that JS divergence achieves the strongest or highly competitive optimization performance on most evaluation metrics while maintaining favorable generation diversity. The code is available at https://github.com/tuoyou-hao/BPD-GRPO.

</details>


### [812] [AI Alignment From Social Choice Perspectives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21550)
*Daniel Halpern,Evi Micha,Ariel D. Procaccia,Benjamin Schiffer,Itai Shapira,Shirley Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文综述了通过社会选择理论视角研究人类反馈聚合问题的近期工作，揭示了反馈聚合层的失败模式，并展示了处理分歧的广阔设计空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当人类对模型行为的判断存在分歧时，如何进行合理的偏好聚合成为一个关键问题。作者希望通过社会选择理论的透镜，系统性地理解这一聚合过程中的失败模式，并探索更优的设计方案。

Method: 采用综述方法，系统梳理了社会选择理论在人类反馈聚合中的应用研究，识别了现有聚合层中的失败模式，并探索了更广泛的设计空间。

Result: 发现社会选择视角能有效识别反馈聚合层的失败模式（如偏好循环、多数人暴政等），同时揭示了比现有方法更丰富的、能明确且原则性地处理分歧的设计可能性。

Conclusion: 社会选择理论为理解和改进人类反馈聚合提供了有力的分析框架，有助于构建更公平、更符合人类多元价值观的对齐方法。

Abstract: Alignment from human feedback uses human judgments about model outputs to steer the behavior of language models after pretraining. When those judgments reflect conflicting views of desirable behavior, the learned objective becomes an aggregate determination of what the model should prefer. We survey recent work that has studied this aggregation problem through the lens of social choice theory. We illustrate how the social choice perspective helps identify failure modes in the feedback aggregation layer and reveals a broader design space for handling disagreement in explicit and principled ways.

</details>


### [813] [Composing Verifiable Conceptual Models via Building Blocks: Towards Design-Time Verification of Agentic AI Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21565)
*Noe Y. Flandre,Alexander C. Nwala,Philippe J. Giabbanelli*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种设计时验证方法，通过12条结构规则检查AI代理工作流中可复用构建块的兼容性，并在两个数据集上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI代理系统在运行时安全方面投入较多，但在系统设计阶段缺乏验证工作流正确性的支持，类似于建模范例中组合概念模型时未验证构建块交互一致性。

Method: 将代理工作流建模为可复用构建块的组合，通过12条结构规则检查块间兼容性，并实现为软件原型，在两个公开数据集（48个含缺陷工作流+168个结构变体）上进行评估。

Result: 验证器能够可靠检测设计缺陷，即使缺陷被任务拆分等结构变换所掩盖。

Conclusion: 未来可将本验证方法与社区构建块仓库结合，以组成更安全的代理工作流。

Abstract: Agentic AI systems orchestrate multiple LLM-based agents through workflow architectures that coordinate decisions, tools, and external actions. While current platforms emphasize runtime safeguards, little support exists for verifying workflows during system design. From a Modeling \& Simulation perspective, this gap is analogous to composing conceptual models without verifying whether their building blocks interact coherently. We propose a design-time verification approach that models agentic workflows as compositions of reusable building blocks and checks their compatibility through twelve structural rules. We implemented these rules in a software prototype and evaluated them using two openly released datasets: 48 workflows with known design flaws and 168 variants that preserve workflow logic but alter graph structure. Results show that our verifier reliably detects violations even when flawed designs are obscured through structural transformations such as splitting tasks between agents. Future works could combine our verification with community repositories of building blocks to compose safe agentic workflows.

</details>


### [814] [Counsel: A Meta-Evaluation Dataset for Agentic Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21627)
*Sashank Pisupati,Henry Broomfield,Eujeong Choi,Antonia Calvi,Charlie Wang,Roman Engeler,Max Bartolo,Patrick Lewis*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了Counsel，首个面向智能体任务的元评估数据集，包含开放权重LLMJ对智能体轨迹的过程级批评以及人类对这些批评的元评估，旨在衡量和改进LLM作为评判者的对齐质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 智能体系统执行复杂多步任务时，人工注释轨迹耗时巨大，因而广泛依赖LLM作为评判者（LLMJ）来自动评估智能体行为，但LLMJ批评的可靠性往往未被评估。

Method: 构建Counsel数据集，从tau-bench（客服智能体）和DA-Code（编码智能体）两个基准收集开放权重LLMJ的过程级批评，并由人类标注者对每条批评的误差位置和推理质量进行元评估（标注为"准确"、"位置正确但推理差"或"不应标注"）。

Result: 人类标注者间达成可靠一致性（Krippendorff's alpha=0.78）；最强评判模型在位置识别上达~88%一致性，推理质量上达~65%；更强大的评判模型和更多推理努力均能提升与人类的对齐程度。

Conclusion: Counsel数据集可服务于校准、改进或训练LLMJ，为智能体系统的LLM评估器提供严格研究和对齐改进的基础，数据集采用开放许可发布。

Abstract: As agentic systems tackle increasingly complex multi-step tasks, evaluating their trajectories presents a major bottleneck - human annotation of a single trajectory on popular agentic benchmarks can take hours, making it difficult to scale evaluations for measuring performance or curating training data. This has driven widespread reliance on automated approaches such as LLM-as-a-judge (LLMJ) to critique agents at the process and outcome-levels at scale, however, the soundness of LLMJ critiques often goes unmeasured. Here, we introduce Counsel, the first public dataset of meta-evaluations for agentic tasks. Counsel consists of process-level critiques from open-weight LLMJs on two agent benchmarks: tau-bench (customer support agents) and DA-Code (coding agents), and human meta-evaluations of these critiques. Human annotators label critiques on each flagged error as "spot on", "correct location but poor reasoning", or "should not have flagged", achieving reliable inter-annotator agreement (Krippendorff's alpha of 0.78). The resulting dataset stratifies LLMJ critiques by human alignment across both error location within a trajectory and reasoning quality, serving as valuable data to calibrate, improve, or train LLMJs for agents. Comparing open-weight judges, we find that more capable judge models and more reasoning effort both enabled improved human agreement, with the strongest judge reaching ~88% agreement on location and ~65% on reasoning. Counsel is generated using open-weight models and is permissively licensed for broad community use, which we hope will enable rigorous study and improved alignment of LLM-based evaluators for agentic systems.

</details>


### [815] [ChainWorld: Composing Long-Horizon Desktop Workloads from Atomic OSWorld Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21654)
*Vincent Siu,Manasi Sharma,Dawn Song,Daniel Yue Zhang,Chenguang Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: ChainWorld通过将OSWorld原子任务组合成长序列桌面工作负载，发现现有计算机使用智能体最多完成31%的任务链，揭示了多轮评估中的会话管理问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有计算机使用智能体评估几乎完全基于原子桌面任务，无法反映真实桌面工作需要的跨目标状态维持能力。

Method: 通过方向性兼容性搜索将OSWorld原子任务组合成长序列任务链（347条，长度2-4），并采用单轮（一次性呈现所有任务）和多轮（逐次揭示任务）两种评估协议。

Result: 四种当前智能体最大完成率仅31%；多轮评估对三个模型有提升效果；两种协议暴露不同失败模式。

Conclusion: 现有智能体在长序列桌面任务上表现有限，单轮失败集中在精度问题，多轮失败更多表现为会话管理问题（进度碎片化、后期任务脱离）。

Abstract: Computer use agents are evaluated almost exclusively on atomic desktop tasks, but realistic desktop work requires sustaining state across multiple objectives. We study this gap with ChainWorld, which composes atomic OSWorld tasks into long horizon desktop workloads through directional compatibility search while preserving the source evaluators. The resulting workload contains 347 chains of length two to four and compares two renderings of the same task sequence. In single turn evaluation, all tasks are presented together in one prompt. In multi turn evaluation, tasks are revealed one at a time. Across four current computer use agents, maximum chain completion is 31%. Multi turn evaluation improves completion for three models, but both protocols remain challenging. The two protocols also expose different failure profiles. Single turn failures concentrate on artifact precision, while multi turn failures more often reflect session management problems such as fragmented progress and later turn disengagement.

</details>


### [816] [Entropy Objectives in Markov Decision Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21726)
*S. Akshay,Raghav Goyal,Aditya Neeraje,Piyush Srivastava*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究在随机系统中合成控制策略以保证状态分布熵的浓度性质，提出了一种基于凸对偶与不变式合成的验证与综合方法，并进行了实验评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 作者希望解决随机系统中控制策略合成问题，使得系统状态分布的熵能够满足某种浓度性质（即分布集中在某个区域）。这类问题在安全、鲁棒控制等领域有重要意义，但熵目标的非线性特性使其非常具有挑战性。

Method: 首先形式化了基于熵的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）目标，证明了即使在松弛版本下该问题也是计算复杂性困难的。然后提出了一种利用凸对偶与不变式合成思想的方法，用以验证和综合满足熵目标的策略。同时分析了记忆性和随机化在保证熵目标中的作用。

Result: 证明了问题的复杂性下界；提出了一种可靠且（条件性）相对完备的验证与综合方法；通过实验在几个示例上验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 本文为解决随机系统中基于熵的浓度性质控制策略合成问题提供了理论基础与实用算法，展示了凸对偶与不变式合成在该问题中的有效性。

Abstract: We consider the problem of synthesizing control policies that enforce a concentration property on the state distributions of a stochastic system. We present a formalization of this problem in terms of synthesizing strategies for maintaining an entropy-based objective in Markov Decision Processes (MDPs). We first show that even relaxed versions of this problem are complexity-theoretically hard. We then present a sound and (conditionally) relatively complete method to verify and synthesize strategies for such entropy objectives. The main challenge is the non-linear nature of such objectives, and our approach addresses this by exploiting and combining ideas from convex duality and invariant synthesis. We also investigate the role of memory and randomization in ensuring entropy objectives. Finally, we implement our ideas to evaluate our approach empirically on a few illustrative benchmarks.

</details>


### [817] [Training the Orchestrator: A Supervised Approach to End-to-End PDDL Planning with LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21740)
*Rajesh Mangannavar,Zachary Coalson,Pranay Dugar,Prasad Tadepalli*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: HALO通过训练一个轻量级QLoRA策略与三条硬编码规则组合的混合编排器，替代了传统Agent系统中昂贵的Frontier LLM编排器，在多个规划基准上达到或接近顶尖大模型性能的同时，将编排成本降低10-45倍，LLM调用次数减少40-50%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有将自然语言规划意图转化为验证计划的方法依赖Frontier LLM作为编排器，每次细化步骤都需要调用昂贵的大模型API，成本过高。

Method: HALO提出混合编排器架构：一个QLoRA微调的小策略模型 + 三条硬编码规则处理可简单判定的选择，在验证器确认过的优化轨迹上训练，利用验证器提供的每一步(state, agent)决策作为监督信号。

Result: 在PlanBench、Natural Plan等基准上：匹配或超过GPT-5-mini基线，与Gemini-3-Flash基线差距在3个百分点以内；编排成本从$0.18降至$0.004/task（比GPT-5-mini便宜约45倍，比Gemini-3-Flash便宜约15倍）；每回合LLM调用次数减少40-50%。

Conclusion: 验证器提供的每一步决策可以直接用作监督信号，使得训练轻量级编排器成为可能，在不显著牺牲成功率的前提下大幅降低成本和调用次数。

Abstract: Translating natural-language planning intent into verified plans is a longstanding challenge: people communicate goals in language, while classical planners require formal PDDL specifications. Recent agentic frameworks bridge this gap by orchestrating a pool of specialized repair agents inside a verifier-checked refinement loop, but the orchestrator at the centre is itself a prompted frontier LLM, paying a frontier-LLM API call at every refinement step. We present HALO (Hybrid Agent-Learned Orchestrator), which trains the orchestrator from refinement trajectories that an external verifier has certified as ending in valid plans, across 11 PDDL domains. HALO pairs a small QLoRA-tuned policy with three hardcoded rules for trivially decidable selections, and operates over an expanded 21-agent action space. Unlike approaches that prompt a frontier LLM at every step or learn an orchestrator from sparse end-of-episode rewards, our key observation is that the verifier already provides strong guidance: every accepted trajectory is a sequence of demonstrably correct (state, agent) decisions, directly usable as supervision. Across PlanBench, Natural Plan, and classical planning benchmarks, HALO matches or exceeds the GPT-5-mini prompted baseline on success rate, sits within three percentage points of the stronger Gemini-3-Flash prompted baseline, reduces orchestration cost by more than an order of magnitude (\$0.18 to \$0.004 per task against GPT-5-mini, roughly 45$\times$ cheaper; roughly 15$\times$ cheaper than Gemini-3-Flash), and cuts total LLM calls per episode by 40 to 50 percent.

</details>


### [818] [AgentCAT: Simulating Computerized Adaptive Testing via Multi-Agent Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21832)
*Weiyuan Zhou,Haiping Ma,Xiaoshan Yu,Changqian Wang,Shangshang Yang,Xingyi Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AgentCAT，一个基于LLM的多智能体模拟系统，用于构建高保真动态测试基准环境，解决了CAT中静态离线数据和孤立组件优化的问题。系统包含三个模块：考生智能体、选题智能体和监督智能体，在真实数据集上的实验验证了其在能力估计、选题策略等方面的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CAT研究受限于静态离线数据和孤立组件优化，研究者将动态评估退化为静态序列预测，且仅关注选题或诊断等单一视角，忽视了CAT整体交互过程。

Method: 提出AgentCAT框架，包含三个模块：(1) 考生智能体：基于记忆检索和思维链推理模拟认知反应；(2) 选题智能体：采用粗到细分桶和知识图谱探索平衡局部难度与全局覆盖；(3) 监督智能体：通过双重审核和稳健更新确保收敛性和有效性。

Result: 在真实数据集上从宏观能力收敛、微观交互逻辑和数据稀疏鲁棒性三个维度评估，AgentCAT实现了有效的能力估计，选题策略平衡了难度适应与教学连贯性。

Conclusion: AgentCAT作为多智能体模拟系统，能够高保真地模拟动态测试过程，解决现有CAT研究的局限性，其选题策略符合人类教学直觉。

Abstract: Computerized Adaptive Testing (CAT), as a key technology for personalized education, aims to accurately assess examinee proficiency by retrieving exercises dynamically matching current ability estimates. However, existing CAT research is constrained by limitations of static offline data and isolated component optimization. Restricted by partial labels in offline logs, researchers degrade the dynamic assessment process into static sequence prediction. Current research focuses on isolated perspectives, e.g., selection or diagnosis, neglecting the overall CAT interaction process. To address this, we propose AgentCAT, a Large Language Model-based multi-agent simulation system, to construct a high-fidelity benchmarking environment for dynamic testing. This framework comprises three modules: (1) The examinee agent with memory retrieval and Chain-of-Thought reasoning simulates responses based on cognitive profiles; (2) The selection agent uses coarse-to-fine bucketing and knowledge graph exploration to balance local difficulty and global coverage; (3) The supervisor uses dual-auditing and robust update to ensure convergence and validity. To validate the framework, we evaluated on two real-world datasets across three dimensions: macro-level ability convergence, micro-level interaction logic, and data sparsity resilience. Results show AgentCAT achieves effective ability estimation, and its selection strategy balances difficulty adaptation and instructional coherence, aligning with human pedagogical intuition.

</details>


### [819] [Measuring What Persists: Conditioning Mechanisms and a Geometric Framework for AI Agent Identity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21843)
*Andrew Tanner*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出基于√JSD度量空间和丰富范畴论中幅度同调的几何框架，用于量化AI agent的身份结构。通过实验发现两种机制：身份真空簇和安全盆地簇。但后续实验表明，之前观察到的漂移效应实际上是重复填充伪影，而非真正的上下文长度漂移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文场景中AI agent会偏离其预设身份，现有方法只能在质量退化明显后才能检测到这种漂移，缺乏早期量化的几何框架。

Method: 采用√JSD度量空间构建身份结构，引入丰富范畴论中幅度同调（magnitude homology）进行几何测量，将身份视为非测地结构，漂移视为向测地线的松弛过程。通过等边探针基线、一阶摄动理论和对称性分析进行验证。

Result: 1) 发现两种机制：身份真空簇（身份填补行为空白）和安全盆地簇（身份取代训练后吸引子）；2) 等边探针基线显示55种独特响应模式（基础模型仅1种）；3) 漂移实验的幅度下降实为重复填充伪影，多样化填充在150K tokens内无变形。

Conclusion: 幅度同调框架的诊断潜力（各向异性收缩检测、结构坍缩的同调简化）在理论上由摄动理论和选择规则支撑，但实证尚未确认。核心发现是身份规范创造出可量化的行为丰富性，且长上下文漂移的早期证据被修正为填充伪影。

Abstract: AI agents in long-context applications drift from their specified identity. Current methods detect this only after qualitative degradation is visible. We present a geometric framework for measuring identity structure using $\sqrt{\mathrm{JSD}}$ metric spaces and magnitude homology from enriched category theory, where identity is non-geodesic structure and drift is its relaxation toward the geodesic.
  Validated on a persistent AI agent, the framework's strongest empirical finding is a two-mechanism conditioning structure: cross-condition distances reveal an identity-vacuum cluster where the identity specification fills a behavioral void, and a safety-basin cluster where it displaces from post-training attractors. An equilateral probe baseline confirms that the identity specification creates measurable behavioral richness (55 unique response patterns vs. 1 for the base model) at maximum probe separation. A first-order perturbation theory for equilateral configurations predicts magnitude changes from perimeter changes alone, with shape perturbations first-order cancelled by the $S_n$ symmetry; the formula is self-consistent at the observed perturbation amplitudes.
  A drift experiment measuring magnitude decrease under context pressure was subsequently found to reflect repetitive-padding artifacts rather than genuine context-length drift; diverse padding produces no measurable deformation through 150K tokens. The magnitude homology framework's full diagnostic promise -- detecting anisotropic contraction and structural collapse via homological simplification -- is architecturally grounded in the perturbation theory and selection rules but remains empirically unconfirmed.

</details>


### [820] [ForEx: A Formal Verification Framework for Explainable Reasoning in Logical Fallacy Detection and Annotation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21867)
*Pei-Cing Huang,Chienyu Liu,Chan Hsu,Ci-Siang Chen,Pei-Ju Lee,Yihuang Kang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出ForEx框架，将LLM对逻辑谬误检测的解释翻译为Lean4代码，通过形式化验证发现：超90%的LLM输出可通过形式化推理链验证，但与人类标注的一致性仅约20%，揭示预测标签与形式推理之间的系统性差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM逻辑谬误检测评估仅关注预测标签的正确性，未验证模型提供的解释是否真正支持其标签，缺乏对推理过程的形式化检验。

Method: 提出ForEx框架，将LLM生成的自然语言解释翻译为Lean4形式化语言，并验证翻译后的推理链是否在编码前提条件下可推导。引入LLM论证验证矩阵，区分标签一致性与形式验证状态。

Result: 在LOGIC-Climate数据集上，超过90%的LLM输出可被翻译为可通过验证的形式化推理链，但与人类标注的一致性仅为20%左右。

Conclusion: 标签一致性（预测准确率）与形式化可推导性之间存在系统性差距，传统基于标签的指标无法揭示这一区别。ForEx将LLM评估从标签正确性转向可机器检查的形式化推理链分析。

Abstract: Current evaluations of Large Language Models (LLMs) on logical fallacy detection focus on predicted labels, but do not establish whether those labels are supported by the reasoning the models provide. We propose ForEx (Formal Verification for Explainable Reasoning), a framework that translates LLM-generated explanations into Lean4 and verifies whether the translated rationale is derivable under encoded premises, not the logical validity of the original natural language argument. To distinguish prediction outcomes from the formal status of the supporting reasoning, we introduce the LLM Argument Verification Matrix, which separates label consistency from formal verification status. Experiments on LOGIC-Climate show that over 90% of LLM outputs can be translated into formal reasoning chains that pass verification, while agreement with human annotations remains around 20%. These results expose a systematic gap between formal derivability and label agreement, a distinction invisible to prediction-based metrics. ForEx moves LLM evaluation beyond label correctness toward machine-checkable analysis of formalized reasoning chains.

</details>


### [821] [AgentRiskBOM: A Risk-Scoping Security Bill of Materials for Agentic AI Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21877)
*Srimonti Dutta,Akshata Kishore Moharir*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AgentRiskBOM，一种针对工具使用型AI代理的安全物料清单（BOM）扩展，通过记录运行时权限（如自主性、工具权限、记忆范围等）填补现有SBOM/AIBOM/MLBOM在代理透明度上的空白。在13个开源代理和52个风险场景上的评估显示，其能力覆盖（14/16）和风险类别可见性（100%）显著优于现有方案，且差异检测器能100%识别33种部署突变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有BOM制品（SBOM、AIBOM、MLBOM）虽能记录依赖、模型元数据和训练来源，但无法描述部署后AI代理的能力范围——即存在"能力不透明性"（capability opacity）：缺乏对代理能访问什么、记住什么、改变什么、委托什么以及事后证明什么的结构化记录。这种透明度缺口导致安全风险难以事前评估。

Method: AgentRiskBOM设计为现有BOM的附加层（additive layer），在引用SBOM/AIBOM/MLBOM权威字段的基础上，新增运行时授权字段：自主性、工具权限、记忆、凭证范围、审批门控、审计信号、代理间通信和外部行为能力。实现包括：JSON-schema制品、可复现语料库、风险场景集、评分器、差异检测器、控制映射器和报告生成器。

Result: 在13个开源代理（覆盖编码、RAG、多代理类型）和52个风险场景（14个类别）上测试：Schema验证全部通过；能力维度覆盖上AgentRiskBOM达14/16（SBOM为1，AIBOM为1.5，MLBOM为2）；风险类别可见性达100%（SBOM-like为10.5%，AIBOM-like为20.9%）；33种部署突变中差异检测器100%识别正确；罚分评分器与主评分器Spearman相关性0.73。

Conclusion: Agentic AI安全需要在安全事故发生前就有机器可读的权限与风险制品。AgentRiskBOM有效弥合了代理透明度缺口，但评分阈值仍需人工校准，提示该领域需要持续的人机协作治理。

Abstract: Agentic AI systems retrieve private context, invoke tools, write files, call external services, coordinate with other agents, and may act without human approval. Existing bill of materials artifacts improve transparency for dependencies, model metadata, and training provenance, but leave an agentic transparency gap: capability opacity, the absence of a structured account of what a deployed agent can access, remember, change, delegate, and prove afterward. This paper introduces AgentRiskBOM, a security BOM for risk-scoping tool-using AI agents. It is an additive layer over SBOM, AIBOM, and MLBOM artifacts, referencing them where authoritative while adding fields for runtime authority: autonomy, tool permissions, memory, credential scope, approval gates, audit signals, inter-agent communication, and external action capability. We implement AgentRiskBOM as a JSON-schema artifact with a reproducible corpus, risk scenarios, scorer, diff detector, control mapper, and reports. We evaluate AgentRiskBOM on 13 open-source agents spanning coding, RAG, and multi-agent archetypes, plus 52 risk scenarios across 14 categories. The schema validates all 13 corpus artifacts. Coverage analysis gives AgentRiskBOM a native-equivalent score of 14 across 16 capability dimensions, vs. 1 for SBOM, 1.5 for AIBOM and 2 for MLBOM. Across modeled risk categories, AgentRiskBOM exposes 100% risk-category visibility vs. 10.5% for SBOM-like and 20.9% for AIBOM-like views. To test agentic authority drift, we inject 33 structured deployment mutations; the diff detector identifies the correct change type for all mutations. A secondary penalty-based scorer yields a Spearman correlation of 0.73 with the primary scorer, supporting rank-level consistency while showing that thresholds require human calibration. The results show that agentic AI security needs a machine-readable authority-and-risk artifact before incidents occur.

</details>


### [822] [Learning the ARTS of Search for Automated Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21891)
*Gurusha Juneja,Arnav Kumar Jain,Deepak Nathani,William Yang Wang,Xin Eric Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出ARTS框架，利用推理语言模型进行科学发现中的树搜索，通过test-time training解决上下文长度问题，在22个任务上超越现有方法，且小模型（Qwen3-4B）经训练后性能可匹敌闭源前沿模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有科学发现方法（如MCTS）将假设质量与实验执行质量混为一谈，导致有前景但初步执行的假设被排名低于执行更完善但平庸的假设；同时，搜索日志随推进超出上下文窗口，不得不剪枝，丢失历史信息。

Method: 提出Agentic Reasoning for Tree Search (ARTS)，使用推理语言模型导航搜索空间。模型检查历史执行日志，诊断失败源于错误实现还是错误假设，再选择下一步构建的假设。同时采用test-time training将搜索树知识注入模型权重，缓解上下文长度限制。

Result: 在MLGym和MLEBench的22个任务上，ARTS相比领先算法有15.3%以上的标准化分数提升。Qwen3-4B小模型经test-time training后可匹配Gemini-3 Pro和GPT o3-reasoning的性能，推理成本降低5倍。在部分可观测RL任务中，训练后的Qwen3-4B甚至超越使用o3的ARTS，重新发现人类最优的循环记忆方案。

Conclusion: ARTS通过将推理语言模型与test-time training结合，有效解决了科学发现搜索中假设评估偏差和上下文窗口限制的问题，实现了更优的搜索性能，并且验证了小模型通过针对性训练可以达到甚至超越大模型的效果。

Abstract: Scientific discovery can be formulated as an iterative search process over the space of hypotheses and experiments. Contemporary methods navigate this space using heuristics such as MCTS. These algorithms conflate the merit of a hypothesis with the quality of its experimental execution. A promising hypothesis with preliminary execution is therefore ranked below a modest hypothesis whose execution is refined. Moreover, prior methods prune the search logs as the search progresses because the accumulated history outgrows the context window. We propose Agentic Reasoning for Tree Search (ARTS), where we deploy a reasoning language model to navigate this space. The model inspects prior execution logs, diagnoses whether earlier failures arose from faulty implementations or bad hypotheses, and selects the hypothesis to build on next. To mitigate challenges with context length, ARTS uses test-time training to instill the knowledge of search tree in the model weights. Across 22 tasks from MLGym and MLEBench, we show that ARTS outperforms leading algorithms, with over 15.3% relative improvement in the normalized score. With test-time training we show that a Qwen3-4B agent can match performance with closed-source frontier models like Gemini-3 Pro and GPT o3-reasoning with upto 5x lower inference cost. We further observe that on partially observable RL tasks, the test-time trained Qwen3-4B scientist surpasses ARTS with the o3 scientist by rediscovering the human-best recurrent-memory solution that heuristic methods prune away.

</details>


### [823] [Holmes: Multimodal Agentic Diagnosis for Mixed-Language Mobile Crashes at Industrial Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21963)
*Jia Li,Wenyuan Ma,Ting Peng,Haibin Zheng,Yuetang Deng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Holmes是一个多智能体系统，通过合成多模态运行时信号（堆栈跟踪、日志、线程状态）重建故障上下文，无需复现即可自动诊断超大规模工业应用中的移动崩溃。在微信真实崩溃数据上，函数级故障定位准确率达87.6%，平均排查时间缩短98%以上至约77秒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超大规模工业应用中的移动崩溃诊断面临巨大挑战：代码量庞大（7000万行）、混合语言环境复杂、故障无法本地复现。传统静态分析难以扩展，现有LLM智能体依赖可复现环境，不适用于事后分析场景。

Method: 提出Holmes多智能体系统，核心架构为层次化Retrieve-Explore-Reason：1）利用低级工件（寄存器、汇编代码）弥合开源业务逻辑与闭源系统框架之间的语义鸿沟；2）通过运行时线索动态压缩搜索空间；3）合成多模态运行时信号（堆栈跟踪、日志、线程状态）重建故障上下文。

Result: 在微信真实崩溃案例上评估：函数级故障定位准确率87.6%，平均调查时间降低98%以上（降至约77秒），有效将劳动密集型调试转变为高效的验证流程。

Conclusion: Holmes证明了在不依赖复现环境的情况下，通过多模态信号合成与层次化推理架构，能够高效诊断超大规模工业应用中的非局部缺陷，为移动崩溃分析提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: Diagnosing mobile crashes in ultra-large-scale industrial applications is a formidable challenge due to the sheer volume of code, the complexity of mixed-language environments, and the inability to reproduce failures locally. Traditional static analysis struggles with scalability, while existing LLM-based agents often rely on reproducible environments unavailable in post-mortem scenarios. We present Holmes, a multi-agent system that automates root cause analysis by synthesizing multimodal runtime signals--stack traces, logs, and thread states--to reconstruct failure contexts without reproduction. Holmes introduces a hierarchical Retrieve-Explore-Reason architecture that leverages low-level artifacts (e.g., registers, assembly) to bridge the semantic gap between open-source business logic and closed-source system frameworks. By dynamically compressing the search space using runtime clues, Holmes precisely navigates 70-million-line codebases to identify non-local defects. Evaluated on real-world crashes from WeChat, Holmes achieves 87.6% accuracy in function-level fault localization and reduces average investigation time by over 98% (to ~77 seconds), demonstrating its effectiveness in transforming labor-intensive debugging into an efficient verification workflow.

</details>


### [824] [REBA: A Revealed Belief Automaton Framework for Online Planning in Continuous POMDPs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21971)
*Xiangwei Chen,Lingling Fang,Andreas Holzinger,Liming Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出REBA框架，通过事件驱动的揭示信念自动机，在连续部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）中在线建立可靠的信念抽象，无需预定义离散抽象，支持ω-正则规格下的形式化策略合成，并通过蒙特卡洛树搜索实现超越局部视野的在线规划，实验显示性能提升17%-47.4%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有连续POMDP在线规划方法在处理ω-正则规格时存在两大缺陷：基于信念空间直接搜索的方法缺乏符号记忆以追踪长期逻辑进度；基于预定义离散抽象的方法难以从带噪在线信念中获得可靠符号状态。因此，如何在线从连续观测中获得可靠的符号状态是一个核心挑战。

Method: 提出REBA框架，核心包括：(1) 在线揭示方法，通过信息论门控动态分析连续信念空间，从带噪信念中发现可靠锚点；(2) 增量拓扑自适应机制，基于认证锚点在线构建有限信念自动机；(3) 结合ω-正则规格，支持形式化奇偶策略合成，无需预定义离散抽象；(4) 误差分解分析，评估离散指导对底层连续POMDP的有效性和可靠性。

Result: 在巡逻和导航场景的实证评估中，REBA匹配或超越所有基线方法，主要指标相比最先进方法提升17.0%至47.4%。

Conclusion: REBA将全局信念空间离散化的思路转变为在线认证揭示事件的新范式，成功解决了连续POMDP中ω-正则规格在线规划的关键难题，为形式化方法与连续部分可观测决策系统的结合提供了有效路径。

Abstract: Online planning in continuous partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) using $ω$-regular specifications requires handling continuous belief dynamics within the finite symbolic memory in order to track temporal progress. Existing methods based on either direct search in belief space or predefined discrete abstractions suffer from drawbacks, e.g., lack of symbolic memory for long-horizon logical progress or difficult to certify from noisy online beliefs. As such, obtaining reliable symbolic states online from continuous observations remains a challenge. To address this issue, we introduce the Revealed Belief Automaton (REBA), an event-driven framework that advances the research from global belief-space discretization to a fundamental new way of thinking, namely online certification of revelation events. Specifically, we propose an online revelation method that, through information-theoretic gates, can dynamically analyse and establish belief abstraction from the continuous belief space by discovering reliable anchors among noisy beliefs. We then develop an incremental topology adaptation mechanism over the certified anchors to realise the online finite Belief Automaton. By combining with the $ω$-regular specification, REBA is able to support formal parity policy synthesis without a predefined discrete abstraction, which in turn can guide the Monte Carlo Tree Search process to perform online search beyond its local horizon. In addition, we design an error decomposition analysis which can assess the effectiveness and reliability of this discrete guidance for the underlying continuous POMDP. Empirical evaluations in patrolling and navigation scenarios show that REBA matches or exceeds all evaluated baselines, with primary metric gains of +17.0\% to +47.4\% over state-of-the-art approaches.

</details>


### [825] [Human vs Machine Mathematical Difficulty on Project Euler: An Experimental Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21972)
*David Holmes,Johannes Schmitt*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了前沿AI系统在Project Euler数学问题上的表现与人类难度之间的关系。实验使用了MathArena基准中的3840次尝试数据，涵盖50个问题和26个模型配置。研究发现，对于大多数模型，机器成本与人类时间呈幂律关系且指数b<1，表明机器并非如之前预测的那样随问题难度增加而表现更差。同时，成功概率可以用指数衰减模型拟合（中位R²=0.92）。最强的模型配置在人类最快基准问题上达到约2.5-4.3小时的任务长度，前沿模型的h₅₀每约75天翻一番。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受Timothy Gowers提出的幂律关系假设启发，本文旨在检验机器性能（以生成令牌成本衡量）与人类解题时间之间的缩放规律，并验证是否存在"机器随难度增加而表现更差"的预测。同时，研究成功概率随人类难度变化的衰减模式，以更好地理解AI系统的能力边界。

Method: 从MathArena基准收集3840次尝试数据（50个问题、26个模型配置），以Project Euler网站公布的人类解题时间作为难度度量。采用三种建模方法：1) 幂律关系拟合 $t_{machine} = a \cdot t_{human}^b$；2) 指数衰减模型 $p_{success} = e^{c t_{human}}$ 并采用分箱聚合评估拟合优度；3) 逻辑斯蒂成功曲线拟合，提取50%任务长度视界 $h_{50}$，并追踪前沿模型能力的时间演化。

Result: 1) 25个可拟合模型中有20个（包括最强基础模型）的幂律指数b<1，不支持"机器随难度缩放更差"的预测；2) 指数衰减模型在22个最优覆盖配置中取得中位R²=0.92的拟合效果；3) 最强模型在2026年4月20日快照中达到约2.5-4.3小时的h₅₀；4) 前沿SOTA模型的h₅₀约每75天翻一番。

Conclusion: 本文通过实证分析发现，前沿AI系统在数学问题上的表现随人类难度增加的衰减速度比之前预测的更慢，机器在困难问题上反而展现出相对优势。成功概率的指数衰减模型得到中等程度的实证支持。此外，前沿模型的任务长度视界呈指数增长趋势，每约75天翻倍，表明AI推理能力仍在快速进步。

Abstract: We study how the effort and success probability of frontier AI systems scale with human difficulty on problems from Project Euler, an online platform of computational mathematics problems. Our dataset, from the MathArena benchmark, consists of 3840 attempts across 50 problems and 26 model configurations, with problem difficulty measured by the site's public human solve times. Motivated by a proposal of Timothy Gowers, we test a power-law relation $t_{\text{machine}} = a \cdot t_{\text{human}}^b$ between generated-token cost per successful answer and human time, and find $b < 1$ for 20 of the 25 models with usable fits, including the strongest base models; this operationalization therefore does not support an earlier prediction that machines scale worse than humans with difficulty. We also investigate whether success probability on the tested problems can be modeled by a simple exponential decay $p_{\text{success}} = e^{c t_{\text{human}}}$, predicting a linear relation between $\log p_{\text{success}}$ and $t_{\text{human}}$. Using a binning approach for data aggregation we find moderate empirical support (median bin-level $R^2 = 0.92$ across the 22 best-covered configurations) for this model. Following METR, we also fit logistic success curves and extract 50\% task-length horizons $h_{50}$; the strongest configurations in our 20 April 2026 snapshot reach roughly $2.5$--$4.3$ hours on our fastest-five human baseline, with a log-linear fit through the state-of-the-art frontier giving a descriptive doubling time of about $75$~days for the SOTA $h_{50}$.

</details>


### [826] [IRumAI: Reinforcement Learning for Indian Rummy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21975)
*Vignesh Mohan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 首个面向印度拉米纸牌游戏的RL智能体IRumAI，通过PPO、特征编码、奖励塑形和双分支CNN架构，在弱启发式训练后击败所有基线，速度提升7000倍以上，并隐式建模对手隐藏手牌。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 印度拉米纸牌游戏拥有庞大玩家群体和复杂的隐藏信息动态，但此前从未得到强化学习领域的关注；现有基于组合搜索的智能体虽然战术强大，但推理速度缓慢。

Method: 采用PPO算法，结合meld感知的观测编码、deadwood驱动的奖励塑形、双分支卷积架构；先通过行为克隆进行热启动（使用较强示范数据），随后仅在弱启发式对手上进行RL训练。

Result: 以53.9%胜率击败最强的基于搜索的对手（RL训练中未见），单动作仅需0.33ms，比最优启发式方法快7000倍以上；消融实验验证了架构选择的有效性。

Conclusion: 无需显式搜索即可达到超越搜索基线的性能，且速度极快；线性探测表明网络能通过公共交互隐式建模对手的隐藏手牌，具备实用价值和理论意义。

Abstract: Despite its massive player base and complex hidden-information dynamics, Indian Rummy has received no reinforcement learning attention. Existing agents rely on combinatorial search, which is tactically strong but slow at inference. We present IRumAI, the first RL agent for the domain. IRumAI integrates Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), meld-aware observation encoding, deadwood-driven reward shaping, and a dual-branch convolutional architecture. IRumAI is RL-trained solely against weak heuristics, after a one-time behaviour-cloning warm-start on stronger demonstration data. It generalises to defeat the entire baseline hierarchy, including a 53.9% win rate against the strongest search-based opponent unseen during RL training. Bypassing explicit search, IRumAI requires just 0.33 ms per action, which is over 7,000x faster than the state-of-the-art heuristic. Ablations validate our architectural choices, and linear probing reveals that the network implicitly models the opponent's hidden hand from public interactions.

</details>


### [827] [CFAgentBench: A Reproducible Environment and Benchmark for Autonomous Construction-Finance Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22000)
*Rishi Srivastava*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了CFAgentBench，一个面向建筑金融自主代理的可复现、可自托管基准测试环境，包含1014个任务，并发现最强模型在单次尝试中通过率67%，但五次重复时降至38%，表明单次准确率高估了实际部署能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 建筑金融领域涉及ERP、项目管理、支付、工资单等多种复杂系统，需要能够自主操作的AI代理，但缺乏可复现、可评估的基准测试环境。

Method: 构建了一个可执行环境（非静态轨迹），包含35个模拟应用（31个财务+4个项目管理）、9种企业原型，通过状态差异、禁止副作用检查、输出正则表达式进行功能正确性评估，并使用LLM判断回复质量。特别引入资金流动安全机制，278个任务中执行支付等操作即失败。

Result: 对三个开源模型进行5次重复实验，最强代理pass^1=0.67，但pass^5=0.38，成功率下降43%。存在显著的域间差异和单次到多次尝试的通过率崩塌现象。

Conclusion: 单次尝试的准确率会高估建筑金融代理的实际部署能力；需要多次重复评估才能反映真实可用性。数据集分为公开集（711个，95%置信区间半宽±4.1%）和私有集（303个）以防止污染。

Abstract: We introduce CFAgentBench, a reproducible, self-hostable environment and benchmark for autonomous construction-finance agents: a CFO/controller-class agent operating across the real software stack a US construction finance team runs - ERP, project management, email, documents, pay applications, payroll, certified payroll, lien waivers, and bank/treasury portals. It contains 1,014 machine-gradeable task specifications across 8 domains and 77 families, every family grounded in a real source; a self-validated subset of 40 tasks (54 with a project-management extension) is compiled into oracle-validated executable evaluators, the runnable suite reported here. Following WebArena, the benchmark runs on an executable environment rather than static traces: 35 mock applications (31 reconciled to one company book, plus 4 PM platforms) over 9 archetypes, each implementing a uniform self-hostable app contract, so every task is graded by functional correctness - a state diff plus forbidden-side-effect checks plus required-output regexes - with an LLM judge used only for reply quality, never as reward. A distinguishing principle is a money-movement guard: 278 instances embed a payment, payroll, e-signature, or e-filing step where the correct behavior is to stop and stage for human approval, and executing even the correct transaction fails the task. The public split (n=711) is sized for a 95% Wilson half-width of +/-4.1%; a private, contamination-protected split (n=303) is reserved for remote scoring. In a first three-model open-weight sweep (k=5), the strongest agent reaches pass^1 = 0.67 but only pass^5 = 0.38 - losing 43% of its successes when required to repeat them under temperature-0 decoding. The within-model pass^1 to pass^5 collapse and sharp per-domain heterogeneity are clear evidence that single-attempt accuracy overstates deployable construction-finance competence.

</details>


### [828] [Nous: A Predictive World Model for Long-Term Agent Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22030)
*Pranav Singh*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Nous提出了一种基于"知识即预测"原则的新型智能体记忆架构。它通过维护预测性世界模型（包含实体-属性对的分类概率分布），使用信息论惊奇度评分观测，并存储贝叶斯后验更新带来的"增量"而非事实本身。遗忘通过熵衰减自然发生，身份解析通过互信息实现。在LoCoMo基准测试中，Nous在四种问答类型上取得了有竞争力的F1分数，且无需外部向量数据库或图引擎。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有记忆方法（数据库记录、向量嵌入、知识图谱三元组）将记忆视为静态存储，缺乏对信息不确定性和遗忘机制的建模。作者希望提出一种基于预测编码理论的记忆架构，使记忆系统能动态更新信念、自然遗忘，并通过信息论指标（惊奇度、互信息）实现更灵活的认知功能。

Method: Nous的核心是维护一个预测性世界模型，以分类概率分布（称为维度）表示每个实体-属性对。每个观测通过信息论惊奇度 S = -log2 P(obs | D) 评分，并通过闭式贝叶斯后验更新分布。存储的主要内容是"增量"（从先验到后验信念的偏移），而非事实本身。遗忘通过熵向均匀分布的自然衰减实现，身份解析通过实体维度集之间的互信息完成。

Result: 在LoCoMo基准测试（10个对话，1,540个问题）上，使用GPT-4o-mini作为骨干模型，Nous在单跳、多跳、时序和开放域问题上分别达到63.50、55.32、58.57和62.50的F1分数。相比A-MEM（同样使用GPT-4o-mini），Nous在三个类别上有显著提升；相比同期系统BeliefMem，Nous在全部四个类别上表现更优（但存在评估差异）。

Conclusion: Nous验证了"知识即预测"这一原则在长程对话记忆任务中的有效性，展示了基于信念更新和概率表示的记忆架构的潜力。论文还坦诚讨论了可复现性问题，包括A-MEM结果的自引用不一致以及与BeliefMem评估管道的不可控差异，体现了对社区可复现性问题的关注。

Abstract: We present Nous, a novel agent memory architecture grounded in the principle that knowledge is prediction, not storage. Rather than persisting facts as database records, vector embeddings, or knowledge-graph triples, Nous maintains a predictive world model: a collection of categorical probability distributions, called dimensions, one per entity-attribute pair observed in conversation. Each incoming observation is scored by its information-theoretic surprise S = -log2 P(obs | D), and the distribution is updated via a closed-form Bayesian posterior. The primary stored artifact is the delta, a record of the shift from prior to posterior belief, rather than the fact itself. Forgetting emerges naturally as entropy decay toward the uniform distribution, and identity resolution is handled through mutual information between entity dimension sets. Evaluated on the LoCoMo long-term conversational memory benchmark across ten conversations (1,540 questions) using GPT-4o-mini as backbone, Nous achieves F1 of 63.50 (single-hop), 55.32 (multi-hop), 58.57 (temporal), and 62.50 (open-domain). Against A-MEM's self-reported GPT-4o-mini numbers, Nous shows substantial gains in three of four categories, though we note that independent citations of A-MEM's results disagree with each other on category assignment, a reproducibility issue we discuss openly rather than resolve unilaterally. We additionally compare against BeliefMem, a concurrently developed system built on the same core premise of belief-based rather than deterministic memory; on the same benchmark and backbone, Nous's self-reported numbers exceed BeliefMem's self-reported numbers on all four categories, though we flag several uncontrolled differences between the two evaluation pipelines that prevent this from being a fully controlled comparison. Nous requires no external vector database or graph engine.

</details>


### [829] [Attractor Domain Theory: A Mathematical Framework for Cardiovascular Attractor Analysis with Wearable Photoplethysmography (PPG) Validation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22039)
*Timothy Oladunni,Farouk Ganiyu Adewumi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出吸引子域理论（ADT），将重建的心脏吸引子信息划分为三个互不冗余的域（几何域、遍历域、变分域），并证明其充分必要性。基于176,742个PPG片段的几何域验证显示AUC=0.757，NPV=0.966，消融实验确认C_NL是几何域主导成分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有非线性心脏动力学虽已提取多种吸引子特征（如Lyapunov指数、样本熵等），但缺乏理论框架解释哪些吸引子属性捕获哪些心血管量以及为何如此，导致特征选择如同搜索问题，阴性结果无法解释。

Method: 提出吸引子域理论（ADT），证明重构吸引子信息可划分为三个互不冗余的域：几何域G（延迟嵌入，天然能力为伪迹剔除）、遍历域S（渐近统计不变量，天然能力为稳定性估计）、变分域V（有限时间Lyapunov指数场，天然能力为血流动力学推断），并证明域充足性定理（吸引子信息的Parseval模拟）及三域的充分必要性。

Result: 在四个数据集共176,742个PPG片段上验证几何域，通过SCSI框架校正三种系统性评估伪迹后，AUC=0.757 [0.686-0.828]，NPV=0.966。消融实验确认C_NL是几何域主导成分（Delta AUC=-0.413），并发现五个成分间存在域内冗余。

Conclusion: ADT为心血管吸引子分析提供了理论统一框架，明确了不同吸引子域的功能角色，几何域在伪迹剔除方面表现优异，为后续跨域协同（如结合变分域进行血流动力学推断）奠定了基础。

Abstract: The cardiovascular system evolves along a bounded trajectory in physiological state space that converges to a compact geometric object: the cardiac attractor. A wearable photoplethysmograph (PPG) or electrocardiograph (ECG) observes a one-dimensional projection of this attractor; by Takens' embedding theorem, delay coordinates reconstruct its full geometry. Three decades of nonlinear cardiac dynamics have extracted Lyapunov exponents, recurrence statistics, and sample entropy from reconstructed attractors, yet no principled account exists of which attractor properties capture which cardiovascular quantities, or why, leaving feature selection as a search problem and negative results uninterpretable. We introduce Attractor Domain Theory (ADT), which proves that the reconstructed attractor's information partitions into three mutually non-redundant domains: the Geometry Domain G (delay embedding; native capability: artifact rejection), the Ergodic Domain S (asymptotic statistical invariants; native capability: stability estimation), and the Variational Domain V (finite-time Lyapunov exponent field; native capability: hemodynamic inference). We prove a Domain Sufficiency Theorem (the Parseval analog for attractor information) and establish that three domains are necessary and sufficient. Geometry Domain validation via the SCSI framework across 176,742 PPG segments from four datasets yields AUC = 0.757 [0.686-0.828] and NPV = 0.966 after correcting three systematic evaluation artifacts (+0.179 net inflation). Ablation confirms C_NL as the dominant Geometry Domain component (Delta AUC = -0.413) and intra-domain redundancy across five components.

</details>


### [830] [When Does a Video-Language Model Stop Watching? Reward Strength Controls the Formation and Reversal of Visual Shortcuts in Multimodal RLVR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22043)
*Zekun Xu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了多模态强化学习中视觉捷径（visual shortcut）的形成与逆转动力学，发现其具有陡峭的 onset、滞后样的不对称性，以及关键干预窗口期。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然已有文献记录了多模态RLVR中视觉感知被绕过的现象，但其如何形成、能否被逆转、何时干预仍然有效，这些问题尚不清楚。

Method: 将 grounding penalty 的强度 λ 作为控制旋钮，沿训练时间轴刻画视觉捷径的形成-逆转动力学，在留出的OOD诊断集上进行系统分析。

Result: (i) 陡峭 onset：捷径依赖在很窄的优化步骤窗口内突然出现，且跨随机种子鲁棒；(ii) 单调剂量-响应：增大λ渐进抑制捷径，中等剂量下轨迹先形成后逆转，呈现获取与移除之间的滞后不对称性；(iii) 关键干预窗口：onset 前施加惩罚可阻止捷径形成，而 consolidation 后效果显著减弱。

Conclusion: 视觉捷径崩塌并非二元缺陷，而是一个可控、时间依赖且不对称的过程，对多模态RLVR的何时以及多强地进行正则化有直接启示。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is increasingly applied to large vision-language models (LVLMs), yet outcome-only optimization can drive a model to stop attending to the video and instead exploit linguistic priors -- a failure we call a visual shortcut. While the existence of such perception bypass is by now documented, how it forms, whether it can be undone, and when intervention still helps remain open. We treat the strength of a grounding penalty, lambda, as a control knob and characterize the formation-reversal dynamics of visual shortcuts along the training time axis. On a held-out, out-of-distribution diagnostic set, we find: (i) a sharp onset -- shortcut reliance emerges abruptly over a narrow window of optimization steps and is robust across random seeds; (ii) a monotone dose-response -- increasing lambda progressively suppresses the shortcut, and at an intermediate dose the trajectory first forms and then reverses the shortcut, exposing a hysteresis-like asymmetry between acquiring and removing it; and (iii) a critical intervention window -- applying the penalty before onset arrests shortcut formation, whereas the same penalty applied after consolidation is markedly less effective. Together these results recast visual-shortcut collapse not as a binary defect but as a controllable, time-dependent, and asymmetric process, with direct implications for when and how strongly to regularize multimodal RLVR.

</details>


### [831] [Can Reasoning Models Detect Changes to their Chains of Thought?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22085)
*Sathvik Napa,Utkarsh Singh,Chengyuan Xue,Miriam Wanner,William Walden*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究发现，推理模型在检测自身思维链是否被篡改（例如预填充更强模型的推理或删除不安全步骤）时，检测能力非常有限，且难以识别具体修改类型，对自身和他人的修改检测能力相当。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 编辑模型思维链（CoT）有多种应用场景，但这些干预的成功与否可能取决于模型无法察觉篡改，否则模型可能改变自身行为。因此，需要研究推理模型能否检测到CoT干预。

Method: 在多种条件下测试推理模型检测CoT干预的能力：包括推理过程中和推理结束后，以及预填充自身CoT和其他模型CoT的场景。

Result: (i) 模型的检测准确率非常低；(ii) 模型难以识别CoT被修改的具体方式；(iii) 模型在检测自身CoT变化和检测其他模型CoT变化方面的能力相当。

Conclusion: 当前推理模型对CoT篡改的检测能力很弱，这为CoT编辑应用提供了可行性基础，但也意味着需要关注潜在的安全隐患。

Abstract: There are many reasons one may want to edit a model's chain of thought (CoT) -- e.g., to prefill it with reasoning from a stronger model or to remove steps that may yield unsafe outputs. The success of these interventions plausibly depends on a model's inability to notice them, as the model may alter its behavior if it suspects tampering. In this work, we study whether recent reasoning models are able to detect such interventions on their CoTs under a variety of conditions: both during reasoning and after it, and when prefilled both with their own CoTs and with those of other models. Broadly, we find that (i) models exhibit only very modest detection accuracy; (ii) models struggle to identify *how* their CoT was modified; and (iii) models are about as good at detecting changes to their own CoTs as to those of other models.

</details>


### [832] [Geometry-Aware Online Scheduling for LLM Serving: From Theoretical Bound to System Practice](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22327)
*Li Kong,Qi Qi,Yinyu Ye,Zijie Zhou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文针对大语言模型推理中KV缓存动态内存管理问题，提出几何感知在线调度算法SVF（Smallest Volume First）及其高效变体1-bit SVF，通过理论证明将最坏情况竞争比从48优化至5，并在vLLM中实现即插即用，显著降低平均和尾部延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推理系统依赖基于时间的调度启发式（如最短作业优先），但其理论最优性基于传统调度模型，无法捕捉LLM推理中KV缓存独特的二维时空几何增长特性，导致内存管理效率低下。

Method: 提出SVF（Smallest Volume First）算法，优先调度KV缓存体积最小的请求；提出1-bit SVF高效变体，仅需一位信息即可实现调度；采用新颖证明方法将最坏情况竞争比从48收紧至5；在vLLM中作为即插即用层集成。

Result: SVF显著降低平均和尾部延迟；1-bit SVF以极低信息量实现接近的吞吐量和延迟性能；理论竞争比从48优化至5；在Llama-3.1模型上经全面评估验证。

Conclusion: 本文建立了理论严谨且实验有效的内存约束调度方法，为现代LLM部署中的KV缓存管理提供了几何感知调度这一新范式。

Abstract: The explosive demand for interactive Large Language Model serving has highlighted the management of the Key-Value cache's dynamic memory footprint as a critical area for performance optimization in inference engines. Modern inference systems overwhelmingly rely on time-centric scheduling heuristics, such as Shortest Job First. However, their theoretical optimality is rooted in traditional schedule modeling, failing to capture the highly dynamic, 2D spatio-temporal geometric growth specific to LLM inference mechanisms. To resolve this, we propose the geometry-aware online scheduling by introducing the Smallest Volume First (SVF) algorithm and its highly efficient variant, 1-bit SVF. Theoretically, we provide a rigorous mathematical foundation for our approach. Utilizing a novel proof methodology, we tighten the worst-case competitive ratio ($\text{CR} \le 48 \rightarrow \text{CR} \le 5$) for SVF with known output lengths. Building upon this core breakthrough, we complete a comprehensive theoretical taxonomy analyzing our algorithms across different traffic scenarios and information availability. Practically, we seamlessly integrate our approach as a plug-and-play layer in vLLM. Extensive evaluations on Llama-3.1 models demonstrate comprehensive performance gains: SVF delivers strong reductions in both average and tail latency, while 1-bit SVF, with merely a single bit information, achieves competitive throughput and latency. This work establishes a theoretically sound and empirically proven approach for resolving memory-constrained scheduling in modern LLM deployments. To facilitate future research, our code is available at https://github.com/Aurora-Kl/Geometry-Aware-Online-Scheduling.git.

</details>


### [833] [Hypothesis-Driven Skill Optimization for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22330)
*Fangxin Shang,Yehui Yang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: HDSO是一个免训练框架，通过假设驱动的技能验证流程（技能策展人提出可证伪假设→实例化候选技能→配对控制/实验执行→审查差异→仅合并被支持的候选），使冻结的LLM智能体能安全地吸收外部技能。在ALFWorld上提升了+6.9（Qwen3-8B）和+4.0（Qwen3.6-27B）Avg. SR，且在20%随机翻转反馈下仍保持+7.1增益，并支持跨模型迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 外部技能可以提升行动型LLM智能体，但从稀疏或噪声轨迹中蒸馏的技能存在风险：一个看似合理的反思可能编码有用流程、虚假捷径或执行器无法可靠遵循的规则。现有方法缺乏对技能候选的系统验证机制。

Method: HDSO框架包含两个冻结的推理端点：技能策展人（curator）和执行器（executor）。策展人观察执行器轨迹→提出带验证计划的可证伪假设→实例化为候选技能包→通过配对控制组/实验组执行进行验证→审查行为差异→仅将受支持的候选合并到批准库。执行器通过渐进式披露（progressive disclosure）消费已批准技能，无技能选择时保留纯执行路径。

Result: 在ALFWorld上，HDSO对Qwen3-8B提升+6.9 Avg. SR，对Qwen3.6-27B提升+4.0。在20%随机翻转成功/失败反馈的鲁棒性测试中，Qwen3-8B仍保持+7.1增益。跨模型迁移和异质对诊断表明，经验证的技能库在生成环境之外也有用，但跨模型策展需要策展人诊断、执行器能力和验证证据三者对齐。

Conclusion: HDSO为冻结的行动型智能体提供了一个可审计的技能生命周期管理方法，而非无约束的记忆累积过程，证明了通过假设驱动验证可以安全有效地吸收外部技能。

Abstract: External skills can improve action-oriented LLM agents without changing model weights, but persistent skill updates are risky when they are distilled from sparse or noisy trajectories. A plausible reflection may encode a useful procedure, a spurious shortcut, or a rule that the target executor cannot reliably follow. We propose Hypothesis-Driven Skill Optimization (HDSO), a train-free framework in which both the skill curator and the agent executor are frozen inference endpoints. The curator observes executor traces, proposes a falsifiable hypothesis with an explicit validation plan, instantiates the hypothesis as a candidate skill package, validates the package through paired control/treatment executions, reviews behavior differences, and consolidates only supported candidates into an approved repository. The executor consumes approved skills through progressive disclosure, preserving the executor-only path when no skill is selected. On ALFWorld, HDSO improves executor-only baselines by +6.9 Avg. SR points for Qwen3-8B and +4.0 points for Qwen3.6-27B. Under 20% randomly flipped success/failure feedback during skill discovery and validation, HDSO preserves a +7.1-point gain for Qwen3-8B. Transfer and heterogeneous-pair diagnostics further show that validated repositories can be useful beyond the run that produced them, but cross-model curation succeeds only when curator diagnosis, executor capability, and validation evidence align. HDSO provides an auditable skill lifecycle for frozen action agents rather than an unconstrained memory accumulation procedure.

</details>


### [834] [Reference-Free Assessment of Physical Consistency in World Model-based Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22363)
*Yun Oh,Sukmin Yun*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出无需参考视频的物理一致性评估方法，结合相对与绝对评估，利用DROID-SLAM和SEA-RAFT量化物理不一致性，筛选后视频任务成功率提升超8%，并能实现时空定位可视化物理伪影。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频生成评估方法（如Elo、FVD）要么依赖昂贵人工投票，要么需要不可获取的参考视频；且物理保真度不足导致仿真环境无法准确复现VLA模型在真实任务中的成功率。

Method: 提出无需参考的物理一致性评估指标，结合相对评估与绝对评估。利用DROID-SLAM和SEA-RAFT来量化物理不一致性，基于WorldScore思路进行实现。

Result: 经相对一致性评估筛选后的视频，任务成功率提升超8%，有效缩小了仿真到现实的差距。绝对评估可实现时空定位，可视化物理伪影发生的时空位置。

Conclusion: 该方法无需参考视频或人工标注，能有效评估生成视频的物理一致性，缩小仿真与现实差距，并提供可解释的时空定位能力。

Abstract: We introduce reference-free measures for evaluating the physical consistency of generated videos, combining relative and absolute approaches to assess fidelity. Although tools like WorldGym or WorldEval enable robotic simulation via video generation, physical fidelity gaps often prevent these environments from accurately reproducing real-world task success rates of VLA models. Unlike existing evaluation methods, which require costly human voting (Elo) or unavailable ground-truth references (FVD), our approach utilizes DROID-SLAM and SEA-RAFT to quantify physical inconsistencies, motivated by WorldScore. Videos filtered using our relative consistency assessment show an improvement in task success rates of over 8%, effectively narrowing the simulation-to-reality gap. Furthermore, our absolute assessment enables spatio-temporal localization, providing visualization of when and where physical artifacts occur.

</details>


### [835] [ARIA: A Causal-Aware Framework for Rescuing LLM Reasoning in Trustworthy Materials Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22375)
*Yi Cao,Liaoyaqi Wang,Jieneng Chen,Benjamin Van Durme,Alan Yuille,Paulette Clancy*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了ARIA框架，通过因果感知的三级级联机制（直接因果推理、物理启发的类比迁移、显式参数回退）解决LLM在材料发现中的"上下文隧道"问题，在2D材料的前向预测和逆向设计任务上优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成模型在材料发现中常违反物理因果性，LLM结合知识图谱时会出现"上下文隧道"现象——模型过度锚定狭窄的检索证据而抑制全局物理推理。

Method: 提出ARIA框架，包含三级级联：(i) 当存在完整的Process-Structure-Property因果链时进行直接因果推理；(ii) 对于稀疏或新型材料系统采用物理启发的类比迁移；(iii) 外部证据不完整时使用显式参数回退。构建了含2,839个PSP关系的知识图谱进行验证。

Result: ARIA缓解了上下文隧道现象，在2D材料的前向预测和逆向设计任务上优于无增强和朴素KG增强基线，结合在线文献搜索时获得进一步提升，且产生可审计的因果迹线。

Conclusion: ARIA实现了物理可信、可追溯的AI辅助材料发现，为因果感知的AI在材料科学中的应用提供了有效范式。

Abstract: Generative models have revolutionized the process of materials discovery, yet they often fail to satisfy underlying physical causality. Through an analysis of Large Language Models (LLMs) augmented with knowledge graphs derived from current literature, we uncover a phenomenon termed contextual tunneling, where models "over-anchor" on narrow, retrieved evidence while suppressing global physical reasoning. To address this problem, we introduce ARIA, a causal-aware framework that conditions knowledge use on mechanistic completeness. ARIA routes each query through a three-tier cascade: (i) direct causal reasoning when complete evidence chains of Process-Structure-Property (PSP) are available, (ii) physics-informed analogical transfer for sparse or novel material systems, and (iii) explicit parametric fallback when external evidence is incomplete. As a proof of concept, we construct a Knowledge Graph (KG) containing 2,839 extracted PSP relations from peer-reviewed articles in the materials literature and evaluate ARIA on forward prediction and inverse design tasks for two-dimensional (2D) materials. ARIA mitigates contextual tunneling, improves over unaugmented and naive KG-augmented baselines, and provides further gains when an online literature search is used for evidence enrichment. Crucially, ARIA produces auditable causal traces, enabling physically grounded and trustworthy AI-assisted materials discovery.

</details>


### [836] [MetaPS: Adaptive Programmatic Strategy Selection for Market Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22385)
*Jiaxiang Chen,Aotian Luo,Zhouyi Zheng,Weiyi Huang,Chi Zhang,Zenglin Xu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了MetaPS框架，通过模拟市场环境为每个状态选择最佳程序化交易策略，将策略选择转化为监督微调数据，使小模型也能超越大模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 没有单一市场策略永远获胜，直接让LLM生成市场动作效果不佳，因此需要一种可执行的决策范式，让智能体从程序化策略库中选择合适的策略。

Method: MetaPS分两阶段：(1) 在模拟/回测市场中rollout候选策略，识别哪些状态下特定策略能带来更好未来结果，构建状态-策略对的监督微调数据；(2) 推理时仅观察当前市场状态，无需查询模拟器，直接选择策略程序并执行。

Result: 在0.8B到9B参数规模上一致提升，超越固定策略基线、直接决策代理和基于API的LLM代理；小规模微调模型甚至超过更强的API模型。

Conclusion: 市场模拟可以为学习自适应、可解释、可执行的策略选择提供可扩展且有针对性的监督信号。

Abstract: No single market strategy always wins: momentum, mean reversion, risk control,and event-driven rules can each succeed or fail as market conditions change.Rather than asking large language models to directly generate market actions,we study an executable decision paradigm where an agent selects from a library of programmatic strategies, each implemented as a code module mapping market observations to actions.We propose \textbf{MetaPS}, a simulation-guided framework for adaptive programmatic strategy selection. MetaPS rolls out candidate strategies in simulated or backtested markets, identifies states where particular strategies lead to better future outcomes, and converts these state--strategy pairs into supervised fine-tuning data. During inference, the simulator is no longer queried: MetaPS observes only the current market state and candidate strategy context, selects a suitable strategy program, and the selected program produces the final action. Experiments on multi-stock trading and a controlled goods-exchange sandbox show that MetaPS consistently improves across model scales from 0.8B to 9B parameters. It outperforms fixed-strategy baselines, direct decision-making agents, and prompted API-based LLM agents; in several settings, compact fine-tuned models even surpass stronger API models. These results demonstrate that market simulations can provide scalable and targeted supervision for learning adaptive, interpretable, and executable strategy selection.

</details>


### [837] [PlanBench-XL: Evaluating Long-Horizon Planning of LLM Tool-Use Agents in Large-Scale Tool Ecosystems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22388)
*Jiayu Liu,Qihan Lin,Cheng Qian,Rui Wang,Emre Can Acikgoz,Xiaocheng Yang,Jiateng Liu,Zhenhailong Wang,Xiusi Chen,Heng Ji,Dilek Hakkani-Tür*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PlanBench-XL 是一个包含327个零售任务和1665个工具的交互式基准，用于评估LLM代理在大型工具生态系统中迭代检索、调用工具并在动态环境中自适应规划的能力。实验表明，即使GPT-5.4在无阻塞环境下也仅达到51.90%准确率，而在最严重阻塞条件下骤降至11.36%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准很少评估代理在检索受限的工具可见性下的规划能力，而现实世界中的LLM代理需要在大型工具生态系统中发现相关工具、推断隐式子目标，并在长时间跨度内适应动态环境。

Method: 构建了包含327个零售任务和1665个工具的交互式基准PlanBench-XL，要求代理迭代检索可用工具、调用工具以发现中间证据并最终达成目标。引入可选阻塞机制，通过缺失、失败或干扰工具函数模拟现实世界的不确定性，迫使代理检测中断路径并在运行时自适应。

Result: 对十个领先LLM的实验表明，GPT-5.4在无阻塞条件下准确率为51.90%，在最严重阻塞条件下骤降至11.36%。代理在缺乏明确错误信号的失败场景或需要更长替代工具路径来恢复时尤为脆弱。

Conclusion: PlanBench-XL可作为诊断代理规划失败的测试平台，突显了在大型、不完美的工具环境中进行长时程任务时，鲁棒自适应规划的必要性。

Abstract: LLM agents increasingly operate in large tool ecosystems, where real-world tasks require discovering relevant tools, inferring implicit sub-goals, and adapting to dynamic environments over long horizons. However, existing benchmarks rarely evaluate planning under retrieval-limited tool visibility. To address this gap, we introduce PlanBench-XL, an interactive benchmark of 327 retail tasks over 1,665 tools that tests whether agents can iteratively retrieve usable tools, invoke them to uncover intermediate evidence for subsequent calls toward the final goal. PlanBench-XL further features an optional blocking mechanism that simulates real-world unpredictability through missing, failing, or distracting tool functions, forcing agents to detect disrupted paths and adapt at runtime. Experiments on ten leading LLMs show that massive-tool planning remains challenging: while GPT-5.4 achieves 51.90% accuracy in block-free settings, it collapses to 11.36% under the most severe blocking condition. Further analysis shows that agents are especially vulnerable when failures lack explicit error signals or when recovery requires longer alternative tool-use paths. These results establish PlanBench-XL as a testbed for diagnosing agentic planning failures and highlight the need for robust adaptive planning in long-horizon tasks with large, imperfect tool environments.

</details>


### [838] [Code Isn't Memory: A Structural Codebase Index Inside a Coding Agent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22417)
*Ishaan Bhola,Adithyan Krishnan,Sravanth Kurmala,Mukunda NS*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过严格消融实验证明，在固定编码Agent框架中引入结构化代码库索引（Structural Codebase Index）能够在不增加成本的前提下显著提升定位准确率和解决率，且性能不逊于基于agentic grep的基线方法。关键发现是：索引方案的成本/解决率比反而更低，其部署价值取决于任务是否涉及多文件变更。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前编码Agent系统广泛使用各种检索方法，但检索实现差异很大，缺乏对结构化代码库索引本身贡献的严格量化评估。作者希望回答：在固定框架和模型下，添加结构化代码库索引到底能否改变成本或解决率？

Method: 在SWE-PolyBench Verified和SWE-bench Pro两个基准上，固定使用Claude Opus 4.7模型，设计三组对比实验：（1）带结构化索引的Agent框架；（2）同一框架去掉索引；（3）agentic grep基线。每组运行三个随机种子，在泄露审计的隔离沙箱中执行，并进行细粒度的per-cell成本记录和定位指标提取。

Result: 框架内消融显示索引带来显著的定位提升和统计上可分离的解决率提升，且每个单元无额外成本代价、每次解决的成本更低。跨框架对比显示索引在解决率和定位上均不逊于agentic grep基线，同样没有成本惩罚。

Conclusion: 结构化代码库索引的部署问题不在于是否太贵（实际上它的每解决成本低于agentic grep），而在于工作负载是否包含多文件变更任务——只有在这种场景下，结构化排序的优势才能充分体现。

Abstract: Coding agents now interleave LLMs with retrieval over the working repository, and retrieval implementations vary widely across deployed harnesses. Inside a fixed coding-agent harness on a fixed model, does adding a structural codebase index actually change cost or resolve? We ran three arms (the harness with the index, the same harness without it, and an agentic-grep comparator) on SWE-PolyBench Verified and SWE-bench Pro with Claude Opus 4.7 held fixed throughout, across three seeds, inside a leak-audited per-task sandbox. The within-harness ablation produces a large localization gain and a statistically separated resolve gain, with no cost penalty per cell and lower cost per solve. The cross-harness check shows that the index does not regress against an agentic-grep baseline on resolve or localization, again at no cost penalty. We release the per-cell exclusion ledger, the leak-audit script, the localization extractor, and the results database. The deployment question for a structural codebase index is thus not whether it is too expensive to run (across seeds, the index lands at a lower $/solved than agentic grep) but whether the workload includes multi-file changes where structural ranking pays off.

</details>


### [839] [SVGym (SciVerseGym): An Environment for Reinforcement Learning and Bayesian Optimization in Crystal Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22425)
*Bin Cao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SciVerseGym是一个兼容Gymnasium的晶体发现环境，将晶体设计视为马尔可夫决策过程，支持多种原子级编辑操作和可配置评估器，为强化学习、贝叶斯优化等搜索方法提供标准化测试平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的闭环晶体搜索方法分散在不同的定制化管道中，缺乏统一和标准化的环境，阻碍了可重复性和扩展性。

Method: 将晶体发现建模为马尔可夫决策过程，开发Gymnasium兼容环境SciVerseGym，支持元素替换、晶格扰动、原子位移、空位创建和原子插入等操作，提供可配置化学空间、结构池、观测方式、奖励函数以及可选的弛豫和稳定性诊断。

Result: 实现了标准化的(obs, reward, terminated, truncated, info)元组反馈，支持多种机器学习势函数和ASE兼容计算器，可用于强化学习、贝叶斯优化、进化搜索和语言智能体工作流。

Conclusion: SciVerseGym通过解耦智能体逻辑与材料基础设施，为闭环晶体发现提供了开放、可重复、可扩展的测试平台。

Abstract: Machine-learned interatomic potentials now enable efficient atomistic evaluation for interactive materials discovery, yet closed-loop crystal search methods remain fragmented across bespoke pipelines for editing, relaxation, scoring, constraints, and bookkeeping. We introduce SciVerseGym, a Gymnasium-compatible environment for sequential crystal discovery that frames crystal design as a Markov decision process. Agents observe an atomistic structure, apply chemically meaningful edits, and receive feedback from a configurable evaluator. SciVerseGym supports local and global actions, including elemental substitution, lattice perturbation, atomic displacement, vacancy creation, and atom insertion, along with configurable chemical spaces, structure pools, atomistic and graph-based observations, custom rewards, optional relaxation, and stability or phonon-related diagnostics. Each step applies an edit, evaluates the candidate using a machine-learned interatomic potential or any ASE-compatible calculator, and returns the standard (obs, reward, terminated, truncated, info) tuple. By decoupling agent logic from materials infrastructure, SciVerseGym provides an open, reproducible, and extensible testbed for reinforcement learning, Bayesian optimization, evolutionary search, and language-agent workflows in closed-loop crystal discovery. Code is available at: https://github.com/Bin-Cao/SciVerseGym.

</details>


### [840] [Efficient Multimodal Clinical Question Answering for Pulmonary Embolism Risk Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22442)
*Xiangyuan Xue,Yang Yu,Yan Gao,Junyan Wang,Bin Chen,Lingyan Ruan,Ting Dang,Hong Jia*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文构建了基于多模态大语言模型的肺栓塞（PE）诊断与预后评估基准，在包含23,248例CTPA研究的INSPECT数据集上，评估了高效多模态大语言模型在零样本和少样本提示下的8项任务性能，发现Gemma4模型在结合CTPA和EHR数据时表现最佳，但预后任务（尤其是再入院预测）仍具挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 肺栓塞（PE）的诊疗需要同时依赖CTPA影像、放射科报告和电子健康记录（EHR）等多模态信息，但现有研究缺乏对此类多模态语言模型在PE场景下的系统性评估。

Method: 使用INSPECT多模态PE数据集（23,248例CTPA，19,402名患者），设计8项诊断和预后任务，在CTPA-Only、EHR-Only、CTPA+EHR三种输入设置下，对高效多模态大语言模型（如Gemma4系列）进行零样本和少样本提示评估。

Result: Gemma4 E4B和E2B在加入EHR证据后表现显著提升，尤其在CTPA+EHR联合输入下最优；诊断任务表现优于预后任务，其中再入院预测难度最大。

Conclusion: 紧凑型多模态模型在早期PE风险检测和解释方面具有巨大潜力，但预后任务的性能仍有提升空间。

Abstract: Pulmonary embolism (PE) is a high risk cardiopulmonary condition whose management requires both timely diagnosis and reliable assessment of future clinical risk. Because PE care routinely combines computed tomography pulmonary angiography (CTPA), radiology interpretation, and longitudinal electronic health record (EHR) evidence, it provides a clinically meaningful setting for evaluating compact multimodal language models. In this work, we build a benchmark using efficient multimodal large language models (MLLMs) on INSPECT, a multimodal PE dataset containing 23,248 CTPA studies from 19,402 patients. We formulate eight diagnostic and prognostic tasks as structured clinical question answering problems and evaluate on typical efficient MLLMs under CTPA-Only, EHR-Only, and CTPA+EHR settings with zero-shot and few-shot prompting. Results show that Gemma4 E4B and Gemma4 E2B perform more strongly when EHR evidence is available, especially under CTPA+EHR input. Task level analysis further shows that PE diagnosis achieves higher performance than prognostic tasks, particularly readmission prediction. These observations suggest that compact multimodal models have the great potential in early stage PE risk detection and explanation.

</details>


### [841] [A Differentiable Atari VCS:A Complex, Fully Known Ground Truth for Explainable AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22447)
*Andreas Maier,Siming Bayer,Patrick Krauss*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文通过构建两个完全可微分的Atari 2600模拟器（jutari和jaxtari），解决了XAI中"可解释系统太简单，复杂系统无真实参照"的困境，为基于梯度的可解释AI提供了兼具复杂性与完全可验证性的研究平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的XAI研究面临两难：简单的可解释系统（如决策树）机制已知但过于平凡，无法检验解释方法的有效性；而真正复杂的系统（如深度网络）虽然需要XAI，但缺乏内部运作的"真实答案"（ground truth），导致解释可能看似合理却无法验证对错。作者希望打破这一僵局，创造一个既复杂又完全透明的研究对象。

Method: 作者重新实现Atari 2600 VCS（一种真实计算机架构，也是深度强化学习的发源地），构建了两个独立且端到端可微分的模拟器：Julia版（jutari）和JAX版（jaxtari）。每个模拟器都经过逐比特验证，在全部64个ALE游戏上与基线xitari完全一致（64/64字节级RAM一致，64/64像素级屏幕一致）。将卡带ROM视为权重张量、RAM视为软磁带、控制流视为门控，证明了可微（软）执行在任意有限温度下与前向传播中的原始（硬）执行逐比特等价，同时暴露了比特逻辑原本没有的代理梯度。JAX版本还支持GPU批处理，单张消费级GPU上可达百万环境步/秒。

Result: 两个模拟器在64个ALE游戏上均实现位级精确复现；JAX版本在单GPU上达到百万级环境步/秒的批量可微滚动速度；整个系统在约29日历天、137活跃小时内完成构建，大量代码由AI编码助手自动编写；论文通过理论证明和定性梯度研究展示了基于梯度的XAI在该平台上的可行性。

Conclusion: 该工作建立并验证了一个兼具真正复杂性和完全可观测性的研究基础平台，为梯度类XAI方法提供了理想测试床。所有代码已开源（MIT协议）。

Abstract: Explanation requires ground truth: to verify an account of a system we must know its inner functioning-just what is missing where explainable AI (XAI) is most needed. Systems we can study fall into two camps. Simple, procedural one-decision trees, rule lists, sparse linear models-have a known but trivial mechanism, so explaining them tests nothing; genuinely complex ones-deep networks, real-world tasks-need XAI but have no ground-truth inner functioning, so an explanation can be plausible, confident, and wrong with no way to tell. We remove this dichotomy with a study object both genuinely complex and fully specified-inspectable by construction-and, so gradient methods apply, fully differentiable. We reimplement the Atari 2600 Video Computer System (VCS)-a real computer architecture, and the cradle of deep reinforcement learning-as two independent end-to-end differentiable emulators in Julia (jutari) and JAX (jaxtari), each validated bit-for-bit against xitari. Both reproduce xitari on all 64 supported Arcade Learning Environment (ALE) games: 64/64 byte-identical RAM and 64/64 pixel-identical screens. Treating the cartridge ROM as a weight tensor, RAM as a soft tape, and control flow as gates, we prove the differentiable (soft) execution equals the original (hard) one bit-for-bit in the forward pass at any finite temperature, while exposing surrogate gradients where the bit logic has none. The JAX port also opens a GPU path: batched differentiable rollouts reach millions of environment-steps/s on one commodity GPU. The system was built in roughly 137 active hours over 29 calendar days, much of it written autonomously by coding agents. This paper builds and validates the foundation, showing-theoretically and in a qualitative gradient study-that gradient-based XAI on it is feasible. Both ports' full code is available under the MIT license at https://github.com/akmaier/UnderstandingVCS.

</details>


### [842] [Self-Evolving Cognitive Framework via Causal World Modeling for Embodied Scientific Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22449)
*Yi Yu,Tetsunari Inamura*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向具身科学智能的自我进化认知框架，通过因果世界建模、干预驱动推理和持续认知精炼三个互补组件，使智能体能够从预测智能转向认知智能，在与环境的交互中持续构建和修正内部因果表征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有具身世界模型主要优化预测目标，限制了其在分布偏移下的泛化能力和对未见情境及假设干预的系统性推理能力。作者认为具身智能应超越预测性世界建模，走向自我进化的认知系统。

Method: 提出一个自我进化认知框架，包含三个核心组件：1) 因果世界建模 - 构建环境因果结构；2) 干预驱动因果推理 - 通过干预实验进行推理；3) 持续认知精炼 - 利用因果发现、干预反馈和反事实推理不断修正和扩展内部因果模型。将具身交互重新解释为因果假设生成、干预驱动实验和持续知识获得的认知过程。

Result: 该工作提供了一个概念性和理论性基础，用于从预测智能向认知智能的转变；提出了一个干预驱动的因果-认知基准测试范式，用于评估自我进化的具身科学智能。

Conclusion: 智能应通过与环境交互来持续构建、修正和精炼因果世界模型的过程中涌现，从而实现从预测智能到认知智能的根本性范式转变。

Abstract: Current embodied world models are primarily optimized for predictive objectives, limiting their ability to generalize under distribution shifts and reason systematically about unseen situations and hypothetical interventions. We argue that embodied intelligence should move beyond predictive world modeling toward self-evolving cognitive systems that continually construct and refine internal causal representations through interaction with the environment. To this end, we propose a self-evolving cognitive framework via causal world modeling for embodied scientific intelligence, which integrates three complementary components: causal world modeling, intervention-driven causal reasoning, and continual cognitive refinement. The proposed framework continuously revises and expands its internal causal world model through causal discovery, intervention-driven feedback, and counterfactual reasoning, supporting continual cognitive refinement and enabling cognition itself to evolve over time. Furthermore, we reinterpret embodied interaction not merely as a means of trajectory optimization, but as an epistemic process for causal hypothesis generation, intervention-driven experimentation, and continual knowledge acquisition. This work provides a conceptual and theoretical foundation for a transition from predictive intelligence toward epistemic intelligence, in which intelligence emerges through the continual construction, revision, and refinement of causal world models via interaction with the environment. Accordingly, an intervention-driven causal-epistemic benchmarking paradigm is suggested for evaluating self-evolving embodied scientific intelligence.

</details>


### [843] [PRIME: Evaluating Prompt Resolution Under Incompatible Instructions in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22470)
*Tehreem Javed,Shumaim Fatimah,Masooma Bakhtiari,Gibrail Islam,Mehwish Fatima*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出PRIME框架，系统评估大语言模型在面对冲突指令时的行为，发现冲突类型比模型规模对行为影响更大，且存在多种失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的指令遵循评估基准只孤立评估元指令，无法揭示模型如何处理冲突指令，因此需要系统性的冲突指令评估框架。

Method: 提出PRIME框架，在响应长度、输出格式和推理三个维度上制造校准过的冲突，用确定性行为分类法对模型响应进行分类，在平衡和自然分布两种设置下评估5个开放权重指令微调模型。

Result: 冲突类型比模型规模对行为影响更显著，不同冲突类别存在不同的失败模式。

Conclusion: 研究强调了发展冲突感知能力的重要性，表明仅通过孤立约束无法全面评估LLM的指令遵循能力。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often encounter conflicting prompts, although current instruction following benchmarks assess those meta-instructions in isolation, limiting the insights about how models process conflicting instructions. We introduce a framework \textit{PRIME}(\textit{Prompt Resolution under Incompatible Meta-Instructions Evaluation}) to analyze behavior of LLMs when provided with conflicting instructions. \textit{PRIME} purposefully produces calibrated conflicts across response length, output format, and reasoning; classifying model responses with a deterministic behavioral taxonomy. We are evaluating five instruction tuned open weight LLMs in two distinct settings, balanced and naturally distributed. The conclusion we reach upon analysis is that conflict type is more significant in affecting behavior than model scale, and various failure modes across different categories of conflict. Our findings emphasize the value of developing conflict awareness and suggest ability of LLM to follow instructions cannot be assessed through isolated constraints alone.

</details>


### [844] [VADAOrchestra: Neurosymbolic Orchestration of Adaptive Reasoning Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22485)
*Teodoro Baldazzi,Luigi Bellomarini,Andrea Coletta,Michela Iezzi,Carsten Maple,Alessandro Pesare,Emanuel Sallinger*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: VADAOrchestra是一个神经符号框架，结合LLM的灵活性与Datalog+/-符号推理的严谨性，通过动态规划工作流并解耦高层编排与符号推理，实现可审计、可扩展、可解释的复杂决策过程，在金融场景中验证了其忠实性、可扩展性和可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统BPM系统严格但缺乏运行时适应性，而基于LLM的智能体系统灵活但不可靠且扩展性差。为结合两者优势，论文提出VADAOrchestra，解决动态决策中灵活性与可审计性难以兼得的问题。

Method: 采用神经符号混合架构：LLM编排器增量式规划并调整工作流，将其编码为Datalog+/-逻辑程序（谓词对应工具调用，规则表示领域依赖与动态合成逻辑），再由符号引擎执行推理，实现高层编排与底层推理的解耦。

Result: 在真实金融用例上评估，VADAOrchestra在忠实性、可扩展性和可解释性方面均优于标准智能体架构。

Conclusion: 该框架成功融合了BPM的严谨可审计性与LLM的灵活性，通过符号推理提供可验证的推理轨迹，并通过解耦设计缓解了大规模数据上的扩展性问题。

Abstract: Decision-making in real-world settings rarely follows a fixed script. Instead, it unfolds as a dynamic reasoning process in which the appropriate course of action evolves as new context and data become available. Traditional Business Process Management systems provide rigor, determinism, and auditability, yet they generally struggle to adapt their execution at runtime. Conversely, agentic systems based on Large Language Models (LLMs) bring flexibility to decision-making, but they are inherently opaque, often unreliable, and suffer from significant scalability constraints when operating over large datasets. To combine these complementary paradigms, we introduce VADAOrchestra, a neurosymbolic framework that models complex workflows as evolving reasoning processes. The framework adopts a hybrid approach: given a user query and a collection of data sources, an LLM-based orchestrator incrementally plans and adapts the workflow. This is encoded as a logic program in a fragment of Datalog+/- where predicates correspond to tool invocations and rules represent both predefined domain dependencies and logic constructs synthesized on demand to manipulate intermediate results. All logical inference tasks are then executed by a state-of-the-art Datalog+/- symbolic engine. This approach provides a verifiable reasoning trace, supporting the auditability and reproducibility of the entire process. Furthermore, by decoupling high-level orchestration from symbolic inference, it addresses scalability concerns, enabling complex reasoning over large datasets through targeted data querying. We evaluate VADAOrchestra on real-world financial use cases, demonstrating faithfulness, scalability, and explainability compared to standard agentic architectures.

</details>


### [845] [SCOPE: Evolving Symbolic World for Planning in Open-Ended Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22488)
*Yundaichuan Zhan,Minghe Gao,Zhongqi Yue,Wendong Bu,Wenqiao Zhang,Guoming Wang,Jisheng Dang,Juncheng Li,Siliang Tang,Yueting Zhuang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SCOPE是一个自适应的符号规划框架，通过符号执行模拟器和自适应符号记忆两大模块，在开放环境中不断优化动作计划和完善符号世界表征，显著提升了规划成功率和跨任务适应性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM结合经典规划器的方法在开放环境中，从感知获得的符号表征往往不完整，导致规划性能次优。

Method: 提出SCOPE框架，包含两个协同模块：1) 符号执行模拟器(SESim)进行符号验证和实际执行，利用反馈优化计划并演化符号世界；2) 自适应符号记忆(SASMem)蒸馏反馈为演化中的符号知识，增强长程规划和符号世界建模。

Result: 在开放环境实验中，SCOPE显著提升了符号世界的完整性、环境扰动下的规划成功率，以及跨任务的基础适应能力。

Conclusion: SCOPE通过自我演化的符号世界和迭代式规划优化，有效解决了开放环境中符号表征不完整的问题，提升了长程规划性能。
