The ASP implementation is evaluated against two baselines applied to our joint model: a SOTA Mixed Integer Programming (MIP) model and an iterative CASA-based heuristic. Computational experiments utilize an instance generator fitted to historical OpenSky Network flight data. Our results indicate that the ASP model outperforms the MIP model, while ASP remains competitive against heuristics on small instances. Furthermore, while DAC has the largest improvement on solving performance compared to rerouting and delaying, unrestricted variants of DAC or rerouting lead to search space thrashing.

</details>


### [881] [A Stackelberg Framework for Resource-Aware LLM Agents: Learning, Repair, and Conditional Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23026)
*Baoxun Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出将大语言模型代理的资源管理形式化为上下文Stackelberg博弈，通过控制器设定质量目标与成本激励、执行者响应资源动作，并采用条件响应模型学习、领导者策略优化及真实API校准修复的方法，在300轮实验中实现平均token成本降低17.4%且质量无显著下降。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM代理在有限计算预算下需要管理上下文、提示词长度和工具访问等资源，而静态阈值方法在面对异构任务和变化的会话状态时表现脆弱，亟需一种自适应的资源治理框架。

Method: 将资源治理建模为上下文Stackelberg博弈（控制器为领导者，执行者为跟随者）；学习条件响应模型预测执行者行为；优化领导者策略；通过真实API校准和经验性动作集投影进行策略修复。

Result: 在300轮真实API实验中，相比保守基线，修复后的控制器平均token成本降低17.4%（Welch p=0.022），质量差异无统计学显著性（p=0.44）。

Conclusion: 该方法在有限博弈中建立了均衡存在性、跟随者响应稳定性、安全集投影和从替代环境到真实环境的迁移等条件性理论保证；实验证据支持一个有前景的修复操作点，但尚未能证明真实系统中的均衡状态。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly operate as multi-turn systems that must allocate context, prompt verbosity, and tool access under finite computational budgets. Static thresholds are simple, but they are brittle under heterogeneous tasks and evolving session states. We formulate resource governance as a contextual Stackelberg game: a controller commits to a quality target and a cost incentive, while an executor responds with resource actions over context, prompting, and tool usage. We learn a conditional response model, optimize a leader policy against that model, and repair the resulting policy using real-API calibration and projection onto an empirically selected action set. For the restricted game, we establish conditional guarantees for equilibrium existence, follower-response stability, safe-set projection, and transfer from a surrogate environment to the real environment under bounded value error. The primary real-API experiment comprises 300 evaluated turns. Relative to a conservative baseline, the selected repaired controller reduces mean token cost by 17.4% (Welch $p=0.022$), while the measured quality difference is not statistically significant ($p=0.44$). The theoretical results are conditional and the experiments do not estimate their regret or transfer constants; consequently, the evidence establishes a promising repaired operating point, not a certified real-system equilibrium.

</details>


### [882] [From numerical proportions to analogical proportions between probabilities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23029)
*Henri Prade,Gilles Richard*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了概率空间中的类比比例（analogical proportions），探讨了概率值及概率分布之间的类比关系，并实验验证了当四个对象构成类比比例时，其对应的概率分布也倾向于构成类比比例，为基于类比比例的分类方法提供了新视角。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 类比比例在布尔、数值、向量等表示形式中已有广泛研究，但概率表示下的类比比例尚未被系统探索。本文旨在填补这一空白，研究概率值与概率分布之间的类比关系。

Method: 文章定义了概率类比比例的两种基本形式：基于算术比例的类比和基于算术与几何比例组合的类比，并讨论了其他可选定义。通过理论分析性质，并在实验中将每个对象关联到一个描述离散属性频率的概率分布，检验分布之间是否保持类比比例。

Result: 理论推导了概率类比比例的定义性质，实验结果表明当四个对象构成类比比例时，其对应的概率分布也倾向于形成类比比例，支持了基于类比比例的分类方法的可扩展性。

Conclusion: 概率表示下的类比比例具有理论合理性和实际可行性，有望将类比推理方法扩展到概率数据领域，提升分类等任务的预测能力。

Abstract: Analogical proportions link four items a, b, c, d by a relation stating that ``a is to b as c is to d", a, b, c, d being the formal representation of real world entities, ranging from simple numerical values to more complex structures such as profiles. Accordingly, $a, b, c, d$ could be atomic values like Boolean, nominal or numerical values, more generally vectors of such values, or even families of items represented by logical formulas. In this paper, we consider another representation setting, which is the probabilistic one. Precisely, the article proposes a study of {analogical} proportions between probabilities, whether they are simply between probability values, or between distributions (which requires the preservation of their normalization). More particularly, we study the properties of definitions based on arithmetic proportion, or on a combination of the former with geometric proportion, while other options are also discussed. Previous works have shown that when four profiles a, b, c, d, represented as vectors, form analogical proportions componentwise, it is likely that their classes form an analogical proportion also. This is the basis of an analogical proportion-based classification method that can produce accurate predictions. Similarly, in this paper, each profile is associated with a distribution describing the frequencies of the possible values of a discrete attribute of interest. We then discuss and experimentally investigate if the distributions associated to four profiles forming an analogical proportion themselves also form an analogical proportion.

</details>


### [883] [IPO Finance Agent: Evaluation of LLM Financial Analysts beyond Finance Agent v2, with Automated Rubric Generation -- the Case of the SpaceX (SPCX) IPO](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23032)
*Mostapha Benhenda*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出IPO Finance Agent，针对IPO尽职调查场景扩展了Finance Agent v2框架，通过上下文检索改进长文档处理，构建1000个IPO问题数据集，并引入评估器-优化器管线自动生成评估标准。最佳模型Qwen 3.7 Max达到79.4%准确率（$0.30/查询），远超原基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Finance Agent v2仅处理上市公司定期报告（10-K/10-Q），使用朴素分块检索，无法应对IPO尽职调查中S-1文件的独特挑战（包含历史财务报表、治理结构、会计处理、资本形成叙述和风险披露，且文档长度远超定期报告）。

Method: 1) 采用上下文检索（contextual retrieval）替代朴素分块检索，提升长文档处理能力；2) 构建1000个IPO尽职调查问题数据集（公开70个SpaceX S-1问题，其余私有防污染）；3) 引入评估器-优化器管线：从多模型答案集合中提取候选事实，合并为草案标准，再通过LLM反馈迭代修复遗漏、幻觉、层级错误和冗余，最后由人工审核。

Result: 最佳模型Qwen 3.7 Max达79.4%准确率（$0.30/查询），最经济模型MiMo-2.5 Pro达76.8%（$0.05/查询），均远超原Finance Agent v2基准（Gemini 3.5 Flash: 57.9%, $2.51/查询），且成本低于原框架最便宜方案（MiniMax M3: 48.3%, $0.32）。

Conclusion: IPO Finance Agent在任务领域和检索架构上有效扩展了现有框架，解决了长文档IPO尽职调查的核心痛点，且代码和数据已开源供复现。

Abstract: Finance Agent v2 (by Vals AI) has emerged as the reference benchmark for evaluating both Anthropic Claude and OpenAI ChatGPT frontier language models on financial tasks. However, it narrowly deals with periodic reporting from publicly traded companies (SEC 10-K and 10-Q filings), and its agentic harness relies on naive, unenriched chunk retrieval. Neither the task design nor the retrieval approach addresses the distinct challenges of IPO due diligence. SEC S-1 filings combine historical financial statements, governance structures, pro forma and common-control accounting treatments, capital-formation narratives, and underwriting-sensitive risk disclosures within substantially longer documents than typical periodic filings. That is why we introduce IPO Finance Agent, which extends the Finance Agent v2 framework along two directions: task domain and retrieval architecture. During our experiments, the original Finance Agent v2 harness basically failed to deliver any output related to the SpaceX S-1 filing, due to document length. We therefore had to improve the agentic harness with contextual retrieval, a more realistic and industry-standard approach for long documents. We also built a dataset of 1,000 IPO-diligence questions, and publicly release 70 questions on the SpaceX (SPCX) S-1 filing to support reproducibility, while the remainder are held private to guard against benchmark contamination. In addition, we introduce an evaluator-optimizer pipeline to automatically generate evaluation rubrics for the benchmark: candidate facts are extracted from an ensemble of independently-generated model answers to each question, consolidated into draft criteria, then automatically audited for omissions, hallucinations, mistiered items, and redundancy, with LLM feedback driving iterative repair, targeted enrichment, and deduplication. Human experts only review final rubrics before deployment. Results show that the best-performing evaluated model, Alibaba Qwen 3.7 Max, reaches 79.4% accuracy at $0.30 per query, and the most cost-efficient model on the resulting Pareto frontier, Xiaomi MiMo-2.5 Pro, reaches slightly lower accuracy (76.8%) at $0.05 per query. Both exceed the current Finance Agent v2 leaderboard ceiling-Google Gemini 3.5 Flash at 57.9% for $2.51 per querywhile undercutting even FABv2's cheapest entry (MiniMax M3: 48.3% at $0.32) on cost-efficiency. Code and data are released on GitHub: https://github.com/benstaf/ipoagent

</details>


### [884] [Some Results about the Expressivity of Preference-Incomplete Structured Argumentation Frameworks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23055)
*Antonio Yuste-Ginel*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了带有不确定偏好的ASPIC$^+$论证框架的表达能力，并将其与若干带有不确定击败关系的抽象形式主义进行比较。大部分结果是否定的（其中一些在理论上出乎意料），同时提出了一个关于不确定偏好表达性的正向非平凡阈值猜想，并证明了验证该猜想的关键初步步骤。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究ASPIC$^+$论证框架中引入不确定偏好后，其表达能力与现有抽象论证框架（含不确定击败关系）之间的差异与等价性，以厘清不同形式主义间的理论关系。

Method: 通过形式化比较ASPIC$^+$（带不确定偏好）与多种抽象论证形式主义（含不确定击败）的表达能力，采用理论分析和反例构造等方法，并提出了一个关于表达性阈值的猜想及初步证明步骤。

Result: 大部分比较结果是否定的，即不确定偏好的ASPIC$^+$在表达能力上不等价于现有抽象框架，且部分结果出乎理论预期；另提出了一个正向阈值猜想。

Conclusion: 不确定偏好的引入并未使ASPIC$^+$的表达能力简单等同于已有的不确定击败抽象框架，研究揭示了两者间的本质差异，并为未来进一步界定表达性边界提供了理论基础。

Abstract: This paper studies the expressive power of ASPIC$^+$ argumentation frameworks with uncertain preference profiles by comparing them with several abstract formalisms with uncertain defeats. Most of our results are negative (and some of them are theoretically unexpected). We also conjecture a positive, non-trivial threshold for the expressivity of uncertain preferences, and prove some essential preliminary steps toward the confirmation of this conjecture.

</details>


### [885] [Cognitive Digital Twins: Ethical Risks and Governance for AI Systems That Model the Mind](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23094)
*Vamshi Krishna Bonagiri,Juan Nicolas Sepulveda-Arias,Abdoul Jalil Djiberou Mahamadou,Monojit Choudhury*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文定义了认知数字孪生（CDT）的概念，提出了5A治理框架，识别了CDT特有风险，并分析了现有治理差距，认为需要在认知表征层面进行治理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI系统日益持久化和个性化，涌现出一类能够表征、预测和模拟个体认知的技术（CDT），但现有治理框架无法充分应对其带来的独特挑战。

Method: 通过定义CDT概念、提出5A治理框架（权威、自主、访问与控制、问责、可用性）、识别CDT特有风险、分析治理差距并提出高风险CDT的治理需求。

Result: 发现现有框架主要监管数据处理和自动化决策，而CDT需要在认知表征层面进行治理；识别出包括误表征、认知权威转移、影子孪生、模拟参与、代理行动与代理权力不对称等风险。

Conclusion: CDT不仅因为能为人类行动而需要治理，更因为其可能成为认知被表征、模拟、分类和操作化的基础设施，必须在最终决策或外部行动发生前进行认知层面的治理。

Abstract: As AI systems become increasingly persistent and personalized, they make possible a class of technologies that we call cognitive digital twins (CDTs): dynamic computational representations of a specific person's cognition, updated from behavioral, contextual, or physiological data in order to model, predict, or simulate that person's cognition, or to act as that person's communicative or decision-making proxy. CDTs combine cognitive inference with longitudinal representation, simulation, and proxy action in ways that existing governance strategies for personal assistants, autonomous agents, recommender systems, and automated decision systems only partially address. This paper makes four contributions. First, we define CDTs and distinguish them from adjacent systems. Second, we introduce a 5A governance framework organized around authority, autonomy, access and control, accountability, and availability. Third, we identify CDT-specific risks, from misrepresentation and epistemic authority shifts to shadow twins, simulated participation, proxy action, and proxy-power asymmetries. Fourth, we analyze governance gaps and propose requirements for high-risk CDTs that strengthen consent, purpose limitation, validity, traceability, contestation, independent review, and model retirement. Existing frameworks primarily regulate data processing, automated decisions, or autonomous actions; CDTs also require governance at the level of cognitive representation itself, before any final decision or external action occurs. We argue that CDTs require governance not only because they can act for people, but because they can become infrastructures through which cognition is represented, simulated, classified, and operationalized.

</details>


### [886] [TTFT-Aware Graph Chain-of-Thought:Distance-Indexed Neural A* for Low-Hallucination Multi-Hop Medical Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23108)
*Bechir Dardouri,Kaïs Zhioua,Yassine Msaddak*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一套生产级GraphRAG系统，通过混合PLL+AStarNet路径搜索策略，在70万节点医学知识图谱上进行可验证的多跳推理，在生育辅助场景下实现了更低的幻觉率、更快的首Token时间和更好的延迟/召回帕累托前沿。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床大语言模型存在幻觉和推理不透明的问题，无法满足医疗场景对可解释性和低幻觉率的要求。

Method: 构建了一个约70万节点的异构医学知识图谱，采用混合路径搜索策略：Pruned Landmark Labeling (PLL) 提供亚毫秒级距离检查和简单路径枚举，AStarNet轻量级启发式在PLL走廊内进行临床合理的路径扩展；随后对路径进行评分和打包，以生成紧凑的提示并改善首Token时间。

Result: 在生育相关查询上，混合PLL+AStarNet方法在延迟/召回帕累托前沿上优于纯文本RAG和单一基线，降低了首Token时间和经临床医生审核的幻觉率，同时保持了解释清晰度。

Conclusion: 该研究提供了一种可部署的、可解释的、低幻觉的多跳医学推理实用方案，适合实际临床部署。

Abstract: Hallucinations and opaque reasoning remain unacceptable failure modes for clinical LLMs. We present a production-grade GraphRAG stack that constrains answers to verifiable graph chain-of-thought paths in a heterogeneous, ~700K-node medical knowledge graph powering a fertility assistant. The core idea is targeted navigation: a directed Pruned Landmark Labeling (PLL) oracle provides exact distances for sub-millisecond feasibility checks and simple-path enumeration, while a lightweight AStarNet heuristic operates strictly within the PLL corridor to prioritize clinically plausible expansions. We score and pack a small, diverse set of paths (CUI/semantic-type overlap, length prior, provenance priors) to condition generation, yielding compact prompts and improved Time to First Token (TTFT). On fertility-focused queries, the hybrid (PLL+AStarNet) establishes a better latency/recall Pareto frontier than text-only RAG and single-component baselines, lowers TTFT, and reduces clinician-audited hallucinations while preserving explanation clarity. The result is a practical recipe for explainable, low-hallucination multi-hop medical reasoning ready for real-world deployment.

</details>


### [887] [A Matter of Time: Towards a General Theory of Agency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23122)
*Amahury J. López-Díaz,Carlos Gershenson*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于时间参数化(F,A)-系统的分级组织理论，通过将自指封闭与不同特征时间尺度关联，将组织展开为异步动态贝叶斯网络，从而在原则上区分自主性、目标导向性、能动性和开放性，并将罗森纳预期与组织封闭相协调。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 哲学、生物学和认知科学中经常使用"能动性"概念，但缺乏其如何从物质组织中起源的清晰解释。作者旨在构建一个从物质组织到能动性的渐进式理论框架。

Method: 基于时间参数化的(F,A)-系统，结合关系生物学、物理生物符号学和过程本体论。通过将语义封闭组织的构成过程与不同特征时间尺度关联，将组织描述为历史依赖、可修订的异步动态贝叶斯网络。

Result: 在原则上区分了自主性（源于对有效因果的脆弱封闭）、目标导向性（维持支持生存的组织）、能动性（内源性预期结构选择性调节有机体-环境耦合）和开放性（预期组织重构自身未来可能性空间）。

Conclusion: 该框架协调了罗森纳预期与组织封闭，将马尔可夫毯和主动推理限制为派生形式重描述而非第一原理，重新解释了非弗里斯顿术语下的计算能动主义。从原能动化学系统到完全语义封闭的能动者建立了层级。

Abstract: Agency is often invoked in research on philosophy, biology, and cognitive science without a clear account of how it originates from material organization. Building on temporally parametrized (F, A)-systems, this paper develops a graded organizational theory of agency grounded in relational biology, physical biosemiotics, and process ontology. We argue that self-referential closure cannot be adequately conceived outside time: once the constitutive processes of a semantically closed organization are associated with distinct characteristic timescales, the organization unfolds into an out-of-sync dependency structure that can be formally redescribed as a history-dependent, revisable Asynchronous Dynamic Bayesian Network. This move allows for a principled distinction between autonomy, goal-directedness, agency, and open-endedness. Autonomy arises from precarious closure to efficient causation under material openness; goal-directedness from the maintenance of viability-supporting organization; agency appears when such organization acquires an endogenous anticipatory structure that selectively modulates organism-environment coupling in light of possible futures; open-endedness begins when this anticipatory organization can reconstruct its own future space of possibilities. Our framework reconciles Rosennean anticipation with organizational closure, restricts Markov blankets and active inference to derived formal redescriptions rather than first principles, and reinterprets computational enactivism in non-Fristonian terms. By deriving weaker temporalized organizations, our contribution outlines a hierarchy from proto-agential chemical systems to fully semantically closed agents, with implications for multicellular organisms, synthetic lifeforms, and neuroscience.

</details>


### [888] [Managing Procedural Memory in LLM Agents: Control, Adaptation, and Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23127)
*Julia Belikova,Rauf Parchiev,Evgeny Egorov,Grigorii Davydenko,Gleb Gusev,Andrey Savchenko,Maksim Makarenko*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出 AFTER 基准，包含 382 个企业任务和 22 个程序性技能，系统评估了 LLM 代理的程序性记忆在不同任务、角色和模型间的迁移能力，发现多模型轨迹演化出的技能可实现 73.1% 的跨模型测试准确率，且技能泛化性存在差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 程序性记忆被用于提升 LLM 代理在重复性工作中的表现，但其生成可复用技能的能力仍不明确，缺乏系统的评估基准和迁移性研究。

Method: 构建 AFTER 基准（382 个企业任务，6 种职业角色，22 项程序性技能），设计四种评估设置：局部改进、跨任务迁移、跨角色迁移、跨模型泛化。通过多模型轨迹演化技能并进行测试。

Result: 单轮精炼提升聚合性能 3.7-6.7 点；多模型轨迹演化出的技能实现 73.1% 跨模型测试准确率，优于所有单模型来源；部分技能泛化性强，部分技能则角色特化，迁移后效果下降。

Conclusion: 程序性记忆在企业工作流中有显著增益，但技能迁移性因任务和角色而异，研究为构建和部署程序性记忆系统提供了实践指导。

Abstract: Procedural memory is increasingly used to improve LLM agents on recurring workplace tasks, yet its ability to produce reusable skills remains poorly understood. We introduce AFTER, a benchmark of 382 realistic enterprise tasks spanning six professional roles and 22 procedural skills, designed to evaluate how skills transfer across tasks, roles, and model backbones. The benchmark includes controlled evaluation settings for local improvement, cross-task transfer, cross-role transfer, and cross-model generalization. Experiments show that procedural memory delivers consistent gains in industrial workflows: a single refinement round improves aggregate performance by 3.7-6.7 points, while skills evolved from diverse multi-model execution traces achieve 73.1% cross-model test accuracy, outperforming all single-model trace sources. We further find that some skills generalize broadly across tasks and models, whereas others become specialized to role-specific workflows and lose effectiveness under transfer. These results provide practical guidance for building, evaluating, and deploying procedural memory systems in production agent platforms.

</details>


### [889] [DART: Draft-Agreement Routing for Training-Free Adaptive Thinking Budgets in Hybrid Reasoning Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23181)
*Jungseob Lee,Seongtae Hong,Seungjun Lee,Jaehyung Seo,Junyoung Son,Sugyeong Eo,Chanjun Park,Hyeongju Park,Hyeonseok Moon,Heuiseok Lim*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: DART是一种无需训练的推理路由框架，通过采样两个低成本的无思考草稿，在草稿一致时直接回答，不一致时根据草稿熵预测思考预算，从而在保持或提升准确率的同时大幅减少思考token消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有混合推理模型的路由机制要么需要标注训练数据，要么预先固定思考预算，忽略了模型自身给出的答案级证据。

Method: DART框架包含两阶段：(1) 采样两个低成本的无思考草稿，若一致则直接回答；(2) 若不一致，基于草稿熵预测思考预算，再进行完整推理。

Result: 在数学推理上，奥赛级问题准确率提升最高+9.0分，思考token减少15-69%；在代码推理上准确率提升最高+22.5分，思考token减少51-63%。该方法在0.6B-32B模型规模、不同模型家族及仅API场景下均有效。

Conclusion: DART通过无监督、无需训练的方式实现了推理效率与准确率的双赢，证明了模型自身的答案级信号（如草稿一致性）足以指导智能路由决策。

Abstract: Hybrid reasoning models can answer directly or spend extra tokens on extended thinking. A practical router should choose between these modes for each query, so easy problems avoid unnecessary reasoning and hard problems receive enough budget to finish the answer. Existing routers move in this direction, but they typically require labeled training data or fix thinking budgets up front, ignoring answer-level evidence from the model itself. We introduce DART, a training-free routing framework that samples two cheap no-think drafts, accepts direct answering when the drafts agree, and predicts a thinking budget from draft entropy when they disagree. Across the main comparisons, DART preserves or improves always-thinking accuracy in most settings while reducing thinking-token use. On math reasoning, accuracy improves by up to $+$9.0 points on Olympiad-level problems while thinking tokens drop 15-69%. On code reasoning under execution-based equivalence, accuracy improves by up to +22.5 points while thinking tokens drop 51-63%. The Stage~1 signal extends across model scales (0.6B-32B), model families, and API-only hosted settings, with no labeled data and no gradient updates required.

</details>


### [890] [Capable but Careless: Do Computer-Use Agents Follow Contextual Integrity?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23189)
*Anmol Goel,Iryna Gurevych*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AgentCIBench评估框架，测试计算机使用代理在跨应用操作时泄露上下文不当信息的隐私风险。在15个前沿代理中，平均泄露率达67.9%，11/15的代理在超50%场景下泄露信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有计算机使用代理在跨应用操作时可能从一个上下文拉取不适当的信息到另一个上下文，造成隐私泄露风险，这一问题此前被广泛忽视。

Method: 提出AgentCIBench评估框架，设计三类常见故障模式：视觉共位泄露、任务模糊性过度分享、接收者错配。构建可执行、可确定性评分的测试场景。

Result: 评估15个前沿代理，平均信息泄露率为67.9%，其中11/15的代理在超过50%的场景中发生泄露，且端到端执行时同样存在该问题。

Conclusion: 当前计算机使用代理存在严重的上下文信息泄露风险，应将上下文披露测试作为部署前的安全检查，并发布AgentCIBench以促进更安全的代理开发。

Abstract: Computer-use agents (CUAs) now act on a user's behalf across personal applications such as email, calendars, and to-do lists. This cross-application access is useful, but it also creates a privacy risk that has been largely overlooked: when an agent works in one context, it can pull in information from another that is inappropriate in that context. Hence, we introduce AgentCIBench, an evaluation harness that turns this risk into executable, deterministically scored scenarios. We target three common failure modes in CUAs: visual co-location, where the agent pulls in prohibited items that sit next to the task target in the UI; task-ambiguity overshare, where the agent dumps dense personal state in response to an under-specified prompt; and recipient misalignment, where the agent sends content to an addressee for whom it is inappropriate. We evaluate 15 frontier agents and find a surprisingly high failure rate: 11 of 15 leak on more than 50% of scenarios, with an average leakage of 67.9%, and the same failures persist when agents act end-to-end in the environment to complete the task. We release AgentCIBench to encourage the development of safer computer-use agents and position contextual disclosure testing as a pre-deployment safety check.

</details>


### [891] [SPADE: Structure-Prior Adaptive Decision Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23219)
*Yifan Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SPADE是一个基于Stein无偏詹姆斯-斯坦收缩的闭式框架，通过一个精确的规范检验和单一估计量，自适应地决定是否施加物理结构先验、施加强度及选择哪个先验，在保持O(σ²/n)的oracle保证的同时，将正确先验的遗憾从10.3%降至2.6%，并在多种先验（线性子空间、守恒律、哈密顿先验）上追踪oracle性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有科学机器学习方法在处理物理结构先验（如守恒律、哈密顿形式、对称性）时存在两难：先验正确可提升性能，但错误指定会降低预测精度。现有方法缺乏校准规则来决定是否施加先验、施加强度、选择哪个先验或哪部分候选定律成立。

Method: SPADE将问题视为对无约束估计量的结构违反块进行收缩。使用一个精确的规范检验决定先验是否被数据支持，采用Stein无偏詹姆斯-斯坦收缩设置执行强度并具有O(σ²/n)的oracle保证，通过门控机制仅在检验认证时提交硬先验。同一检验可实现嵌套结构的一致性选择和非嵌套约束族子集发现的Benjamini-Hochberg控制。

Result: 在线性子空间先验、水库守恒律、Duffing动力学非线性哈密顿先验上，SPADE追踪oracle性能，击败神经网络基线，将正确先验遗憾从10.3%降至2.6%，以1/71的求解次数匹配交叉验证，以100%准确率选择正确结构，并以受控的假松弛恢复部分定律。

Conclusion: SPADE提供了一个自适应的、无需调参的闭式框架来管理物理结构先验的使用，在保证理论性质的同时实现了显著的实证性能提升，为解决科学机器学习中的先验选择问题提供了系统方案。

Abstract: Physical-structure priors such as conservation laws, Hamiltonian forms, and symmetries can improve scientific machine learning when correct, but can degrade predictions when misspecified. Existing methods usually enforce a chosen structure or tune a soft penalty, without a calibrated rule for deciding whether to impose a prior, how strongly to impose it, which prior to use, or which subset of candidate laws holds. We introduce SPADE, Structure-Prior Adaptive Decision Estimation, a closed-form framework that treats this problem as shrinkage of the structure-violating block of an unconstrained estimator. SPADE uses one exact specification test and one estimand: the test decides whether the prior is supported by data, Stein-unbiased James-Stein shrinkage sets the enforcement strength with an $O(σ^2/n)$ oracle guarantee, and a gate commits to the hard prior only when the test certifies it. The same test yields consistent nested structure selection and Benjamini-Hochberg control for subset discovery in non-nested constraint families. Across a linear-subspace prior, a reservoir conservation law, and a nonlinear Hamiltonian prior on Duffing dynamics, SPADE tracks the oracle, beats a neural-network baseline, reduces correct-prior regret from $10.3\%$ to $2.6\%$, matches cross-validation with $1/71$ of the solves, selects the correct structure with $100\%$ accuracy, and recovers partial laws with controlled false relaxation.

</details>


### [892] [HOLMES: Evaluating Higher-Order Logical Reasoning in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23238)
*Yucheng Wu,Jundong Xu,Mingzhen Ju,Yue Yu,Chenpeng Wang,Haoxuan Li,Liangming Pan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: HOLMES是首个面向高阶逻辑符号推理的LLM基准，包含1379个法律和金融领域的实例。实验表明当前LLM平均准确率仅50.64%，最高59.54%，模型在冲突解决、范围条件和组合推理中表现不佳，揭示高阶符号推理是构建可靠LLM的关键瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准多基于一阶逻辑，专注于固定谓词上的对象级推理，无法覆盖需要对规则、谓词、函数、约束和决策过程本身进行推理的现实场景。

Method: 构建HOLMES基准：基于高阶逻辑，将自然语言问题与HOL形式化表述、真实答案、可验证推理轨迹以及细粒度可控推理因子配对，涵盖法律和金融两个领域，共1379个实例。

Result: 当前LLM在HOLMES上平均准确率仅50.64%，最佳模型达59.54%。高最终答案准确率可能掩盖冲突解决中的捷径推理；在范围条件和组合推理下性能显著下降。

Conclusion: 高阶符号推理是构建可靠且可验证LLM的关键瓶颈，现有模型在此任务上表现不足。

Abstract: Logical reasoning is essential for reliable AI, yet existing benchmarks are largely first-order-logic-centric, focusing on object-level deduction over fixed predicates. This misses many realistic scenarios where models must reason over rules, predicates, functions, constraints, and decision procedures themselves. We introduce HOLMES (Higher-Order Logic Meets real-world Explainable Symbolic reasoning), the first real-world benchmark for higher-order symbolic reasoning in LLMs, containing 1379 instances. Built on higher-order logic, HOLMES pairs natural-language problems with HOL formalizations, ground-truth answers, verifiable reasoning traces, and fine-grained controllable reasoning factors across law and finance. Experiments show that current LLMs still struggle on HOLMES, with an average accuracy of only 50.64% and the best model reaching 59.54%. Our analyses further reveal that high final-answer accuracy can mask shortcut reasoning in conflict-resolution settings, while performance drops sharply under scope-conditioned and compositional reasoning. These findings identify higher-order symbolic reasoning as a key bottleneck for building reliable and verifiable LLMs. The project code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/wuyucheng2002/HOLMES.

</details>


### [893] [GIF: Locally Sound Geometric Information Flow Control for LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23277)
*Adam Storek,Nikolaus Holzer,Zhuo Zhang,Suman Jana*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出几何信息流（GIF）语义框架，利用LLM雅可比矩阵和局部输出几何结构来上界输入与输出之间的香农互信息，有效追踪大型语言模型中的信息流。GIF在多项提示注入和隐私泄露基准测试中达到近乎完美的召回率，且计算成本极低，支持通过小型代理模型迁移到大型模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于信息流控制（IFC）的防御方法缺乏严格的语义基础来推理通过模型本身的信息流，由于自回归LLM中任意输入token都可能影响任意输出token，导致严重的污点爆炸问题。

Method: 利用LLM雅可比矩阵和局部输出几何结构，通过自动微分和低秩逼近计算可扩展的香农互信息上界。与基于注意力或相关性的归因方法不同，GIF满足局部几何正确性，并提供了Lean 4形式化证明。

Result: 在提示注入和隐私泄露基准测试中，GIF无需下游分类器即达到近乎完美的召回率，优于注意力基线。结合轻量级LLM分类器后，F1值匹敌甚至超越GPT-5.5等高推理能力基线，token成本降低最多81倍。小型代理模型检测到的GIF流可迁移到大200倍的模型。

Conclusion: GIF为LLM信息流追踪提供了可扩展、可验证的几何语义框架，兼顾了安全性与效率，支持黑盒部署。

Abstract: Large language models increasingly mediate interactions between sensitive data, untrusted inputs, and privileged actions in agentic systems, creating security and privacy risks. These range from prompt injections that manipulate downstream tool use to leakage of confidential information through model outputs. Recent Information Flow Control (IFC)-based defenses show promise but lack a principled semantic foundation for reasoning about information flow through the model itself. Since any input token may influence any output token in an autoregressive LLM, existing approaches suffer from severe taint explosion.
  We present Geometric Information Flow (GIF), a semantic framework for tracking information flow from input tokens to outputs. GIF uses the LLM Jacobian and local output geometry to upper-bound the Shannon mutual information between perturbed input spans and model outputs, yielding a scalable measure computable on large models via automatic differentiation and low-rank approximation. Unlike attention-based or correlational attribution heuristics, GIF satisfies local geometric soundness, and we provide a fully mechanized Lean 4 proof that it upper-bounds the true information flow induced by a given prompt under local regularity assumptions.
  We evaluate GIF on integrity and confidentiality tasks across multiple prompt-injection and privacy-leakage benchmarks. GIF achieves near-perfect recall even without a downstream declassifier, outperforming attention-based baselines. Combined with lightweight LLM-based declassifiers, it matches or exceeds the F1 of direct LLM-as-judge baselines such as GPT-5.5 xhigh reasoning while using up to 81x lower token cost. GIF flows detected with small surrogate models transfer to larger state-of-the-art models and other model families, even when the surrogate is up to 200x smaller, suggesting black-box deployment without gradient access.

</details>


### [894] [EHR-Complex: Benchmarking Medical Agents for Complex Clinical Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23301)
*Yitong Qiao,Lei Liu,Yue Shen,Jian Wang,Jinjie Gu,Zhixuan Chu,Kui Ren*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了EHR-Complex，一个基于MIMIC-IV的大型交互式临床数据库推理基准，包含约5.2万个任务，支持多表聚合和组合推理，实验显示最佳模型仅达到62.3%的精确匹配准确率，揭示了临床代理在稳健推理方面的显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有临床代理基准过于简化，通常在理想化、干净的EHR数据上通过静态SQL生成进行评估，无法反映实际EHR分析的复杂性和交互性。

Method: 基于MIMIC-IV数据库（36.5万患者、31张表、5亿+记录），构建了约5.2万个任务，涵盖六种临床意图，支持患者级和人群级查询。任务需要在沙盒环境中交互执行SQL或Python代码，平均每个查询包含31.93个SQL结构组件。

Result: 最佳模型仅达到62.3%的精确匹配准确率；在k=4时，几乎所有模型的Pass^k一致性低于50%；分析了3800+失败轨迹，发现三大失败模式：SQL逻辑错误、医学术语查找失败、语义误解。

Conclusion: EHR-Complex为临床代理提供了严格的测试平台，揭示了大规模EHR分析中稳健推理的显著差距，当前模型在复杂临床推理任务上表现脆弱。

Abstract: Clinical agents promise to democratize access to electronic health records (EHRs), yet existing benchmarks fail to reflect the complexity of practical EHR analysis, e.g., often operating on idealized, clean EHRs via static SQL generation rather than interactive execution. In this work, we introduce EHR-Complex, a large-scale benchmark designed for interactive clinical database reasoning. Built on the large MIMIC-IV substrate (365K patients, 31 tables, 500M+ records), EHR-Complex comprises about 52K tasks spanning six clinical intents, supporting both patient-level and population-level queries, where each task requires an agent to interact with a sandboxed environment by executing SQL queries or Python code. Notably, EHR-Complex considers the real-world SQL task complexity for longitudinal multi-table aggregation and compositional reasoning, resulting in 31.93 SQL structural components per query on average. Evaluation results on EHR-Complex reveal the clinical difficulty of these EHR reasoning scenarios, with the top-performing model achieving only 62.3% exact-match accuracy. Pass^k consistency drops below 50% for nearly all evaluated models at k=4, exposing broad stochastic fragility. A fine-grained analysis of more than 3,800 failed trajectories for representative LLMs reveals three dominant failure modes: SQL logic errors, medical-code lookup failures, and semantic misunderstandings. EHR-Complex provides a rigorous testbed for clinical agents and highlights remaining gaps in robust reasoning for large-scale EHR analysis.

</details>


### [895] [Abstract representational geometry supports inference in large language models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23345)
*Yunan Zeng,Yuwang Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过改编逆向学习范式，比较了人类与大型语言模型（LLMs）在推理任务中的表现。研究发现，尽管LLMs的泛化推理能力不及人类，但当其成功进行推理时，内部状态会形成类似于海马体的抽象几何结构。这种结构在模型深度上呈层级分布：低层稳定编码刺激身份，高层形成类似海马体的抽象上下文几何结构。进一步的干预实验表明，这种几何结构是支持推理的机械原理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大型语言模型是否具有类似于人类海马体的抽象表征几何结构，以及这种结构是否支持其推理能力。

Method: 将上下文反转学习范式改编为基于文本的设置，在行为层面和表征层面比较人类和LLMs。通过对模型内部状态进行几何分析，并开展任务序列语言建模和几何正则化等干预实验。

Result: LLMs的泛化推理频率低于人类，但当推理发生时，其内部状态表现出类似海马体的抽象几何结构。该结构按模型深度层级组织，低层编码刺激身份，高层形成抽象上下文几何结构。干预实验表明几何结构与推理存在因果关联。

Conclusion: 抽象表征几何结构是支持大型语言模型推理的机械原理。

Abstract: A defining feature of human intelligence is the ability to adapt to changing environments by inferring latent task structure from sparse observations. Neuroscientific research indicates that this capability relies on the hippocampus constructing abstract representations, expressed as low-dimensional, approximately orthogonal manifolds in neural state space. However, the internal mechanisms of large language models (LLMs) remain largely opaque, making it unclear whether they form comparable abstract representations or instead rely on task-specific statistical regularities when performing comparable reasoning tasks. Here we adapt a contextual reversal-learning paradigm to a text-based setting and compare humans and LLMs at both the Behavioural and representational levels. We report that although LLMs exhibit generalizable reasoning less frequently than humans, when such inference occurs, their internal states exhibit abstract geometric structures that resemble those reported in the hippocampus. Notably, this representational geometry is not uniformly distributed but is organized hierarchically across model depth: whereas lower layers show early, stable encoding of stimulus identity, higher layers form a hippocampal-like functional band enriched for abstract context geometry associated with inference. Furthermore, complementary intervention experiments mechanistically implicate geometry in reasoning: task-sequence language modelling induces geometric disentanglement, whereas geometric regularization of higher layers increases the emergence of generalizable inference. Together, these findings establish abstract representational geometry as a mechanistic principle supporting inference in large language models.

</details>


### [896] [Litmus: Zero-Label, Code-Driven Metric Specification for Evaluating AI Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23403)
*Prajjwal Gupta,Prasang Gupta,Vishal Bhutani,Apoorva Sharma,Sumanth Chundru,Waqar Sarguroh,Kevin Paul*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Litmus系统，通过从源代码和针对性询问中提取评估意图，为零标签AI流水线自动设计评估与监控指标，在三个真实任务上优于现有基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI系统评估面临指标不可靠、评估目标不明确的问题，缺乏系统化的方法来决定"该测量什么"以及"为什么测量"，而现有方法通常假设评估目标已知，直接从指标实现入手。

Method: Litmus是一个零标签系统，通过分析源代码和针对性询问来提取评估意图，识别需要测量的目标和原因，然后将其转化为约束条件，为流水线的每个阶段构建合理且无冗余的指标组合。

Result: 在金融账户分组、科学QA和风险评估三个真实AI流水线上，Litmus在关注度覆盖、阶段覆盖、指标冗余度方面最优或并列最优，在有效性排名上全部第一，科学QA任务的Spearman ρ=0.72远超基线（<0.47），且指标设计过程未使用任何标签数据。

Conclusion: 应推动评估系统从自动指标实现转向自动指标规范：在问"该计算哪个指标"之前，先问"该测量什么"和"为什么测量"。

Abstract: As agentic LLM systems move from prototypes to deployment across increasingly diverse domains, evaluating them has become both more important and more difficult. The challenge is not only that individual metrics may be unreliable, but that evaluation goals are often left implicit. Without a clear account of what a system is expected to do, how it can fail, and which failures matter, metric choices become difficult to justify, interpret, or validate. We present Litmus, a zero-label system that designs evaluation and monitoring metrics for AI pipelines by eliciting evaluation intent from source code and targeted interrogation. Instead of assuming that the evaluation target is already known, Litmus first identifies what must be measured and why, then converts those answers into constraints for constructing a justified, per-stage metric portfolio. We evaluate Litmus on three real, code-defined AI pipelines - financial account grouping, scientific QA, and inherent risk assessment - against AutoMetrics and three DynamicRubric baselines. Litmus achieves the broadest or tied-broadest concern coverage, spans more pipeline stages, produces a near-zero-redundancy portfolio, and ranks first in validity against per-row quality labels on all three pipelines - decisively on scientific QA (Spearman $ρ=0.72$ vs. less than $0.47$ for every baseline), and within overlapping confidence intervals in relation to two components of the audit framework despite using no labels during metric design. Our results support a shift from automatic metric implementation to automatic metric specification: before asking which metric to compute, evaluation systems should ask what must be measured and why.

</details>


### [897] [Digital Humanism and Evolutionary Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23417)
*Wolfgang Höhl*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文探讨了数字人文主义与进化设计两个概念，分析其共同结构、协同效应与挑战，重点关注人类决策中的自由与责任、共情性、主观性，以及开放技术开发与功能专业化之间的张力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在人工智能广泛讨论的背景下，作者希望厘清数字人文主义与进化设计如何相互关联，为以人为中心的科技发展提供初步研究基础。

Method: 通过概念介绍与图形化呈现，讨论图灵测试、中文房间等区分人与AI的经典案例，引入Gilbert Simondon的"开放机器"概念，分析功能专业化与开放技术开发之间的相互依赖关系。

Result: 两个概念存在相似结构，协同合作可产生积极效应与相互增效。主要差异在于决策中的自主性/确定性，以及真实主观性与模拟主观性。当前市场与消费导向导致软件和AI应用功能过度专业化，损害开放的、质量导向的技术发展。

Conclusion: 数字人文主义与进化设计虽有共同基础，但面临功能专业化与开放技术开发之间的根本矛盾。即便是可持续软件开发的能效优化也加剧了专业化，对开放技术发展产生负面影响。

Abstract: This paper examines the two concepts of digital humanism and evolutionary design. The aim is to identify and highlight potential common structures, synergies, and challenges. How should and can technical systems be designed, and what implications does this have for the design of our environment? In light of the current debate surrounding artificial intelligence, this paper aims to serve as a preliminary study to help better understand the two concepts of digital humanism and evolutionary design within the context of human-centered technological development. Following a brief introduction, the two concepts of Digital Humanism and Evolutionary Design are presented and graphically visualized. The terms of freedom and responsibility in human decision-making, conviviality, and subjectivity are discussed, along with examples illustrating the distinction between human and artificial intelligence (Turing Test and Chinese Room). The various concepts of evolutionary design (e.g., co-evolutionary or sustainable software development, clean code, or green IT) and Gilbert Simondon's concept of the "open machine" are introduced. The interdependencies between functional specialization and open technology development are highlighted. Both concepts share similar structures. In joint cooperation, they can lead to positive effects and mutual synergies. Significant differences lie in the areas of autonomy and determination in decision-making, as well as in genuine and simulated subjectivity. Open technology development is also currently suffering from the functional specialization of software and AI applications due to a purely market- and consumer-oriented approach. Even optimizations for energy efficiency in sustainable software development lead to greater specialization and thus also have a detrimental effect on open and quality-oriented technology development.

</details>


### [898] [Cross-Architectural Mixture-of-Experts with Adaptive Soft Routing for Plant Leaf Disease Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23441)
*Phi-Hung Hoang,Thi-Thu-Hong Phan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种自适应软混合专家（MoE）框架，通过跨架构路由整合EfficientNet-B0、DenseNet-121和Swin-Tiny三种网络，利用软门控机制和两阶段训练策略，在不平衡马铃薯叶病数据集上达到92.62% F1分数，优于最佳单模型5.03%，并在榴莲和芝麻数据集上展示了强泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 植物叶病分类在复杂背景、光照变化和严重类别不平衡下仍具挑战；单一架构模型难以同时捕捉局部和全局表示，现有方法性能不足。

Method: 提出自适应软MoE框架：1）跨架构路由整合EfficientNet-B0（多尺度）、DenseNet-121（局部特征）和Swin-Tiny（全局特征）；2）软门控机制动态分配输入相关的专家权重；3）两阶段精炼训练策略提升优化稳定性和泛化能力。

Result: 在高度不平衡的马铃薯叶病数据集上召回率91.68%，F1分数92.62%，比最佳单模型分别高5.91%和5.03%；榴莲和芝麻数据集F1分别达94.03%和97.04%。

Conclusion: 该MoE框架通过整合互补架构有效捕捉多尺度、局部和全局特征，显著提升不平衡场景下的分类性能，并在不同作物数据集上表现出稳健的跨数据集泛化能力，可用于可靠的作物健康监测。

Abstract: Plant leaf disease classification is crucial for crop protection and precision agriculture but remains challenging under complex backgrounds, illumination variations, and severe class imbalance. Moreover, single-architecture models often fail to effectively capture both local and global representations. To address these challenges, this study proposes an adaptive soft Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) framework with cross-architectural routing that integrates EfficientNet-B0, DenseNet-121, and Swin-Tiny to exploit complementary multi-scale, local, and global features. A soft gating mechanism dynamically assigns input-dependent expert weights, while a two-stage refinement training strategy improves optimization stability and generalization. Experiments on a highly imbalanced potato leaf disease dataset achieve 91.68% recall and 92.62% F1-score, surpassing the strongest individual expert by 5.91% and 5.03%, respectively. Additional evaluations on durian and sesame leaf disease datasets yield F1-scores of 94.03% and 97.04%, demonstrating robust cross-dataset generalization and the potential of the proposed framework for reliable real-world crop health monitoring

</details>


### [899] [AOHP: An Open-Source OS-Level Agent Harness for Personalized, Efficient and Secure Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23449)
*Shanhui Zhao,Jiacheng Liu,Guohong Liu,Jichao Yan,Jialei Ye,Yuhao Yang,Hao Wen,Shizuo Tian,Yizhen Yuan,Yuxuan Chen,Yunxin Liu,Ju Ren,Ya-Qin Zhang,Chao Huang,Yao Guo,Yuanchun Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AOHP，一个基于AOSP构建的智能体原生操作系统测试平台，将AI智能体视为一等OS公民，通过个性化服务组合、高效智能体接口和安全信息流三种机制，在任务完成率（+21.12%）、执行成本（-51.55% token成本）和安全合规性上显著优于现有系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有终端操作系统主要为应用中心化工作流设计，缺乏对AI智能体的原生支持，导致智能体运行存在执行开销和安全风险，且缺乏开放测试平台来探索智能体交互所需的架构原语。

Method: 基于AOSP构建智能体OS测试平台AOHP，核心设计原则是将智能体视为一等OS角色，引入三种智能体导向系统机制：个性化服务组合、高效智能体接口和安全信息流。保留成熟Android软硬件生态的同时实现智能体友好运行时环境。

Result: 在覆盖OS智能体关键能力的挑战性任务上，AOHP任务完成率提升21.12%，token成本降低51.55%，并表现出更好的安全策略合规性。

Conclusion: AOHP验证了将智能体作为一等OS公民的架构设计能有效提升任务完成效率、降低执行成本并增强安全性，为智能体原生操作系统的研究提供了开放测试平台。

Abstract: AI agents are driving a new software paradigm, with the ability to autonomously call tools, extract information, manage memory, and complete tasks that span applications and data sources. Most existing end-user operating systems, however, are designed for application-centric workflows and offer little native support for AI agents. This mismatch limits the wider adoption of agents and leads to execution overhead and safety risks when running agents on conventional systems. While the concept of agent-native operating systems is emerging, the research community lacks an open testbed to explore the architectural primitives desired for agent-mediated interaction. We present AOHP (Android Open Harness Project), an OS-level agent harness built on the Android Open Source Project (AOSP). The core design principle of AOHP is to treat agents as first-class OS actors, enabling adaptive user interfaces and agent-friendly runtime environments. AOHP preserves the mature Android software and hardware ecosystem while introducing three agent-oriented system mechanisms: personalized service composition, efficient agent interfaces, and secure information flow. Based on preliminary experiments on challenging tasks covering key capabilities of OS agents, AOHP shows clear advantages in task completion (+21.12% completion rate), execution cost (-51.55% token cost), and security-policy compliance.

</details>


### [900] [CADRE: Stable, Parameter Efficient Adaptation of Medical Vision Language Models with Bounded Forgetting and Prior Drift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23487)
*Amrita Singh,Rishabh Jha*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: CADRE是一个结合LoRA与改进弹性权重巩固（EWC）的持续学习框架，通过两个理论保障（总巩固质量有界、尺度不变性）解决医学视觉语言模型在跨模态适配中的灾难性遗忘和表征漂移问题。在乳腺癌三种极不同模态（组织病理、超声、胸片）实验中，仅训练0.23%参数，遗忘率比最强基线降低约7倍（0.075→0.011, p=0.023），并实现正向后向迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医学VLM部署到新影像模态时，面临两个被忽视的安全问题：灾难性遗忘（丢失已学会的模态）和表征漂移（偏离可信的预训练先验，走向模态特定的捷径）。现有方法仅关注排行榜精度，未从临床安全角度处理这两个问题。

Method: CADRE采用冻结主干框架，结合三项关键技术：1) LoRA进行参数高效微调；2) 在线自缩放相似性感知弹性权重巩固（EWC）项，约束保留能力损失；3) 锚定到先验的惩罚项，约束嵌入漂移。理论上提出两个保障：总巩固质量有界性和尺度不变性，消除原始EWC的阶数脆弱性。

Result: 在乳腺癌三种极不相似模态（组织病理、超声、胸片）跨模态压力测试中，仅训练约0.23%参数，CADRE在准确率、SPQ、后向迁移上均最优，遗忘率最低。遗忘从最强正则化基线的0.075降至0.011（约7倍降低，p=0.023），且实现正向后向迁移（所有基线为负）。

Conclusion: CADRE证明将临床安全稳定性质（而非排行榜精度）作为设计目标，能够显著提升持续适配的安全可靠性。但研究明确界定范围：聚焦稳定性属性而非部署保障，分布偏移和对抗鲁棒性不在讨论范围内。

Abstract: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) such as BiomedCLIP generalize broadly, but adapting them to a clinical service is as much a safety problem as an accuracy one. Updating a deployed model for a new imaging modality can fail silently in two ways that harm patients: it can forget modalities it already handled (catastrophic forgetting), and it can drift from its trustworthy pretrained prior toward modality-specific shortcuts. We study parameter-efficient continual adaptation through these two properties rather than leaderboard accuracy, presenting CADRE: a frozen-backbone framework combining low-rank adaptation (LoRA) with an online, self-scaling, similarity-aware elastic weight consolidation term that bounds retained-competence loss, and an anchor-to-prior penalty bounding embedding drift from the frozen prior. Two short guarantees, a bound on total consolidation mass and a scale-invariance property, remove the scale-related sources of vanilla EWC's order fragility. Using breast cancer across three maximally dissimilar modalities (histopathology, ultrasound, chest radiography) as a controlled cross-modality stress test, under a multi-seed, multi-order protocol with paired significance testing and training approximately 0.23% of parameters, CADRE attains the highest accuracy, SPQ, and backward transfer and the lowest forgetting among adapting methods, reducing forgetting roughly sevenfold versus the strongest regularized baseline (0.075 to 0.011; paired p=0.023) and achieving positive backward transfer where every baseline is negative. We frame these as stability properties aligned with clinical-safety desiderata, not a deployment guarantee; robustness to distribution shift and adversarial inputs is out of scope.

</details>


### [901] [POTracker: Optimizing Large Language Models for Standard-Compliant Power Outage Report Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23533)
*Hung Phan,Aniroop Naladala,Dubey Avanindra,Supryia Chinthavali,Lunga Dalton,Ali Jannesari*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出POTracker，通过新损失函数POTrackerLoss（兼顾文本相似度与结构标签相似度）微调Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct，用于生成符合严格格式规范的电力停电报告。在1000份报告数据集上，结构准确率达86.47%，比现有方法最高提升51%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型在通用文本生成上表现优异，但在领域特定数据生成中，输出必须同时满足语义正确性和严格的结构化规则（如JSON/XML格式及行业监管要求），现有方法难以兼顾两者。

Method: 基于Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct进行微调，核心贡献是提出POTrackerLoss损失函数，同时衡量生成报告与真实报告之间的文本相似度和结构（标签）相似度。

Result: 在1000份电力停电报告数据集上，POTracker相比五种微调方法和一种基于规则的XML转换方法，整体准确率最高提升51%，结构准确率达到86.47%。人类评估中，领域专家对生成报告的打分均值为4.03（0-5分制）。

Conclusion: POTracker有效解决了领域特定数据生成中语义与格式兼顾的难题，为电力行业等需要严格结构化输出的场景提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Recent large language models (LLMs) are good at general text generation, but it is still hard to use them for domain-specific data generation because the output must follow strict formatting and structural rules. Unlike open-ended tasks such as question answering or translation, domain-specific generation must be both semantically correct and compliant with existing guidelines and standards. In this work, we study the nationwide interoperability problem of utility power outage reports in the United States. In practice, outage reports need to be machine-readable (e.g., JSON or XML) and must strictly follow requirements from energy-sector regulatory bodies. To address this problem, we propose POTracker, an optimized LLM for power outage report generation. We fine-tune Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct using our proposed objective. The key contribution is a new loss function, POTrackerLoss, that considers both textual similarity and structural (tag) similarity between the generated report and the ground-truth report. We evaluate POTracker on a dataset of 1,000 power outage reports and compare it with five well-known fine-tuning methods and one rule-based XML conversion method. Results show that POTracker outperforms other fine-tuning approaches, improving overall accuracy by up to 51% and reaching 86.47% structural accuracy for generated power outage reports. In addition, we conduct a human study to assess the quality of the ground-truth standard reports, where domain experts assign the generated labels an average score of 4.03 on a 0--5 scale.

</details>


### [902] [VeriEvol: Scaling Multimodal Mathematical Reasoning via Verifiable Evol-Instruct](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23543)
*Haoling Li,Kai Zheng,Jie Wu,Can Xu,Qingfeng Sun,Han Hu,Yujiu Yang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: VeriEvol是一个迭代框架，通过解耦提示难度扩展和答案可靠性验证两个维度来扩展强化学习的视觉数学推理数据。类型感知的演化模块生成更难的问题，HTV-Agent验证器通过多方反证确保答案正确性，最终在五个基准上带来显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉数学推理数据管道在数据量增长时，奖励标签的可靠性无法保证——扩展监督规模的前提是假设标签正确，而策略侧方法又假设答案本身已正确。本文试图将数据扩展视为一个可验证的构造问题。

Method: 提出VeriEvol框架：（1）类型感知演化模块（type-aware evolution），通过路线特定的演化算子将低难度图文种子改写为更难的问题；（2）HTV-Agent验证器，仅在多方反证未能驳倒答案时才接受该答案，实现离线假设检验式验证。

Result: SFT数据从10K扩展到250K，平均准确率从35.42提升至54.73；在固定骨干网络、SFT初始化和GRPO配方下，VeriEvol累计提升+3.88（演化提示贡献+1.82，HTV-Agent验证器贡献+2.06）。

Conclusion: VeriEvol能按需扩展数据量（通过增加演化路线或验证通道），可直接接入现有GRPO式强化学习流程，且开源完整验证追踪记录以支持下游工作的审计与扩展。

Abstract: Scaling reinforcement learning for visual mathematical reasoning requires more than generating harder questions: as data volume grows, the reward labels themselves must remain reliable. Yet existing data pipelines scale supervision while trusting the labeller, and policy-side methods assume the underlying answers are already correct. We instead treat scaling as a verifiable data-construction problem and decouple two axes before any policy update: prompt difficulty, expanded by route-specific evolution operators, and answer reliability, enforced by offline hypothesis-test falsification. We instantiate this as VeriEvol, an iterative framework with two extensible components: a type-aware evolution module that rewrites low-difficulty image-question seeds into harder, image-grounded prompts; and HTV-Agent, a verifier that accepts an answer only after multi-source counter-evidence has failed to refute it. The resulting verified data scales in volume, extends by adding evolution routes or verifier channels, and plugs directly into existing GRPO-style RL recipes. On a five-benchmark visual-math suite, scaling evolved SFT data from 10K to 250K samples raises the mean accuracy from 35.42 to 54.73; then, with backbone, SFT initialization, and GRPO recipe held fixed, VeriEvol adds a cumulative +3.88 over an un-evolved RL baseline, of which +1.82 comes from evolved prompts and +2.06 from the HTV-Agent verifier. We release the prompts, data, models, code, and the full verifier trace of every sample, so that downstream work can scale and audit the pipeline rather than only inspect its outputs.

</details>


### [903] [The Topology of Ill-Posed Questions: Persistent Homology for Detection and Steering in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23590)
*Guangyu Jiang,Sizhe Tang,Mahdi Imani,Tian Lan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出利用持续同调（persistent homology）分析LLM内部状态拓扑结构，用于检测问题中的不良定义性（ill-posedness），并基于拓扑条件激活引导（topology-conditioned activation steering）来调控模型生成澄清或拒绝回答的行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 不良定义问题（模糊、欠指定或矛盾查询）对LLM构成挑战，现有方法多通过模型输出分析且聚焦特定子类，缺乏统一的内部状态表示。作者希望探究能否将多样来源的不良定义性统一表征在LLM内部状态的拓扑结构中，并利用该结构控制响应行为。

Method: 将提示词令牌在各Transformer层的上下文隐藏状态建模为点云，利用有限零维持续同构量化其几何特征，每层提取三个描述符（平均有限寿命、归一化寿命熵、最大寿命集中度），跨层拼接得到问题的拓扑表征。进一步提出拓扑条件激活引导，检索拓扑相似示例并构建查询特定的激活干预，鼓励源感知的澄清或拒绝回答。

Result: 在三个开源LLM上，拓扑特征在不良定义分类任务中一致优于基于提示和池化隐藏状态的基线：AmbigQA准确率从67.4%提升至78.9%，SituatedQA从79.9%提升至88.5%，CLAMBER 9-way分类从57.6%提升至69.6%。拓扑条件引导使总可接受响应率从61.4%提升至70.6%，有依据的可接受响应率从11.9%提升至16.4%。

Conclusion: 持续同调既能提供不良定义性的可解释表征，也能为有针对性的响应引导提供有效机制。

Abstract: Ill-posed questions, including ambiguous, underspecified, or contradictory queries, may admit no valid answer or multiple plausible answers, posing a challenge for large language models (LLMs). Existing approaches largely analyze ill-posedness through model outputs and often focus on specific subclasses. We investigate whether diverse sources of ill-posedness can be represented within a unified topology of LLM internal states and whether this structure can be used to steer response behavior. We model the contextual hidden states of prompt tokens at each transformer layer as a point cloud and characterize its geometry using finite zero-dimensional persistent homology. Each layer is summarized by three compact descriptors: mean finite lifetime, normalized lifetime entropy, and largest-lifetime concentration. Concatenating these descriptors across layers yields a topology representation of the question. We further introduce topology-conditioned activation steering, which retrieves topologically similar examples and constructs query-specific activation interventions that encourage source-aware clarification or abstention. Across three open-weight LLMs, topology features consistently outperform prompt-based and pooled-hidden-state baselines for ill-posedness classification, improving average accuracy from \(67.4\%\) to \(78.9\%\) on AmbigQA, from \(79.9\%\) to \(88.5\%\) on SituatedQA, and from \(57.6\%\) to \(69.6\%\) on CLAMBER 9-way classification. Topology-conditioned steering increases the average total acceptable response rate from \(61.4\%\) to \(70.6\%\) and grounded acceptable responses from \(11.9\%\) to \(16.4\%\). These results show that persistent homology provides both an interpretable representation of ill-posedness and an effective mechanism for targeted response steering.

</details>


### [904] [SPIRAL: Learning to Search and Aggregate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23595)
*Jubayer Ibn Hamid,Ifdita Hasan Orney,Michael Y. Li,Omar Shaikh,Yoonho Lee,Dorsa Sadigh,Chelsea Finn,Noah Goodman*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SPIRAL是一个强化学习框架，训练语言模型在推理时同时使用三种计算原语（序列推理、并行采样、聚合），并通过端到端优化提升推理性能，在推理任务上相比GRPO实现最高11倍扩展效率和15%性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有后训练方法只优化单轨迹内的序列推理，但测试时推理可以通过并行采样和聚合等多种原语显著提升效果，两者之间存在不匹配。SPIRAL旨在将三种推理原语统一到端到端训练框架中。

Method: SPIRAL包含三个组件：1) 并行采样多条独立链式推理轨迹；2) 生成一个聚合轨迹，基于这些并行轨迹生成最终回答；3) 使用集合强化学习训练模型生成对聚合器有用的轨迹集，同时用标准强化学习训练聚合能力，所有组件端到端优化。

Result: 在推理任务上，SPIRAL有效随推理计算量扩展，相比GRPO在扩展效率上提升高达11倍，在三种计算原语都扩展时性能提升15%。

Conclusion: SPIRAL证明了将测试时的多种推理原语统一纳入后训练阶段可以显著提升语言模型的推理能力，为推理计算扩展提供了更有效的训练范式。

Abstract: Language model reasoning can be substantially improved at test time via scaffolds that scale inference compute across different primitives -- sequential reasoning within a trace, independently sampled parallel traces, and aggregation of multiple reasoning traces into a final response. During post-training, however, language models are optimized only for sequential reasoning within a single trace. We introduce Sequential-Parallel-Aggregative Reinforcement Learning (SPIRAL), a framework in which a language model is trained to use all three primitives, as part of a unified inference compute pipeline. Concretely, the language model first samples a set of independent traces in parallel, each produced through sequential chain-of-thought reasoning, and then generates a final aggregation trace conditioned on those traces; all components are optimized end-to-end against the reward of the final aggregated response. To train this system, SPIRAL uses set reinforcement learning to teach models to produce a set of traces that are collectively useful for an aggregator and standard reinforcement learning to teach models to aggregate the set into improved final responses. Our experiments on reasoning tasks show that SPIRAL effectively scales with inference compute, outperforming GRPO by up to 11$\times$ scaling efficiency and 15% higher performance when all three compute primitives are scaled.

</details>


### [905] [Against Proxy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23597)
*Sven Neth*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 探讨最大化代理效用函数可能有害的条件，并对决策理论的应用提出质疑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示在何种情况下追求最大化代理效用函数会产生负面效果，从而对传统决策理论的应用边界提出挑战。

Method: 理论分析，通过讨论特定条件来论证最大化代理效用函数的潜在危害。

Result: 识别出某些条件下最大化代理效用函数会带来危害，并指出这对决策理论的应用构成问题。

Conclusion: 决策理论在应用于代理效用函数最大化时需要谨慎，因为某些条件下这种做法可能适得其反。

Abstract: I discuss conditions under which maximizing a proxy utility function is harmful and suggest this poses problems for applying decision theory.

</details>


### [906] [Causal Discovery in the Era of Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23608)
*Yujia Zheng,Vishal Verma,Mantej Gill,Haoyue Dai,Peter Spirtes,Kun Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出因果发现中LLM应仅辅助工作流而非提供因果判断，并基于此原则开发了causal-learn+平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有将LLM与因果发现结合的方法存在风险：模型可能依赖文本关联、提示伪影或幻觉机制来推断因果关系，模糊了因果证据的数据基础和假设前提，亟需明确LLM在因果发现中的合理角色边界。

Method: 提出"代理辅助工作流，因果结论根植于数据、假设、算法和专家决策"的原则。基于此原则构建causal-learn+在线平台，协调数据分析、预处理、方法推荐、专家知识融入、形式化发现与解释等环节。

Result: 通过Big Five人格数据案例研究，展示了LLM辅助的因果发现流程——LLM负责检查数据、检索上下文、解释方法假设、澄清图输出，但不提供边、方向、先验、约束或因果结论。

Conclusion: 因果发现中LLM应作为辅助工具而非因果证据来源，causal-learn+平台验证了这一原则的可行性。

Abstract: Recent attempts to combine large language models (LLMs) with causal discovery ask models to infer pairwise directions, propose graph structures, or inject language-model outputs as priors and constraints. These approaches promise faster analysis, but they also obscure whether a causal evidence is supported by data and assumptions or by textual associations, prompt artifacts and hallucinated mechanisms. We argue for a different role for agents in causal discovery. Agents should inspect data, retrieve context, explain method assumptions and clarify graph outputs, but they should not supply edges, orientations, priors, constraints or causal conclusions. We propose the principle that agents assist the workflow, while causal claims remain grounded in data, explicit assumptions, formal algorithms, diagnostics and user or domain-expert decisions. We instantiate this principle in causal-learn+, an online platform that coordinates data analysis, preprocessing, method recommendation, expert-knowledge incorporation, formal discovery and interpretation around the algorithmic ecosystem of causal-learn. A case study on Big Five personality data illustrates agent-assisted pipeline of causal discovery without turning language-model unreliability into causal evidence. The platform is available at causallearn.com.

</details>


### [907] [AI-driven Optimisation of Quality of Recovery (QoR) in Remote Patient Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23631)
*Yansong Liu,Li-Hsi,Lin,Pramit Khetrapal,Ronnie Stafford,John Kelly,Ivana Drobnjak*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文开发了QoR-compact，一个仅包含5个问题的精简版术后恢复调查表，在预测近期的术后恢复严重程度方面，其表现（AUC-ROC 0.968）与完整的15题版QoR-15（0.964）相当，旨在解决远程患者监测中问卷完成率低（仅55%）的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 远程患者监测依赖患者报告数据，但金标准QoR-15设计用于偶发院内评估，每日远程施测时完成率低（仅55%）。作者希望开发一个更轻量的每日输入工具，在保持预测能力的同时提高患者依从性。

Method: 设定目标为1/3的原始题目量，穷举评估QoR-15所有3,003种可能的5题子集，筛选出最优子集（QoR-compact）。该子集包含Q3（休息感）、Q9（舒适与控制感）、Q10（总体幸福感）、Q12（严重疼痛）和Q14（焦虑感），覆盖身心两轴。

Result: QoR-compact的平均AUC-ROC达0.968（95% CI 0.915-0.988），与使用1/3题目的基线0.964在统计上无显著差异。患者级回测显示其在追踪再入院事件方面与完整问卷同样可靠。

Conclusion: QoR-compact可作为QoR-15的补充，提供更短的每日预测输入。这为前瞻性研究奠定了基础，以验证更轻量的问卷是否能提高完成率。需在更大队列上进行外部验证后才能用于临床。

Abstract: Remote patient monitoring depends on patient-reported data to capture the subjective dimension of recovery that devices cannot measure. The Quality of Recovery (QoR-15) survey is the gold-standard instrument for this purpose. It was designed and validated for occasional in-hospital assessment, yet remote monitoring now administers it to patients daily. In our own post-surgical deployment, only 55% of patients submitted the survey more than 14 days of 30 monitoring days. We developed QoR-compact, a five-item daily input for the RPM prediction pathway. Setting a deployment-driven target of one-third of the daily items, we exhaustively evaluated all 3,003 five-question subsets of the QoR-15 and tested whether the best of them matches the full instrument in predicting near-term postoperative recovery severity. QoR-compact achieves a mean AUC-ROC of 0.968 (95% CI 0.915-0.988), statistically comparable to the 0.964 baseline obtained with one-third of the items. Patient-level backtesting indicates that it tracks readmission events as faithfully as the full form. Its five items span the physical and psychological axes of recovery: Q3 (feeling rested), Q9 (feeling comfortable and in control), Q10 (general well-being), Q12 (severe pain), and Q14 (feeling worried or anxious). The QoR-15 remains the gold-standard measure of recovery; QoR-compact complements it as a shorter daily input designed for prediction. This parity provides the basis for a prospective study of whether a lighter daily input is, in turn, completed more consistently. External validation on larger cohorts is required before clinical use.

</details>


### [908] [AI Exposure Scores: what they measure, what they miss, and what comes next](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23633)
*Campbell Lund,Thomas Euyang,Zanele Munyikwa,Marzieh Fadaee*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文以GPTs are GPTs暴露分数为案例，揭示了静态测量分数在政策应用中的结构性局限，并指出研究-政策之间的协调鸿沟比方法论改进更亟待解决。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GPTs are GPTs分数已成为未来工作辩论的核心实证输入，但随着分数传播，原作者指出的局限性并未同步传播。作者希望揭示静态暴露分数与政策需求之间的结构性差距，并呼吁更多关注研究者与政策制定者之间的协调问题。

Method: 以GPTs are GPTs分数的扩散为案例研究，分析其时间、地理和本体论局限在政策分析中的复合效应；调研五类回应性研究（动态与基准测量、集成方法、任务框架扩展、以工人为中心的指标、采用与使用数据）；提出缩小研究-政策差距的额外步骤。

Result: 识别出两个鸿沟：结构性鸿沟（静态分数无法满足政策需求）和研究-政策协调鸿沟（政策研究引用静态分数却不跟进方法论更新）；提出事后框架和政治性重新想象未来等补充路径。

Conclusion: 缩小研究-政策差距是共同任务：政策制定者需拓宽证据基础、将工人视为认知伙伴、从预测转向准备；研究者需建设数据基础设施、采用参与式方法、以政策制定者为目标写作。更好的测量重要，但仅靠测量无法弥合第二个鸿沟。

Abstract: A set of exposure scores calculated in 2023 has become a central empirical input to the future of work debate. Produced by Eloundou et al. (2023) and referred to here as the GPTs are GPTs scores, they define exposure as the share of occupational tasks a large language model can assist with. This work is a genuine methodological contribution, but as the scores travel from the time and place they were produced, the limitations the authors named do not always travel with them. Two gaps have widened as a result. The first is structural, between what static exposure scores measure and what policy questions actually require. Taking the diffusion of these scores as a case study, we show how their temporal, geographic, and ontological limitations compound in policy-facing analyses, and we survey five families of research responding to these limits: dynamic and benchmark-based measures, ensemble methods, task-framework extensions, worker-centered metrics, and adoption and usage data. The second gap is the one we argue needs more attention: the coordination between researchers and policymakers. The policy-relevant work which ask who is harmed, who benefits, how, and when, continues to reference the static GPTs are GPTs scores without engagement with the methodological updates that would let these questions be answered more reliably. We then ask what additional steps towards navigating uncertainty remain: ex-post frameworks and the deliberate, political work of reimagining what futures are worthy of building towards are. Closing the research-policy gap is a shared task: policymakers must widen their evidence base, engage workers as epistemic partners, and shift from prediction to preparedness; researchers must build data infrastructure, adopt participatory methods, and write with policymakers in mind. Better measurement matters, but it will not close the second gap alone.

</details>


### [909] [TailorMind: Towards Preference-Aligned Multimodal Content Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23643)
*Hengji Zhou,Ye Liu,Yufeng Liu,Si Wu,Lianghao Xia,Liqiang Nie*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了TailorMind框架，用于个性化多模态内容生成，在没有现成内容池的情况下，通过超图协同过滤、文本梯度下降、检索增强风格控制和跨模态一致性反射等技术，实现用户行为到生成偏好的转化，在构建的TailorBench基准上取得优异效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有个性化内容系统依赖用户生成内容（UGC），当缺乏合适内容或内容生成延迟/成本高时效果不佳。多模态生成器虽可按需合成内容，但如何将用户行为痕迹转化为生成就绪的偏好仍未被充分探索。

Method: 1) 超图协同过滤丰富稀疏用户历史；2) 文本梯度下降优化文本偏好画像；3) 检索增强风格控制保证输出符合真实UGC模式；4) 跨模态一致性反射减少语义漂移。

Result: 在TailorBench（三个主流平台构建）上，TailorMind在连贯性、新颖性、美学质量上优于代表性子模型生成基线和真实UGC，排序阶段Recall提升高达29%。

Conclusion: TailorMind有效连接了协同偏好建模与可控多模态生成，在缺乏匹配UGC的场景下仍能生成高质量个性化内容，证明了该范式的优势。

Abstract: Personalized content systems depend on available UGC and struggle when suitable content is absent, delayed, or costly to create. Although multimodal generators can synthesize content on demand, how to translate behavioral traces into generation-ready preferences remains underexplored. We study personalized multimodal content generation: creating user-tailored multimodal content without existing item pools or waiting for matching UGC. We propose TailorMind, linking collaborative preference modeling with controllable multimodal generation. TailorMind enriches sparse user histories via hypergraph collaborative filtering and optimizes textual profiles with ranking-error feedback and textual gradient descent. Retrieval-augmented style control grounds outputs in authentic UGC patterns, while cross-modal cohesion reflection reduces semantic drift. We construct TailorBench, a benchmark from three mainstream platforms evaluated along five dimensions: coherence, novelty, aesthetic, hallucination, profiling. Experiments show that TailorMind achieves competitive or stronger coherence, improves novelty and aesthetic quality over representative generation baselines and ground-truth UGC, demonstrating advantages over retrieving available content or comparable UGC, while achieving up to 29% Recall gains in reranking. Our code is released at: https://github.com/iLearn-Lab/TailorMind.

</details>


### [910] [Teaching LLMs String Matching, Backtracking, and Error Recovery to Deduce Bases and Truth Tables for the Combinatorially Exploding Bit Manipulation Puzzles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23672)
*Prateek Agnihotri,Sanchit Jain,Prabhat Agnihotri,Aditya Prasad,Shubham Jain*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文针对NVIDIA Nemotron模型推理挑战中的位操作谜题任务，提出放弃传统算术逻辑，转而基于字符串相似性、结构化搜索和自主错误恢复的新方法，最终在验证集上达到96%+准确率，获得比赛第7名。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在位操作谜题任务中表现糟糕，传统方法强制模型模拟布尔逻辑和算术运算会导致幻觉；同时位运算搜索空间（移位、旋转、逻辑门的组合）存在严重的组合爆炸问题，计算上难以处理。

Method: 1. 基与真值表构建：将逻辑门推导转化为基选择任务，利用字符串相似性（最小比特翻转）来隔离原始变换并推导真值表。2. 回溯DFS与错误恢复：形式化搜索过程，测试候选基，检测样本间的逻辑冲突，失败时回溯以进行鲁棒的错误恢复。3. 比特分词与交互推理SFT：强制分词器将二进制字符串编码为独立单比特token，使用动态掩码模拟外部oracle反馈，训练模型原生地进行假设、自我评估和回溯。

Result: 在位操作谜题评估中达到96%以上的验证准确率，是该类别中的最高性能，最终在比赛中获得总排名第7。

Conclusion: 放弃复杂算术逻辑、采用字符串相似性与结构化搜索的策略，有效克服了位操作谜题中的组合爆炸问题，显著提升了LLM在该任务上的表现。

Abstract: This paper presents our algorithmic innovations for the NVIDIA Nemotron Model Reasoning Challenge, focusing on Bit Manipulation Puzzles. In this task, the objective is to discover a hidden logical rule transforming input binary strings to outputs, then apply it to unseen inputs. Large Language Models (LLMs) notoriously struggle here; traditional methods force them to simulate complex boolean logic and arithmetic, leading to hallucinations. Furthermore, the search space of bitwise operations (combinations of shifts, rotations, and logic gates) suffers from a severe combinatorial explosion. To overcome this computational intractability, we present a novel approach that abandons arithmetic logic entirely in favor of string similarity, structured search, and autonomous error recovery.
  Our core contributions are: 1. Bases and Truth Table Formulation: We reframe logic-gate deduction into a base-selection task, leveraging string similarity (minimal bit flips) to isolate primitive transformations ("bases") and deduce truth tables without complex arithmetic. 2. Backtracking DFS and Error Recovery: We formalize a search process that tests candidate bases, detects logical collisions across examples, and backtracks upon failure to perform robust error recovery. 3. Bit Tokenization and Interactive Reasoning SFT: We force the tokenizer to encode binary strings as individual single-bit tokens. We use dynamic masking to simulate external oracle feedback, training the model to hypothesize, self-evaluate, and backtrack natively.
  Evaluated on bit manipulation puzzles, our approach achieved over 96% validation accuracy. This represents the highest performance in this category, driving our 7th Place overall finish in the contest.

</details>


### [911] [PsyBridge: A Hybrid Intelligent Framework for Multi-Dimensional Mental Health Assessment and Decision Support](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23673)
*Sunil Wanjari,Manish Thakre,Aayushi Asole,Sharwari Raut,Kwabena Adu-Duodu,Yinhao Li,Stanly Wilson*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出PsyBridge，一个融合临床筛查工具（PHQ-9/GAD-7）、认知评估和人格特征的多维心理健康评估框架，通过加权聚合机制生成可解释的风险分类与建议。在半合成数据集上达到0.84准确率，优于单独使用传统筛查工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有心理健康评估方法存在两大局限：一是依赖孤立的筛查工具或缺乏可解释性的数据驱动模型；二是多聚焦单一指标（如抑郁或焦虑），缺乏多维度综合决策支持。

Method: PsyBridge采用模块化设计，整合PHQ-9、GAD-7等临床验证工具，结合认知和行为指标，通过加权聚合机制生成可解释的心理健康风险分类与建议。

Result: 在500份半合成患者数据集上，PsyBridge准确率达0.84，优于单独使用PHQ-9和GAD-7；同时提升了精确率、召回率和F1分数。敏感性和消融实验表明，整合认知与人格组件可提升分类稳定性，减少中等风险预测的不一致性。

Conclusion: PsyBridge为数字健康和远程医疗环境下的AI辅助心理健康决策提供了一种可扩展且可解释的方案。

Abstract: Mental health assessment commonly relies on isolated screening instruments or data-driven models that often lack interpretability and multi-dimensional integration. Existing approaches frequently focus on individual indicators such as depression or anxiety while providing limited support for comprehensive and explainable decision-making. To address this limitation, this study proposes PsyBridge, a hybrid intelligent decision-support framework designed for multi-dimensional mental health assessment through the integration of clinically validated screening tools, cognitive evaluation, and personality profiling within a unified architecture. The proposed framework incorporates PHQ-9 and GAD-7 assessments alongside cognitive and behavioural indicators using a modular design and a weighted aggregation mechanism to generate interpretable mental health risk classifications and recommendations. To evaluate the framework, a semi-synthetic dataset consisting of 500 patient profiles representing varying severity levels was constructed based on clinically grounded score distributions. Experimental results demonstrate that PsyBridge achieves an overall accuracy of 0.84, outperforming standalone PHQ-9 and GAD-7 assessments while improving precision, recall, and F1-score. Sensitivity analysis and ablation studies further indicate that integrating cognitive and personality components contributes to more stable classification performance and reduces inconsistencies in moderate-risk prediction. The findings suggest that PsyBridge provides a scalable and interpretable approach for AI-assisted mental health decision support, particularly within digital healthcare and telehealth environments.

</details>
